folders.Environmental Protection Upgrades:
环境防护升级
Environmental Protection Upgrades
folders.Solarian Crystals:
星辉武者水晶
Solarian Crystals
folders.Ancestry Equipment:
族裔 装备
Ancestry Equipment
folders.Bestiary Items:
怪物图鉴物品
Bestiary Items

Shock Module (Commercial).name: 电击模组（商用） Shock Module (Commercial)
Shock Module (Commercial).description:
该回路会让电流安全地流经你的武器。它会额外造成 1d6 点电击伤害。若重击命中，电流会迸射而出，对目标 10 英尺内由你选择的至多两个其他生物造成等量的电击伤害。

This circuit safely courses electricity through your weapon. It deals an extra 1d6 electricity damage. On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target.

Artificial Immortalizer.name: 人造永生装置 Artificial Immortalizer
Artificial Immortalizer.description:
这个额外器官会与你的循环系统和免疫系统同化并加以强化。当你对持续性的疾病或毒素进行强韧豁免并成功时，无论其当前处于哪个阶段，你都会完全康复。当你获得该义体强化时，你的体质调整值提高1，或将其提高至+4，以能让你获得更高数值者为准。

激活—生命缓冲 1 (操纵)

频率 每天一次

效果 你获得50点临时生命值，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.68zoB7dwKUcmEO1R]{效果：人工永生器}

This extra organ assimilates with and enhances your circulatory and immune systems. When you succeed at a Fortitude save against an ongoing disease or poison, you recover completely, regardless of its current stage. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Constitution modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Life Buffer 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain 50 temporary Hit Points, which last for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.68zoB7dwKUcmEO1R]{Effect: Artificial Immortalizer}

Graviton Crystal (Tactical).name: 引力子水晶（战术型） Graviton Crystal (Tactical)
Graviton Crystal (Tactical).description:
引力水晶会增强你太阳显化周围的重力，使其影响加速，并可能将敌人困在其重力场中。当你处于引力调谐状态时，你的太阳武器或太阳耀斑会额外造成 @Damage[1d6[untyped]] 点与你的太阳武器或耀斑伤害类型相同的伤害。在你处于引力调谐状态时，若造成重击，则目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:31] 豁免，否则将被 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}，持续 2 轮。

此外，当你用太阳武器或太阳耀斑命中一个被定身或受压制的生物时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:31] 豁免，否则会被击倒在地。

A graviton crystal increases the forces of gravity around your solar manifestations, accelerating its impact and possibly trapping foes within its gravity field. While graviton attuned, your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d6[untyped]] damage of your solar weapon's or flare's damage type. On a critical hit while you're graviton attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:31] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 2 rounds.

Additionally, when you hit an immobilized or suppressed creature with your solar weapon or solar flare, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:31] save or be knocked prone.

Uniclamp.name: 万用夹 Uniclamp
Uniclamp.description:
这是终极的通用配件物品，可用于固定从灭火器、手电筒到乐器或通讯器等各种物件。安装该升级时，你可以将一件总体积至多为1 Bulk 的科技装备牢固地连接到多功能夹具上。你可以在仍然持握武器的同时，使用与你持握武器相同数量的手来激活所连接的物品。多功能夹具只能被正确配置为处理非魔法科技装备，且不能与武器或护盾配合使用。GM 可能会裁定某些物品无法安装在某些武器上。

This is the ultimate all-purpose accessory item for holding everything from a fire extinguisher or flashlight to a musical instrument or comm unit. You can securely attach a single piece of tech gear of up to 1 Bulk to a uniclamp when you install the upgrade. You can activate the attached item using the same number of hands you use to wield your weapon while still wielding your weapon. The uniclamp can be properly configured to handle only non-magical tech gear and doesn't function with weapons or shields. The GM might determine that some items don't fit on certain weapons.

Laser Rifle.name: 激光步枪 Laser Rifle
Laser Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这些可靠的量产步枪通过方形枪管射出集中的能量光束。协约世界的通用标准型号具有极高的改装空间，设计上可兼容各种配件和升级，使使用者能够根据自己的偏好调整这把激光步枪，甚至将其拼改成一把几乎认不出来的武器。

Upgrades: 1

These dependable, mass-produced rifles shoot concentrated beams of energy out of square-shaped barrels. The universal standard Pact Worlds model is highly modifiable and designed to function with a variety of accessories and upgrades, with wielders adapting the laser rifle to their preferences and even kit-bashing it into a nearly unrecognizable weapon.

Sunshades (Commercial).name: 遮阳镜（商用） Sunshades (Commercial)
Sunshades (Commercial).description:
太阳镜让每个人看起来都更酷。

Sunshades make everyone look cooler.

Flash Grenade (Tactical).name: 闪光手雷（战术型） Flash Grenade (Tactical)
Flash Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 目眩 2 轮

闪光手雷会释放出一阵强光，要求 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内的生物进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免。若失败，该生物会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical dazzled for 2 rounds

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:10] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Filtered Rebreather (Commercial).name: 过滤式呼吸器（商业） Filtered Rebreather (Commercial)
Filtered Rebreather (Commercial).description:
这件护甲升级可增强你护甲的环境防护，并滤除常见污染物，包括防护大多数有毒大气。

This armor upgrade supplements your armor's environmental protections and filters out common contaminants, including protection from most toxic atmospheres.

Maneuvering Unit (Advanced).name: 机动单元（先进型） Maneuvering Unit (Advanced)
Maneuvering Unit (Advanced).description:
内部稳定器和喷射器会同步你在零重力中的动作。当你处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{未束缚的}状态时，你不会处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，也不会笨拙。

激活—推进 1（移动）

需求 你处于零重力环境中

效果 你朝自己选择的任意方向移动15尺。你开始朝该方向漂浮。

Internal stabilizers and jets synchronize your movements in zero gravity. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered}.

Activate—Thrust 1 (move)

Requirements You're in a zero-g environment

Effect You move 15 feet in any direction you choose. You begin to float in that direction.

Sniper's Scope (Commercial).name: 狙击镜（商业） Sniper's Scope (Commercial)
Sniper's Scope (Commercial).description:
一种伸缩式瞄准附件有助于观察远处目标。

激活—调整瞄具 1 (操纵)

效果 使该瞄准镜所附着武器的射程增量增加10英尺。如果该武器的基础射程增量为50英尺或更高，则改为使该武器的射程增加20英尺。此效果持续至你的下个回合开始时，或直到你不再持用该瞄准镜所附着的武器时为止，以较早发生者为准。这不会增加区域攻击的大小。

A telescopic sighting attachment helps view distant targets.

Activate—Adjust Sight 1 (manipulate)

Effect Increase the range increment of the weapon the scope is attached to by 10 feet. If the weapon has a base range increment of 50 feet or more, increase the range of the weapon by 20 feet instead. This lasts until the beginning of your next turn or until you're no longer wielding the weapon this scope is attached to, whichever comes first. This does not increase the size of area attacks.

Dermal Plating (Superior).name: 真皮镀层（卓越型） Dermal Plating (Superior)
Dermal Plating (Superior).description:
坚硬的板层保护你的皮肤，并帮助你偏转物理打击。带有真皮镀层的肢体视为一面护盾。你可以用你的肢体执行“举盾”，使你在直到你下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 的境况加值，但使用时不需要占用手。你可以用你的肢体使用“护盾格挡”反应。真皮镀层的硬度为 20。你使用“护盾格挡”后，你的真皮镀层会受损，且在纳米机器人修复这些坚固板层的 24 小时内无法使用。

Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 20. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Scattergun.name: 霰弹枪 Scattergun
Scattergun.description:
升级： 1

霰弹枪是一种长管火器，会发射大量球形弹丸，以命中多个目标。

Upgrades: 1

A scattergun is a long-barreled firearm that fires numerous spherical projectiles to hit multiple targets.

Auto-CPR Unit.name: 自动心肺复苏装置 Auto-CPR Unit
Auto-CPR Unit.description:
该装置会监测你的生命体征并自动施以援助。当你穿着这件护甲且具有濒死状态时，你的恢复检定 DC 等于 8 + 你的濒死值（而非 10 + 你的濒死值）。

This device monitors your vital signs and automatically administers aid. When you have the dying condition while wearing this armor, the DC of your recovery checks is equal to 8 + your dying value (instead of 10 + your dying value).

Vertebralis Thorn.name: 脊椎棘刺 Vertebralis Thorn
Vertebralis Thorn.description:
升级 1

脊椎棘刺是一种在尸骸舰队军械库中锻造的武器，由被杀敌人的脊柱改制而成，并安装了特制的光纤缆线。尸骸舰队军官偏爱这种武器，主要是因为在他们首次取得重大征服后，通常会获赠一把仪式版本，而这把武器一般由他们亲手杀死的某个生物的脊椎制成。

Upgrades 1

The vertebralis thorn is a weapon forged in the Corpse Fleet armory, repurposed from the spinal columns of slain enemies and fitted with specialized fiber-optic cables. Corpse Fleet officers favor this weapon, primarily because a ceremonial version is presented to them after their first major conquest, generally created from the spine of a creature they personally killed.

Bipod (Tactical).name: 两脚架（战术） Bipod (Tactical)
Bipod (Tactical).description:
两脚架可以安装在强力武器上——具有反冲特征的武器——让力量较低的持用者能够使用它们，但代价是机动性下降。你可以用一个肢体通过单个交互动作架设两脚架，将两脚架设置在你的方格内。使用两脚架时，发射具有反冲特征的武器不会承受 –2 罚值，即使你的力量不足以避免该罚值也是如此。

在你将武器移动到不同位置之前，你可以用一个自由动作进行交互来收起两脚架。通过交互动作部署或收起两脚架，不会像交互动作通常那样自动使你被察觉，只要你不是在生物看得见它的位置架设或拆除两脚架即可。

A bipod can be attached to powerful weapons—those with the kickback trait—to allow wielders with lower Strength to use them at the cost of mobility. You can set up the bipod with a single Interact action using one appendage, setting the bipod in your square. When using a bipod, you don't take the –2 penalty for firing a kickback weapon, even if your Strength isn't high enough to avoid the penalty.

You can Interact as a free action to retrieve the bipod before you can move the weapon to a different position. Deploying or retrieving a bipod with an Interact action doesn't automatically make you observed like an Interact action normally would, so long as you don't set up or remove the bipod when it's in a spot where creatures can see it.

Force Field (Paragon).name: 力场（完美型） Force Field (Paragon)
Force Field (Paragon).description:
力场会吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其版本。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先应用于力场的生命值，然后才应用于你的生命值（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，则你的力场和护盾都会承受伤害。如果一次攻击或效果造成的伤害将力场降至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会停用，并且在 10 分钟内无法再次激活。力场在处于激活状态时，会在你的每个回合开始时恢复标示数量的生命值。

如果你的力场为战术型或更高版本，它还会保护你免受致命重击。每次你在力场处于激活状态时受到重击，对照所列 DC 尝试一次平检。若成功，则改为普通命中。

该力场有 42 生命值，并在你的回合恢复 8 生命值，以及 @Check[flat|dc:15]。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 42}

激活—升起力场 1 (manipulate)

频率 每日三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 42 Hit Points and replenishes 8 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:15].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 42}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Acid Dart Rifle.name: 酸液飞镖步枪 Acid Dart Rifle
Acid Dart Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这把步枪使用压缩空气发射微小的膛室飞镖，飞镖内装载了构成一种高腐蚀性化合物的各个成分，这些成分在发射前始终彼此分离，因此几乎可以无限期保存，同时将意外暴露的风险降至最低。

Upgrades: 1

This rifle uses compressed air to shoot tiny, chambered darts loaded with components for a highly corrosive compound that remains separated until launched, allowing for nearly unlimited shelf life with minimal risk of accidental exposure.

Force Field (Superior).name: 力场（卓越型） Force Field (Superior)
Force Field (Superior).description:
力场会吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其版本。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先施加到力场的生命值上，然后才施加到你的生命值上（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，你的力场和护盾都会受到伤害。如果一次攻击或效果造成的伤害使力场降至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会解除激活，并且 10 分钟内无法再次激活。力场在激活期间，每轮于你的回合开始时恢复标明数量的生命值。

如果你的力场为战术型或更高版本，它还会保护你免受致命重击。每次你在力场激活时受到重击，对照所列 DC 尝试一次平检。若成功，则改为普通命中。

该力场拥有 26 生命值，并在你的回合恢复 5 生命值，且 @Check[flat|dc:18]。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 26}

激活—升起力场 1 (manipulate)

频率 每日三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 26 Hit Points and replenishes 5 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:18].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 26}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Singing Spear.name: 歌唱长矛 Singing Spear
Singing Spear.description:
升级： 1

这把长矛的经典造型如同一个放大的音符；每当它命中时，都会奏出悦耳的音调，并在每场战斗中谱写出一首新歌。

Upgrades: 1

Classically shaped like an oversized musical note, this spear intones melodious pitches when it strikes, creating a new song with each battle.

Quicklock.name: 速锁 Quicklock
Quicklock.description:
速锁武器配备了多个追踪装置和额外的计算机处理器，以提升其内置瞄准系统的反应速度，使其持用者能够迅速出击。持用速锁武器时，你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}状态，但你只能使用该状态赋予的额外动作来用此武器进行一次打击。

A quicklock weapon has multiple tracking devices and additional computer processors to increase the rapidity of its built-in targeting systems, allowing its wielder to strike rapidly. While wielding a quicklock weapon, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition, but you can use the additional action granted only to make a Strike with the weapon.

Seeker Rifle.name: 追寻者步枪 Seeker Rifle
Seeker Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这种单发狙击步枪凭借稳定可靠且几乎无需保养的特点，成为浩界中最受欢迎的武器之一。

Upgrades: 1

This single-shot sniper rifle is one of the most popular weapons in the Vast thanks to its stability and reliability with minimal upkeep.

Invisibility Spell Amp.name: 隐形术 法术 增幅 Invisibility Spell Amp
Invisibility Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界中，这类物品被称为“法术安瓿”，是即用型的魔法注射剂，能赋予对应环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (操纵)

效果 2环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术}法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell

Datajack (Commercial).name: 数据接口（商业型） Datajack (Commercial)
Datajack (Commercial).description:
这种电控机械是一个内嵌于你体内的可编程数据端口，使你能够访问计算机和数字存储设备。任何手持式计算机都可以连接到该端口，而较大的系统通常需要一根适配器线缆。你不需要借助接口来访问该系统，因为它会通过数据接口直接连接到你的神经系统。你仍然必须进行任何与操作该设备相关的技能检定，例如使用计算机来访问系统。某些封闭系统根本不允许直接数据访问。

This cybernetic is a programmable data port installed into your body, allowing you to access computers and digital storage devices. Any handheld computer can connect to the port, while larger systems typically require an adapter cable. You don't need an interface to access the system, as it connects directly to your nervous system via the datajack. You must still attempt any skill checks associated with operating the device, such as Computers to access a system. Some closed systems don't allow direct data access at all.

Fireburst Chamber.name: 爆燃膛室 Fireburst Chamber
Fireburst Chamber.description:
火爆腔室使你能够引导榴弹发射器或下挂式榴弹发射器内部榴弹的爆炸。

激活—火爆模式 1 (操纵)

效果 榴弹发射器或下挂式榴弹发射器获得区域（锥形）特征，射程为15英尺，并使用其所发射榴弹的属性，而非其通常射程。你可以用一个交互动作结束此效果。

A fireburst chamber allows you to direct the detonation of a grenade inside of a grenade launcher or an undermounted grenade launcher.

Activate—Fireburst Mode 1 (manipulate)

Effect The grenade launcher or the undermounted grenade launcher gains the area (cone) trait with a range of 15 feet and uses the properties of the grenade it fires instead of using its normal range. You can end this effect with an Interact action.

Fire Extinguisher (Tactical).name: 灭火器（战术型） Fire Extinguisher (Tactical)
Fire Extinguisher (Tactical).description:
灭火器喷出一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 的泡沫锥形区域，自动扑灭非魔法火焰，并以4环位尝试对消任何魔法火焰效果，使用 [[/r 1d20+14 #Counteract]]{+14} 的对消调整值。灭火器每次使用都会消耗1份化合物，并使用一个最高至战术级的化合物罐。

A fire extinguishes sprays foam in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], automatically putting out non-magical fires and attempting to counteract any magical fire effects at 4th rank with a [[/r 1d20+14 #Counteract]]{+14} counteract modifier. A fire extinguisher expends one chem each time it's used and uses a chem tank up to tactical grade.

Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Superior).name: 下挂式榴弹发射器（卓越型） Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Superior)
Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Superior).description:
这种支架式榴弹发射器最常被宣传用于发射破片手榴弹，但也能高效投送实用型弹药，例如烟雾弹和闪光弹。与专用榴弹发射器不同，装填下挂式榴弹发射器需要10分钟，需要将手榴弹安装到一种特制的可重复使用击发帽上，把它重新组装成弹药。一旦手榴弹装填完成，唯一安全的取出方式就是拆解整枚手榴弹，并在此过程中将其毁坏。

这具榴弹发射器的射程为50英尺，并具有追踪 +3特性。

激活——发射 1 (攻击)

效果 你发射已装填的手榴弹。

This bracket-mounted grenade launcher is most often advertised for use with fragmentation grenades, but can efficiently deploy utility ordinances, such as smoke grenades and flashbangs. Unlike a dedicated grenade launcher, it takes 10 minutes to load an undermounted grenade launcher, reassembling the grenade into ammunition by mounting it on a specialized reusable firing cap. Once a grenade has been loaded, it can only be safely removed by disassembling the entire grenade, destroying it in the process.

This grenade launcher has a range of 50 feet and the tracking +3 trait.

Activate—Launch 1 (attack)

Effect You launch the loaded grenade.

Flamethrower.name: 火焰喷射器 Flamethrower
Flamethrower.description:
升级： 1

这把笨重的步枪状武器利用枪托内储存的一罐高可燃加压化学品喷射火焰。

Upgrades: 1

This bulky, rifle-shaped weapon spews flames using a tank of highly combustible, pressurized chemicals housed in its stock.

Filtered Rebreather (Superior).name: 过滤式呼吸器（卓越型） Filtered Rebreather (Superior)
Filtered Rebreather (Superior).description:
这项护甲升级可增强你护甲的环境防护，并滤除常见污染物，包括防护大多数有毒大气。

你在对抗吸入类效果的强韧豁免检定上获得+3状态加值。

This armor upgrade supplements your armor's environmental protections and filters out common contaminants, including protection from most toxic atmospheres.

You gain a +3 status bonus to Fortitude saves against inhaled effects.

Chem Tank (Commercial).name: 化学品储罐（商用） Chem Tank (Commercial)

Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp.name: 细胞兴奋剂法术增幅 Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp
Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (manipulate)

效果 1环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QiW8VNdBf0SFUq69]{细胞刺激剂} 法术（DC 15）

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QiW8VNdBf0SFUq69]{Cellular Stimulant} spell (DC 15)

Dragon Gland (Tactical).name: 龙喉腺体（战术型） Dragon Gland (Tactical)
Dragon Gland (Tactical).description:
通过尖端外科手术，你的喉咙后部被植入了一个经过改造的魔法腺体，使其能够为你的族裔生物发挥作用。当该器官被生体塑造时，从以下列表中为你的吐息武器选择一种伤害类型：强酸、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波。你获得以下激活。

激活—呼气 1 （操纵）

频率 每10分钟一次

效果 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的每个生物受到 @Damage[(2d6)[untyped]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] 豁免。伤害类型取决于该强化的版本。

With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(2d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Assassin Rifle.name: 刺客步枪 Assassin Rifle
Assassin Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这把狙击步枪可拆解成小型部件，使其持用者能够在不引人注意的情况下夹带这件武器。大多数刺客步枪都配备了强力瞄准镜和数字瞄具。

Upgrades: 1

This sniper rifle breaks down into small parts, allowing its wielder to smuggle the weapon without attracting attention. Most assassin rifles are equipped with powerful scopes and digital sights.

Cloaking Skin (Tactical).name: 隐形皮肤（战术型） Cloaking Skin (Tactical)
Cloaking Skin (Tactical).description:
你的许多毛孔被可由魔法调控并定向的全息投影器所取代；这些投影器在激活时会同步运作，以自动与你周围环境相匹配，使你变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。

激活—隐蔽 1 （专注）

频率 每天三次

效果 你获得2环@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术}的效果，持续1分钟，或直到你花费一个具有专注特征的动作将其停用为止。

Many of your pores are replaced with magically regulated and directed holographic projectors that synchronize when activated to automatically match your surroundings, rendering you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}.

Activate—Cloak 1 (concentrate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect You gain the effects of 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} for 1 minute or until you spend an action, which has the concentrate trait, to deactivate it.

Null Space Chamber (Advanced).name: 零空间舱室（先进型） Null Space Chamber (Advanced)
Null Space Chamber (Advanced).description:
这台流线型的黑色装置可固定在背包、手提包或钥匙环上。当你按下装置侧面的按钮时，它会创造一个通往异次元囊袋空间的圆形传送门。该空间的容量取决于装置的类型。

你可以对虚空空间舱执行“交互”动作，将物品存放其中或将其取出。虚空空间舱只能从外部开启和关闭。当虚空空间舱在有空气的大气环境中开启时，它会按其剩余容量中的每 1 Bulk 充满可供 10 分钟使用的空气。位于虚空空间舱内的物品不会提供任何好处，除非先将其取出。将虚空空间舱连接到计算机后，计算机会显示其中所储存全部物品的清单。

容量 100 Bulk

This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 100 Bulk

Card Slinger.name: 飞牌客 Card Slinger
Card Slinger.description:
升级： 1

这把陶瓷武器会将扑克牌磨利并射出，例如无穷城牌组中的卡牌。其可折叠的设计和不显眼的弹药使其非常适合潜入戒备森严的地点，尤其是赌场。虽然这件武器往往依赖幸运一击，但在熟悉卡牌飞行轨迹的赌徒手中，它也能变得致命。

Upgrade: 1

This ceramic weapon sharpens and fires playing cards, such as those from an infinity deck. Their folding design and innocuous ammunition make it ideal for infiltrating secure locations, especially casinos. While the weapon often relies on lucky hits, in the hands of a gambler familiar with card trajectory, it can become deadly.

Cloaking Device (Commercial).name: 隐形装置（商业级） Cloaking Device (Commercial)
Cloaking Device (Commercial).description:
这台投影器会让光线绕过你的身体。

激活—扭曲光线 1 (manipulate)

频率 每天一次

效果 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形} 状态，持续1分钟，并获得2环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术} 的效果。

This projector bends light around your body.

Activate—Bend Light 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} for 1 minute, gaining the effects of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell.

Diva's Microphone (Advanced).name: 歌伶的话筒（先进型） Diva's Microphone (Advanced)
Diva's Microphone (Advanced).description:
这支华丽招摇的水晶麦克风点缀着闪烁的珠宝与精巧的灯光，会随着音乐的节拍脉动。它兼具麦克风与扬声器的功能，能将你的声音放大到足以让 500 英尺内的所有听众都清晰听见，即使原本会被其他环境噪音掩盖也不例外。这不会增加其他听觉或语言效果的距离或区域，而墙壁等物理屏障仍会像平常一样阻挡或减弱你的声音。

歌姬的麦克风使你使用它进行的表演检定获得 +3 物品加值。

激活—华彩乐章 2 (听觉)

频率 每 10 分钟一次

效果 你的歌声达到足以震裂耳膜的高潮，你从自己的空间施放一个 8 环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QpP30fcEl4NGjHwo]{音波尖啸}（DC 38）。

This ostentatious crystal microphone is embellished with glimmering jewels and delicate lights that pulse in time to music. It functions as both a microphone and speaker, amplifying your voice loud enough for you to be heard clearly by all listeners up to 500 feet away, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls still block or muffle your voice as normal.

The diva's microphone grants a +3 item bonus to Performance checks attempted with it.

Activate—Grand Finale 2 (auditory)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Your song reaches an eardrum-bursting climax as you cast a 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QpP30fcEl4NGjHwo]{Sonic Scream} originating from your space (DC 38).

Medpatch (Advanced).name: 医疗贴片（先进型） Medpatch (Advanced)
Medpatch (Advanced).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(5d6+12)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒药的豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(5d6+12)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Emergency Beacon.name: 紧急信标 Emergency Beacon
Emergency Beacon.description:
该物品需要内嵌一块电池才能运作。启动后，这个小型荚舱状装置会传输其所在位置，并且每轮发出一次明亮的红色闪光，每天消耗1次充能。任何能够接收信号的装置都可以接收到紧急信标发出的信号，随后可通过一次成功的 @Check[computers|dc:15] 或 @Check[survival|dc:15] 检定进行追踪。紧急信标的传输范围在平坦地形上为100英里，在森林或丘陵中为50英里，在山地地形或水下为25英里。或者，紧急信标也可以内嵌于星舰或载具的通信系统中。此时，其范围等同于该通信阵列的范围，且每小时消耗1次充能。

This item requires a battery to be installed for it to operate. When activated, this small, pod-shaped device transmits its location and emits a flash of bright red light once per round, consuming 1 charge per day. Any device capable of receiving signals can pick up a signal from an emergency beacon, which can then be traced with a successful @Check[computers|dc:15] or @Check[survival|dc:15] check. An emergency beacon's transmissions have a range of 100 miles over flat terrain, 50 miles in forests or hills, and 25 miles in mountainous terrain or underwater. Alternatively, an emergency beacon can be installed in a starship's or vehicle's communications system. In this case, its range is equal to that of the communications array, and it consumes 1 charge per hour.

Shimmerstone Serum.name: 闪晶石血清 Shimmerstone Serum
Shimmerstone Serum.description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

一种由闪晶石蒸馏而成的蓝色酊剂。你在对抗精神效果的豁免检定上获得 +1 物品加值，并在 10 分钟内进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时获得 +2 物品加值。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

A blue tincture distilled from shimmerstone. You gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects and a +2 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} for 10 minutes.

Spell Chip (4th-Rank Spell).name: 法术芯片（4环法术） Spell Chip (4th-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (4th-Rank Spell).description:
用法 内嵌于计算机或通讯装置中；

这些芯片可以内嵌于通讯装置和其他计算机中，使该装置能够施放法术。每个装置只能拥有一个法术芯片。从法术芯片施放法术需要用一只手持握计算机或通讯装置，并以该法术正常所需的动作数，通过“施放法术”活动来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。如果该法术具有法器，你仍然必须持有该法器，才能从法术芯片施放该法术。法术芯片不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所容纳的法术而变化。

除了施放该法术所消耗的充能外，构成法术芯片核心晶格的精密部件若在短时间内连续使用，还可能被损坏。若要在一天内使用法术芯片超过一次，则需要对其进行超频。再次施放该法术，然后掷一次 @Check[flat|dc:10]。若成功，法术芯片损坏。若失败，法术芯片被摧毁。如果任何人试图对当天已经超频过的法术芯片再次超频，则该法术芯片会自动被摧毁（即使它已经被修复），且不会施放任何法术。

激活 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加超频

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Smoke Grenade (Tactical).name: 烟雾手雷（战术型） Smoke Grenade (Tactical)
Smoke Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域射击

这枚手雷会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内释放出一团能够遮蔽视线的烟雾。区域内的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，并且对它们而言，所有其他生物也都是隐蔽的。烟雾会持续 1 分钟，或直到被强风或类似效果驱散为止。

Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:10]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Ultralight Wings (Commercial).name: 轻量化翅膀（商用） Ultralight Wings (Commercial)
Ultralight Wings (Commercial).description:
可折叠的翅膀连接在你的肩胛骨或身体上类似的位置，使它们能够承载你的体重并辅助你的飞行动作。你可以用一个 Interact 动作展开翅膀，但当你穿着重于轻甲的护甲时，你不能展开或使用它们。当翅膀展开且你未陷入超载时，你获得 20 尺的飞行速度，以及对 Acrobatics 检定进行 Maneuver in Flight 时的 +1 物品加值。

Foldable wings are attached to your shoulder blades or a similar location on your body that allows them to lift your weight and assist your flying movements. You can deploy the wings with an Interact action, but you can't deploy or use them while you're wearing more than light armor. While the wings are deployed and you're not encumbered, you gain a fly Speed of 20 feet and a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight.

Glamer Projector.name: 幻影投射器 Glamer Projector
Glamer Projector.description:
可调式环圈会将魔法全息影像投射到你的护甲上，改变其外观，以契合你的个人风格并适用于任何场合。魅饰投影器预设了多种选项，包括休闲、商务和时尚。你可以使用计算机来自定义你的魅饰投影器，例如你通讯器中的那台。

激活—魅饰化！ 1 (操作)

效果 你会立即将护甲的外观改变为任意一套普通衣物，或任何其他类型的轻甲或重甲。此升级只能改变你护甲的外观，不能改变你本人或其余装备。你可以复制任何类型服装的外观，但不会获得特殊类型服装提供的任何物品加值，例如奢华时尚服饰。只有正受益于真视或类似效果的生物，才能尝试识破这种幻象，并与你的职业DC对抗。

Adjustable rings project magical holograms onto your armor, changing its appearance to match your personal style and suit any occasion. Glamer projectors come programmed with preset options, including casual, corporate, and fashion. You can customize your glamer projector using a computer, like the one in your comm unit.

Activate—Glamerize! 1 (manipulate)

Effect You instantly change the appearance of your armor to any set of normal clothes or any other type of light or heavy armor. This upgrade is capable of changing only the appearance of your armor, not yourself or the rest of your equipment. You can copy the look of any type of clothing, but you don't gain any item bonuses provided by special types of clothing, such as luxury fashion attire. Only a creature that's benefiting from truesight or a similar effect can attempt to disbelieve this illusion, opposed by your class DC.

Fear Projector (Tactical).name: 恐惧投射器（战术型） Fear Projector (Tactical)
Fear Projector (Tactical).description:
这个集成式全息影像投射器会让这把武器造成的伤口看起来比实际严重得多。当你用这把武器造成重击时，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

This integrated hologram projector makes the wounds caused by the weapon look way worse than they are. When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Congealer Incense (Commercial).name: 凝结香（商业） Congealer Incense (Commercial)
Congealer Incense (Commercial).description:
这缕精致的熏香装在一只手工吹制的玻璃小瓶中，以数百年树龄的埃俄克斯树木的石化木材制成，并混入灵脑人骨灰的酊剂与来自德米纳斯海洋的附魔沙粒。打破容器使其暴露在空气中时，这种熏香会迸发出甜腻的薰衣草香烟雾，黏附在虚体生物身上并稳定其形体。

激活——打破开启 1（操控） 持续时间 1 分钟

效果 紫色烟雾从熏香中滚滚涌出，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]。在每轮开始时，这个扩散增加 5 尺（最大至 30 尺）。激活凝结熏香的生物可以以自由动作将其丢弃在一个空间内，或者继续用 1 只手携带它，从而在该生物的回合中移动这个扩散的中心。任何进入该区域或在其中开始其回合的虚体生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:19] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 将该虚体生物的抗性视为降低了 4 点。

失败 同成功，但该生物失去所有对精准伤害的免疫，且将其抗性视为降低了 8 点。

大失败 同失败，但该生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

This delicate strand of incense is packaged in a hand-blown glass vial and crafted from petrified wood of centuries-old Eoxian trees, peppered with a tincture of elebrian ashes and enchanted sand from the Deminas Ocean. When exposed to air by breaking the container, the incense bursts into cloying, lavender-scented smoke that sticks to incorporeal creatures and stabilizes their form.

Activate—Break Open 1 (manipulate) Duration 1 minute

Effect Purple smoke billows out from the incense in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]. At the start of each round, this emanation increases by 5 feet (to a maximum of 30 feet). The creature who activated the congealer incense can drop it in a space as a free action, or can continue to carry it with them in 1 hand, thus moving the center of the emanation on that creature's turn. Any incorporeal creature who enters this area or begins their turn inside of it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:19] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success Treat the incorporeal creature's resistances as 4 lower.

Failure As success, but the creature loses all immunity to precision damage and treats its resistances as 8 lower.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Hacking Toolkit (Tactical).name: 黑客工具包（战术型） Hacking Toolkit (Tactical)
Hacking Toolkit (Tactical).description:
进行计算机检定以入侵计算机时，需要黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的联网进行接触。战术黑客工具包会使使用它进行的检定获得+1物品加值。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network. A tactical hacking toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks made with it.

Hypopen (Ultimate).name: 次级注射笔（终极型） Hypopen (Ultimate)
Hypopen (Ultimate).description:
这个小型圆筒内含有专门化的纳米机器人，它们可以执行以下任一效果：

  • 移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 状况
  • 将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心} 状况的值降低 1。
  • 对目标所受的一种毒素或疾病进行一次反制检定。你的反制调整值使用你的 @Check[medicine] 调整值，反制等级为 7。
  • 尝试一次平检，以结束持续性毒素或流血伤害。由于这是特别有效的协助，此次平检的 DC 从 15 降低至 10。
  • 使你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速} 1 分钟。你可以将额外动作用于调整、移动或攻击。

  • 使你获得快速治疗 10，持续 1 分钟。如果你具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取} 状况，则改为将其值降低 1，而不是获得快速治疗。

    @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.NqP5f6IChp8XNCrJ]{效果：低压笔（加速或快速治疗）}

This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.
  • Attempt a counteract check against one poison or disease afflicting the target. Use your @Check[medicine] modifier for the counteract modifier and a counteract rank of 7.
  • Attempt a flat check to end persistent poison or bleed damage. As this is particularly effective assistance, the DC of the flat check is reduced from 15 to 10 for this check.
  • Allow you to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 minute. You can use the extra action to Step, Stride, or Strike.

  • Grant you fast healing 10 for 1 minute. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} condition, decrease its value by 1 instead of gaining fast healing.

    @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.NqP5f6IChp8XNCrJ]{Effect: Hypopen (Quickened or Fast Healing)}

Medpatch (Superior).name: 医疗贴片（卓越型） Medpatch (Superior)
Medpatch (Superior).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(7d6+18)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得+2物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(7d6+18)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +2 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Voice Amplifier.name: 扩音器 Voice Amplifier
Voice Amplifier.description:
扩音器会大幅提高你的声音音量。你可以花费一个具有专注特征的动作来开启或关闭扩音器。激活时，扩音器使你在威吓检定上获得+1物品加值，并使听见你说话所需的察觉检定DC降低5。

A voice amplifier greatly increases the volume of your voice. You can switch a voice amplifier on or off by spending an action, which has the concentrate trait. While active, a voice amplifier grants you a +1 item bonus to Intimidation checks and lowers the DCs of Perception checks to hear you speaking by 5.

Force Field (Tactical).name: 力场（战术型） Force Field (Tactical)
Force Field (Tactical).description:
力场会吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其版本。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先应用于力场的生命值，然后才应用于你的生命值（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，你的力场和护盾都会受到伤害。如果来自一次攻击或效果的伤害将力场降低至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会停用，且 10 分钟内无法再次激活。力场在处于激活状态时，会在你的每个回合开始时恢复指定数量的生命值。

如果你的力场为战术型或更好，它还会保护你免受致命重击。每当你在力场处于激活状态时受到重击，都要对照所列 DC 进行一次平检。若成功，则改为普通命中。

该力场有 14 点生命值，并在你的回合恢复 3 点生命值，且 @Check[flat|dc:20]。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 14}

激活——升起力场 1（操作）

频率 每天三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 14 Hit Points and replenishes 3 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:20].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 14}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Pulse Gauntlet.name: 脉冲拳套 Pulse Gauntlet
Pulse Gauntlet.description:
升级： 1

这种重型纳米碳手套因地下格斗圈而流行开来，能够放大并武器化其佩戴者发出的声音，产生足以将敌人震倒在地的音爆。

Upgrades: 1

Popularized in underground fighting circles, this heavy-duty nanocarbon glove amplifies and weaponizes sounds made by its wielder, generating a sonic boom strong enough to knock an enemy off their feet.

Lock (Commercial).name: 锁（商业级） Lock (Commercial)
Lock (Commercial).description:
撬开商业锁需要两次成功的[[/act pick-a-lock dc=15]]{DC 15 盗窃}检定。

Picking a commercial lock requires two successful [[/act pick-a-lock dc=15]]{DC 15 Thievery} checks.

Boom Pistol.name: 轰鸣手枪 Boom Pistol
Boom Pistol.description:
升级： 1

轰鸣手枪看起来像一个带扳机的扩音器，能发射突如其来的声波爆发，足以击碎防弹玻璃或震裂内脏。

Upgrades: 1

A boom pistol resembles a megaphone with a trigger, emitting sudden bursts of sound capable of shattering bulletproof glass or rupturing organs.

Force Field (Ultimate).name: 力场（终极型） Force Field (Ultimate)
Force Field (Ultimate).description:
力场会吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其版本。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先应用于力场的生命值，然后才应用于你的生命值（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，你的力场和护盾都会受到伤害。如果一次攻击或效果造成的伤害使力场降至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会停用，并且 10 分钟内无法再次激活。力场在处于激活状态时，会在你的回合开始时每轮恢复标示数量的生命值。

如果你的力场为战术型或更高版本，它还会保护你免受致命重击。每当你在力场激活时受到重击，对所列 DC 进行一次平检。若成功，则改为一次普通命中。

该力场有 37 点生命值，并在你的回合恢复 7 点生命值，且 @Check[flat|dc:16]。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 37}

激活—升起力场 1 (manipulate)

频率 每天三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续激活 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 37 Hit Points and replenishes 7 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:16].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 37}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Thermal Capacitor (Tactical).name: 热能电容器（战术型） Thermal Capacitor (Tactical)
Thermal Capacitor (Tactical).description:
这件护甲升级可调节温度，保护你免受极端温度影响。你受到保护，免受严寒与轻度高温的影响。

This armor upgrade regulates heat, protecting you from extreme temperatures. You're protected from severe cold and mild heat.

Cairn Form Spell Amp (Commercial).name: 石冢形态法术增幅（商业） Cairn Form Spell Amp (Commercial)
Cairn Form Spell Amp (Commercial).description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”的法术安瓿，是可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的增益。

激活—注射 1（操纵）

类型 商业石冢形态法术安瓿；等级 7；价格 720 信用点

效果 4环阶 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HAaRcHfN4g83eSEC]{Cairn Form} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Type commercial cairn form spell amp; Level 7; Price 720 credits

Effect 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HAaRcHfN4g83eSEC]{Cairn Form} spell

Lock (Superior).name: 究极锁 Lock (Superior)
Lock (Superior).description:
撬开一个卓越锁需要五次成功的 [[/act pick-a-lock dc=30]]{DC 30 盗窃} 检定。

Picking a superior lock requires five successful [[/act pick-a-lock dc=30]]{DC 30 Thievery} checks.

Fangblade.name: 獠牙剑 Fangblade
Fangblade.description:
升级： 1

这把机动剑的边缘排列着坚固的锯齿，并以工业链锯的力量旋转。

Upgrades: 1

Durable teeth line the edges of this motorized sword and spin with the force of an industrial chainsaw.

Magboots.name: 磁力靴 Magboots
Magboots.description:
磁力靴可以用一个交互动作启动或关闭。激活时，它们使你在攀爬金属表面时的运动学检定获得+1物品加值，并且当你站在金属表面上时，针对试图对你进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{调整位置}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}的效果，你的强韧或反射DC获得+1物品加值。在失重区域中，当你穿着一双磁力靴时，你可以沿着金属表面以你的速度移动，且不会获得未束缚状态。

Magboots can be activated or deactivated with an Interact action. While active, they grant you a +1 item bonus to Athletics checks to Climb metal surfaces as well as a +1 item bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} you when you're standing on a metal surface. In areas of zero gravity, while wearing a pair of magboots, you can move your Speed across metal surfaces and don't gain the untethered condition.

Battleglove.name: 战斗手套 Battleglove
Battleglove.description:
升级： 1

这些耐用的手套套在持用者的双手（或其他附肢）上，并在指关节处配有加重板片或尖刺。

Upgrades: 1

These durable gloves fit over a wielder's hands (or other appendages) and feature weighted plates or spikes over the knuckles.

Smoke Grenade (Ultimate).name: 烟雾手雷（终极型） Smoke Grenade (Ultimate)
Smoke Grenade (Ultimate).description:
激活 1 区域射击

这枚手雷会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:50] 内释放出一团可提供遮蔽的烟雾。区域内的生物具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状况，且对它们而言，所有其他生物也都是隐蔽的。烟雾持续 1 分钟，或直到被强风或类似效果驱散为止。

Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:50]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Active Camouflage (Commercial).name: 主动伪装（商业） Active Camouflage (Commercial)
Active Camouflage (Commercial).description:
硬光投影器会利用随环境变化而响应的色彩与图案来改变你护甲的外观。穿着该护甲时，你的隐秘检定获得 +1 物品加值。

Hardlight projectors shift the appearance of your armor using shifting colors and patterns that respond to your environment. You gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing the armor.

Degradation Grenade (Tactical).name: 劣化手榴弹（战术型） Degradation Grenade (Tactical)
Degradation Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 范围 火焰

重击 @Damage[1d4[persistent,acid]] 伤害

退化手雷会产生猛烈的魔法爆炸，将物质撕裂到不同的现实中，只留下焦黑的物质块，随后消散为虚无。当手雷爆炸时，它会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内造成 2d8 强酸伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d4[persistent,acid]] damage

Degradation grenades create violent blasts of magic that rip matter into different realities, leaving behind blackened hunks of matter that dissipate into nothingness. When the grenade explodes, it deals 2d8 acid damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Field Scientist's Toolkit (Tactical).name: 科学家野外工具包（战术型） Field Scientist's Toolkit (Tactical)
Field Scientist's Toolkit (Tactical).description:
野外科学家工具包包含一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.btcbYUK4UqgQ699i]{化学分析仪}、显微镜、记录工具和样本袋。战术型野外科学家工具包在使用自然或适当的学识技能进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定时，给予+1物品加值。

A field scientist toolkit contains a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.btcbYUK4UqgQ699i]{Chemalyzer}, microscope, recording tools, and specimen bags. A tactical field scientist toolkit grants a +1 item bonus on @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks using Nature or an appropriate Lore skill.

Shobhad Longrifle.name: 绍贝德长步枪 Shobhad Longrifle

Veskarium Imperial Plate.name: 维斯卡里姆帝国板甲 Veskarium Imperial Plate
Veskarium Imperial Plate.description:
升级： 1

这种重甲由相互咬合的金属板构成，贴合穿戴者的身体轮廓，并呈鳞片状图案。尾部护甲和带爪手套是这种护甲的标准配置。

Upgrades: 1

This heavy armor is made of interlocking metal plates contoured to the wearer's body with a scaled pattern. Tailguards and clawed gloves are standard for this armor.

Carbon Shield.name: 碳素盾 Carbon Shield
Carbon Shield.description:
这种耐用而轻便的防护板有多种形状和尺寸，且常常会定制 LED 显示屏，用来展示个人徽记或某个组织的颜色与标志。

This durable yet lightweight defensive plate comes in a variety of shapes and sizes, and it's often customized with LED displays that broadcast personal insignia or an organization's colors and symbols.

Aeon Stone (Life-Giving).name: 永恒石（赐命） Aeon Stone (Life-Giving)
Aeon Stone (Life-Giving).description:
这些宝石是阿兹兰特星际帝国内的常见物品，也是冒险者和富有收藏家喜爱的身份象征。尽管这些石头有着千差万别的形态与功能，据说它们全都是远界实体在远古时代用来构筑物质宇宙的水晶工具碎片。

当你灌注这些经过精密切割的水晶之一时，这块石头会环绕你的头部运行（如果你没有头部，则环绕你身体上其他可见的部位），而不是佩戴在身上。你可以用一个交互动作收起万古石，而环绕运行的石头则可以通过对你成功施展一次@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}动作，从空中夺走。被收起或移除的石头仍然保持灌注，但其效果会处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态，直到你再次让它环绕你的头部运行为止。

万古石有多种不同类型，各自拥有不同的外观与魔法效果。每颗万古石在嵌入特定物品时还会获得一种共鸣能力，例如具有万古特征的武器，或称为寻路仪的古老魔法装置。

这枚带有珍珠光泽的锥形圆柱体会在你最需要时提供一口空气。你可以屏息的时间延长为两倍，并且在对抗吸入型毒素的豁免检定中获得+1物品加值。其共鸣能力使你每天可以将@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ShwUELLERVMtdjwE]{Life Seal}作为一种神圣先天法术施放一次。

Staple items within the Azlanti Star Empire, these gemstones are popular status symbols for adventurers and wealthy collectors. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to build the Universe in ancient times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head (or another visible part of your anatomy if you don't have a head) instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into specific items, such as weapons with the aeon trait or antique magical devices called wayfinders.

This nacreous, tapered cylinder provides a breath of air when you need it most. You can hold your breath for twice as long, and you gain a +1 item bonus to saves against inhaled poisons. The resonant power allows you to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ShwUELLERVMtdjwE]{Life Seal} as a divine innate spell once per day.

Darkvision Visor.name: 黑暗视觉面罩 Darkvision Visor
Darkvision Visor.description:
这副面罩包裹住你的视觉器官，增强你的天生感官。你获得黑暗视觉。

This visor wraps around your visual organs, enhancing your natural senses. You gain darkvision.

Resist Energy Spell Amp (Tactical).name: 抗能量法术增幅（战术） Resist Energy Spell Amp (Tactical)
Resist Energy Spell Amp (Tactical).description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是即用型的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1（操纵）

效果 4环阶 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy} spell

Smoke Grenade (Commercial).name: 烟雾手榴弹（商业） Smoke Grenade (Commercial)
Smoke Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域射击

这枚手雷会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内释放出一团提供遮蔽的烟雾。区域内的生物具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状况，且对它们而言，所有其他生物也都是隐蔽的。烟雾持续 1 分钟，或直到被强风或类似效果驱散。

Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:5]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Archaic Text.name: 古风文本 Archaic Text
Archaic Text.description:
这本书可能是一本宗教典籍、一部古老食谱集、一部爱情小说，或是一套老式机械示意图。

This book could be a religious text, a collection of ancient recipes, a romance novel, or vintage mechanical schematics.

Spell Gem (4th-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（4环法术） Spell Gem (4th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (4th-Rank Spell).description:
这些晶格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并编码了施放某个单一特定法术所需的魔法铭文。从法术宝石中施放法术需要将宝石持于一只手中，并以施放法术活动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传承。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，而法术宝石会在施放过程中被摧毁。法术宝石不能包含戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Spell Chip (2nd-Rank Spell).name: 法术芯片（2环法术） Spell Chip (2nd-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (2nd-Rank Spell).description:
用法 内嵌于计算机或通讯器中；

这些芯片可以内嵌于通讯器和其他计算机中，使该设备能够施放法术。每个设备只能拥有一枚法术芯片。通过法术芯片施放法术需要你一手持握该计算机或通讯器，并使用“施放法术”活动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。如果该法术具有法器，你仍必须持有该法器，才能通过法术芯片施放该法术。法术芯片不能容纳戏法或仪式。该物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

除了施放该法术时消耗的充能外，构成法术芯片核心晶格的精密组件如果在短时间内连续使用，也可能被毁坏。试图每天使用法术芯片超过一次需要对其进行超频。再次施放该法术，然后进行一次@Check[flat|dc:10]。若成功，法术芯片损坏。若失败，法术芯片被摧毁。如果任何人试图对一枚当天已经超频过的法术芯片再次进行超频，则该法术芯片会自动被摧毁（即使它已被修复），且不会施放任何法术。

激活 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加超频

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Fire Extinguisher (Advanced).name: 灭火器（先进型） Fire Extinguisher (Advanced)
Fire Extinguisher (Advanced).description:
灭火器会在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内喷射泡沫，自动扑灭非魔法火焰，并以 6 环尝试反制任何魔法火焰效果，反制调整值为 [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19}。灭火器每次使用时都会消耗 1 份化学剂，并可使用最高至先进级的化学剂罐。

A fire extinguishes sprays foam in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], automatically putting out non-magical fires and attempting to counteract any magical fire effects at 6th rank with a [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19} counteract modifier. A fire extinguisher expends one chem each time it's used and uses a chem tank up to advanced grade.

Cable Line (50 Feet, Tactical).name: 缆线（50英尺，战术型） Cable Line (50 Feet, Tactical)
Cable Line (50 Feet, Tactical).description:
这种工业缆线通常由覆有金属涂层的高耐久塑料制成。战术缆线包覆有精金合金。

This industrial cable is typically made of high-durability plastic coated in metal. A tactical cable line is coated in adamantine alloy.

Frag Grenade (Superior).name: 破片手雷（卓越型） Frag Grenade (Superior)
Frag Grenade (Superior).description:
激活 1 区域火力

重击 @Damage[1d6[bleed]]

这些破片手雷会爆炸成一团弹片云，并在一个 @Template[burst|distance:15] 内造成 8d8 穿刺伤害，豁免为 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic]。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d6[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 8d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Spell Gem (9th-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（9环法术） Spell Gem (9th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (9th-Rank Spell).description:
这些晶格状宝石悬置于硅质外壳中，并编码有施放某个单一、特定法术所需的魔法符文。要从法术宝石中施放法术，你必须单手持握该宝石，并以“施放法术”行动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传承。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，而法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Hammer.name: 锤子 Hammer
Hammer.description:
升级： 1

这把锤子既是珍贵的制作工具，也是一件高效的武器；它采用经过特殊配重的锤头与锤柄，能够在每一次打击中施加最大力量。

Upgrades: 1

Valued as both a crafting tool and an effective weapon, this hammer uses specially weighted heads and handles to deliver maximum force with each strike.

Wildwise Graft.name: 荒野智者移植体 Wildwise Graft
Wildwise Graft.description:
这种柔软的紫色真菌会附着在你的声带上，并将细小的菌丝延伸到你大脑的部分区域。你可以向动物、植物和真菌提问、接收它们的回答，并对它们使用外交技能。此类交流相当基础，只能引出诸如“饿”、“在那边”或“害怕”之类的简单回应。

This soft purple fungus attaches to your vocal cords and extends fine filaments into portions of your brain. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals, plants, and fungi. This communication is rudimentary and elicits basic responses, such as "hungry," "over there," or "frightened."

Thermal Capacitor (Commercial).name: 热能电容器（商用） Thermal Capacitor (Commercial)
Thermal Capacitor (Commercial).description:
这项护甲升级会调节温度，保护你免受极端温度的影响。你会受到轻度严寒和轻度炎热的防护。

This armor upgrade regulates heat, protecting you from extreme temperatures. You're protected from mild cold and mild heat.

Spell Gem (6th-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（6环法术） Spell Gem (6th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (6th-Rank Spell).description:
这些晶格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并编码有施放某个单一、特定法术所需的魔法符文。要从法术宝石中施放法术，你必须一只手持握该宝石，并以“施放法术”活动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传承。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，而法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能包含戏法或仪式。该物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以标明的环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Marrow Paste (Advanced).name: 骨髓膏（先进型） Marrow Paste (Advanced)
Marrow Paste (Advanced).description:
这种洋红色酊剂由伊欧克斯医疗企业集团 Nulife 开发并取得专利，带有金属气味，让人联想到新鲜血液。将其涂抹在能够从虚空治疗中受益的生物身上时，骨髓膏会赋予其快速愈合 5，持续 1 分钟。

Developed and patented by Eoxian medical conglomerate Nulife, this magenta tincture's metallic odor is reminiscent of fresh blood. When applied to the body of a creature that can benefit from void healing, marrow paste grants fast healing 5 for 1 minute.

Quilted Armor.name: 棉甲 Quilted Armor
Quilted Armor.description:
升级： 1

这种护甲由多层织物缝制而成，在拾荒者中很受欢迎。在阿基顿，有些绗缝护甲实际上是由传家毛毯和衣物改制而成，用于提供防护。

Upgrades: 1

This armor is made of layered fabrics stitched together and is popular with scavengers. On Akiton, some suits of quilted armor are actually constructed of heirloom blankets and garments repurposed for protection.

Flashlight (Tactical).name: 手电筒（战术型） Flashlight (Tactical)
Flashlight (Tactical).description:
手电筒会发出明亮光照。战术手电筒会在60英尺半径内发出其光照（并在接下来的60英尺内发出微光），且配备有滤光片，你可以将其闭合以遮挡或调暗光线。启动滤光片需要一个交互动作。

A flashlight sheds bright light. A tactical flashlight emits its light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light in the next 60 feet) and is equipped with filters, which you can close to block or dim the light. Activating the filters takes an Interact action.

Portable Amp.name: 便携式放大器 Portable Amp
Portable Amp.description:
这台小型设备通常会与乐器、麦克风或数据板上的音频播放功能同步。它会放大音量，使听到该音频的察觉检定 DC 降低 5。

This small device is typically synced up to an instrument, microphone, or the audio playback on a datapad. It amplifies the audio volume, reducing the DC of Perception checks to hear the audio by 5.

Infinity Deck.name: 无穷城牌组 Infinity Deck
Infinity Deck.description:
这副纸牌是“大断层”期间出现的一件神器的复制品，可用于玩无数种游戏。

A replica of an artifact that appeared during the Gap, this deck of playing cards is used to play countless games.

Skull of Yore.name: 太古骷髅 Skull of Yore
Skull of Yore.description:
这颗发黄的头骨以一种难以解读的痉笑回望着你。当手持或作为饰品佩戴时，这个魔法护符使你在识别不死生物的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定中获得 +1 物品加值。

This yellowing skull gazes back at you with an unreadable rictus smile. When held or worn as an accessory, this magical talisman grants a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks to identify undead.

Animated Intelligence (Advanced).name: 活化智能（先进型） Animated Intelligence (Advanced)
Animated Intelligence (Advanced).description:
魔法回路生成一个具有可自定义个性、但没有自由意志的虚拟智能动画意识。极少数情况下，虚拟智能最终可能会演化成真正具有自我意识和自由意志的人工智能，通常需要强大魔法或奇迹的帮助。

激活—自动攻击 2 （专注、操作）

效果 你放开该武器，它会在空中滑行，并自行与您最后一次攻击的敌人战斗；如果你的目标已被击败，则会攻击离它最近的敌人。每轮在你的回合结束时，该武器可以飞行，最多达到其 60 英尺的飞行速度，然后它可以再飞行一次，或对其射程或触及范围内的一个生物进行一次打击。

该武器占据 5 英尺空间，但不会阻挡或妨碍敌人试图穿过该空间移动。它提供夹击，但自身不会从夹击中受益。对于能够以其为目标的效果而言，这个动画意识视为一个科技生物。该武器不能穿过敌人的空间移动。该武器不能使用反应，而且它的飞行动作不会触发反应。

在激活期间，这个动画意识以 +32 再加上其物品对攻击检定的加值作为攻击调整值进行打击。它使用该武器的正常伤害，但力量和敏捷调整值均为 +0。该武器在命中或重击时自动触发的能力仍然生效，但该武器在动画化期间不能被激活，也不能从你的任何能力中获益。

每轮，当该武器完成其动作后，进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:4]。若失败，激活结束。该武器落到地面，并且 10 分钟内不能再次自动攻击。

Magical circuitry generates a virtual animated intelligence with a customizable personality and no free will. Rarely, a virtual intelligence might eventually evolve into a true artificial intelligence with self-awareness and free will, usually with the help of powerful magic or a miracle.

Activate—Autoattack 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect You Release the weapon and it glides through the air, fighting on its own against the last enemy you attacked, or the nearest enemy to it if your target has been defeated. At the end of your turn each round, the weapon can Fly up to its fly Speed of 60 feet, and then can either Fly again or Strike one creature within its range or reach.

The weapon has a space of 5 feet, but it doesn't block or impede enemies attempting to move though that space. It provides but does not benefit from flanking. The animated intelligence is considered a technological creature for the purpose of effects that can target it. The weapon can't move through an enemy's space. The weapon can't use reactions, and its Fly actions don't trigger reactions.

While it's activated, the animated intelligence Strikes with an attack modifier of +32 plus its item bonus to attack rolls. It uses the weapon's normal damage but has a +0 Strength and Dexterity modifier. The weapon's abilities that automatically trigger on a hit or critical hit still function, but the weapon can't be activated or benefit from any of your abilities while animated.

Each round, when the weapon finishes using its actions, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:4]. On a failure, the activation ends. The weapon falls to the ground and can't Autoattack again for 10 minutes.

Muscle Invigorator.name: 肌肉活化器 Muscle Invigorator
Muscle Invigorator.description:
这项义体使你的肌肉保持在最佳状态。你获得运动检定+3物品加值。当你获得这项义体时，你的力量调整值提高1，或将其提高至+4，以较高者为准。

激活—巨像之力 1 (操作)

频率 每天一次

效果 你暂时变得如巨像般具有破坏力与力量。在1小时内，你的近战打击无视所有并非由精金或更坚硬材料制成的物体和结构的硬度。

This augmentation keeps your muscles in peak condition. You gain a +3 item bonus to Athletics checks. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Strength modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Strength of the Colossi 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You temporarily become as destructive and powerful as a colossus. For 1 hour, your melee Strikes ignore the hardness of all objects and structures not made of adamantine or a harder material.

Null Space Chamber (Tactical).name: 虚空空间室（战术型） Null Space Chamber (Tactical)
Null Space Chamber (Tactical).description:
这是一种光滑的黑色装置，可固定在背包、手提包或钥匙环上。当你按下装置侧面的按钮时，它会生成一个通往异次元袋状空间的圆形传送门。该空间的容量取决于装置的类型。

你可以对虚空空间舱执行交互动作，将物品存入其中或取出。虚空空间舱只能从外部开启和关闭。当虚空空间舱在有空气的大气环境中开启时，其剩余容量中每留有 1 Bulk，就会充满可供呼吸 10 分钟的空气。位于虚空空间舱内的物品不会提供任何益处，除非先将其取出。将虚空空间舱连接到计算机后，会显示其中储存的所有物品的清单。

容量 50 Bulk

This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 50 Bulk

+2 Weapon Potency Crystal.name: +2 武器潜能水晶 +2 Weapon Potency Crystal
+2 Weapon Potency Crystal.description:
这件物品会结晶出复现恒星活动所需的专注。使用星能武器或耀斑进行的攻击检定获得 +2 物品加值，且该武器或耀斑可以同时受益于两枚轨道水晶。

This item crystallizes the focus needed to replicate the actions of a star. Attack rolls with the solar weapon or flare gain a +2 item bonus, and the weapon or flare can benefit from two orbital crystals.

Autodreamer.name: 明梦晶片 Autodreamer
Autodreamer.description:
一枚嵌入你神经系统的微芯片会在你睡眠时激活，使你沉浸于持续不断的清醒梦中，除非你选择进行正常睡眠。每天一次，当你在完整睡满 8 小时后醒来时，你视为已经花费了一天停工期进行重训。你的梦境取材于你自身的经历，因此你无法用它们来进行需要导师或专业知识的重训。

A microchip embedded into your nervous system activates whenever you sleep, immersing you in constant lucid dreams unless you choose to sleep normally. Once per day when you awaken after getting a full 8 hours of sleep, you count as having spent a day of downtime retraining. Your dreams draw from your own experiences, so you can't use them for retraining that requires an instructor or specialized knowledge.

Dermal Plating (Ultimate).name: 真皮镀层（终极型） Dermal Plating (Ultimate)
Dermal Plating (Ultimate).description:
坚硬的护板保护你的皮肤，并帮助你偏转物理打击。带有真皮镀层的肢体视为一面护盾。你可以用你的肢体执行“举起护盾”，使你在直到你下一回合开始前获得 AC +1 的环境加值，但使用它不需要占用一只手。你可以用你的肢体使用“护盾格挡”反应。真皮镀层的硬度为 30。你使用“护盾格挡”后，你的真皮镀层会受损，并且在纳米机器人修复这些坚固护板的 24 小时内无法使用。

Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 30. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Striking Crystal (Commercial).name: 强击水晶（商业） Striking Crystal (Commercial)
Striking Crystal (Commercial).description:
这颗宝石蕴含着恒星的凝聚物质，并将太阳武器或耀斑的武器伤害骰从1个提升为2个。

This gem contains the condensed matter of a star and increases the weapon damage dice of a solar weapon or flare to two instead of one.

Cognition Accelerator.name: 认知加速器 Cognition Accelerator
Cognition Accelerator.description:
一台微型超级计算机会增强你大脑处理信息的能力。你使用任意技能进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定时，获得 +3 物品加值。当你获得这项增强时，你的智力调整值提高 1，或将其提高至 +4，以较高者为准。这会像正常提升智力调整值一样，给予你额外的受训技能和语言。你必须在该增强首次内嵌时选择技能和语言，且之后不能更改。

激活—访问数据库 1 (专注)

频率 每小时一次

效果 立即尝试进行三次关于相关主题的回忆知识检定，并在得知前一次检定结果后再选择下一项主题。若你本会在这些检定中的一次失败，则改为成功。

A miniature supercomputer augments your brain's ability to process information. You gain a +3 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} with any skill. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Intelligence modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value. This gives you additional trained skills and languages, as normal for increasing your Intelligence modifier. You must select skills and languages when the augmentation is first installed, and they can't be changed.

Activate—Access Database 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect Immediately attempt three checks to Recall Knowledge about related topics, selecting each topic after learning the results of the prior checks. If you would fail one of these checks, you succeed instead.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商业） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

这种柔软却富有韧性的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的情况下提供基础防护。第二层皮肤通常穿在便服里面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Spell Gem (5th-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（5环法术） Spell Gem (5th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (5th-Rank Spell).description:
这些网格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并刻写有施放某个单一特定法术所需的魔法符文。从法术宝石中施放法术时，你需要单手持握该宝石，并以“施放法术”活动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，并且法术宝石会在施放过程中被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。该物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所标示的环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Frag Grenade (Tactical).name: 破片手榴弹（战术型） Frag Grenade (Tactical)
Frag Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域火力

重击 @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

这些破片手雷会爆炸成一团弹片云，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内造成 2d8 穿刺伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 2d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Regenerative Rune Splice.name: 再生符文接合 Regenerative Rune Splice
Regenerative Rune Splice.description:
你的基因被微观符文附魔，你可以激活它们，以从创伤性伤害中恢复。

激活—再生 2 (专注)

频率 每天一次

效果 你获得4环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.s6J1Q0e28Gb42epQ]{基因再生}法术的效果。

Your genes are enchanted with microscopic runes that you can activate to recover from traumatic injury.

Activate—Regenerate 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.s6J1Q0e28Gb42epQ]{Genetic Regeneration} spell.

Necrolung (Commercial).name: 死灵肺（商用） Necrolung (Commercial)
Necrolung (Commercial).description:
海绵状的黑色网状组织从一团灰紫色的坏死血肉中向外延展，这团血肉在暴露于空气中时会搏动。死灵肺经过专门培养，由死灵植入制造过程中产生的废料在培养槽中培育而成，能让活体生物在伊奥克斯高效且安全地呼吸，使其在额外24小时内实际上免疫其大气中的毒素。

安装死灵肺需要一分钟，且无需进行任何技能检定。内嵌后，死灵肺会顺着你的喉咙（或相应的外星人解剖结构）滑下，并整合进你的呼吸系统。在使用这项科技时，大多数使用者会注意到一种无害的苍白肤色和腐败气味。

Spongy black webbing radiates from a grayish purple mass of necrotized flesh that pulses when it's exposed to air. Specially grown in vats from waste produced in the necrograft manufacturing process, necrolungs allow living creatures to breathe efficiently and safely on Eox, becoming effectively immune to the toxins in its atmosphere for an additional 24 hours.

Installing a necrolung takes one minute and requires no skill checks. When installed, a necrolung slithers down your throat (or appropriate alien anatomy) and integrates into your respiratory system. Most users notice a harmless pallor and rotting smell while using the tech.

Jetpack (Commercial).name: 喷气背包（商用） Jetpack (Commercial)
Jetpack (Commercial).description:
安装在你护甲上的推进器让你能够飞行。

激活—飞行 1 (manipulate)

效果 你激活喷气背包以获得20英尺的飞行速度。此效果持续1分钟，或直到你将其解除。你可以使用一个动作飞行0英尺以悬浮在原地，但在这样做时，你处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态。如果你处于负重状态，喷气背包无法将你抬起。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.0kP4P73w0PykYkPY]{效果：喷气背包}

Boosters attached to your armor allow you to fly.

Activate—Fly 1 (manipulate)

Effect You activate a jetpack to gain a fly Speed of 20 feet. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until you Dismiss it. You can use an action to Fly 0 feet to hover in place, but you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} while doing so. A jetpack can't lift you if you're encumbered.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.0kP4P73w0PykYkPY]{Effect: Jetpack}

Sunshades (Tactical).name: 遮阳镜（战术型） Sunshades (Tactical)
Sunshades (Tactical).description:
墨镜会让所有人看起来更酷。佩戴战术墨镜时，你在对抗会导致 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状况的效果进行豁免时，获得 +1 物品加值。

Sunshades make everyone look cooler. You gain a +1 item bonus to saves against effects that cause the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} condition while wearing tactical sunshades.

Frost Module (Commercial).name: 霜冻模块（商业） Frost Module (Commercial)
Frost Module (Commercial).description:
该模块会从武器的打击刃口和弹药中汲取热量，并利用多余的能量为自身供能，同时使周围空气冷却。成功进行一次Strike时，它会额外造成 1d6 点寒冷伤害。若为重击，则目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，直到你的下个回合结束，除非其通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] 豁免。

This module siphons the heat from the weapon's striking edge and ammunition, powering itself with the excess energy as it chills the air around it. It deals an additional 1d6 cold damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save.

Load Lifter (Advanced).name: 装载升降机（先进型） Load Lifter (Advanced)
Load Lifter (Advanced).description:
这套支撑支架让你能够搬运和举起超出你正常容量的重量。你可以携带等于 8 加上你的力量调整值的负重而不会陷入负重状态，并且你总共可以持有和携带的负重上限为 13 加上你的力量调整值。

This series of support braces allow you to carry and lift beyond your normal capacity. You can carry an amount of Bulk equal to 8 plus your Strength modifier without becoming encumbered, and you can hold and carry a total Bulk up to 13 plus your Strength modifier.

Sniper's Scope (Superior).name: 狙击手瞄准镜（卓越型） Sniper's Scope (Superior)
Sniper's Scope (Superior).description:
一种伸缩式瞄准镜附件可帮助你观察远处的目标。

通过瞄准镜观察时，该瞄准镜使你进行视觉察觉检定以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}生物时获得+3物品加值。

激活—调整瞄具 1 (manipulate)

效果 将该瞄准镜所附着武器的射程增量提高40英尺。若该武器的基础射程增量为50英尺或以上，则改为将该武器的射程提高80英尺。该效果持续至你下个回合开始，或直到你不再持用该瞄准镜所附着的武器时结束，以先发生者为准。这不会增加区域攻击的范围。

A telescopic sighting attachment helps view distant targets.

The scope grants you a +3 item bonus to visual Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} creatures through the scope.

Activate—Adjust Sight 1 (manipulate)

Effect Increase the range increment of the weapon the scope is attached to by 40 feet. If the weapon has a base range increment of 50 feet or more, increase the range of the weapon by 80 feet instead. This lasts until the beginning of your next turn or until you're no longer wielding the weapon this scope is attached to, whichever comes first. This does not increase the size of area attacks.

Microcord Armor.name: 微索护甲 Microcord Armor
Microcord Armor.description:
升级： 1

这件轻甲由超轻纤维编织而成，会随着穿戴者的动作灵活弯曲，但在受到冲击时会变得像钢铁一样坚硬。

Upgrades: 1

This light armor is woven from ultralight fibers that flex with a wearer's movements but turn hard as steel on impact.

Baton.name: 警棍 Baton
Baton.description:
升级： 1

这根加固长棍通常由金属合金制成，设计用于打击并格挡来袭的攻击。

Upgrades: 1

This reinforced rod is commonly made from metal alloys and designed to strike and parry incoming blows.

Entropic Destabilizer (Tactical).name: 熵蚀破坏器（战术型） Entropic Destabilizer (Tactical)
Entropic Destabilizer (Tactical).description:
一股股黑暗能量从附着在这把武器上的装置中迸射而出，覆盖在武器及其弹药上，使其染上一层令人不安的紫色光晕。你用该武器命中时，使造成的伤害额外增加 1d4 虚空伤害。此外，若为重击，目标受到 4d4 持续性虚空伤害；如果目标正举着护盾，则该护盾受到等量的持续性伤害（由其持用者进行平检以确定持续性伤害是否结束；如果护盾已不在任何人持有之中，则由 GM 掷骰）。与普通的虚空伤害不同，熵蚀失稳器造成的虚空伤害会通过侵蚀物体、构装体等来对其造成伤害。

这把武器造成的虚空伤害无视目标的虚空抗性或免疫。

Tendrils of dark energy soar from the unit affixed to this weapon, coating it and its ammunition in a disturbing purple hue. When you hit with the weapon, add 1d4 void damage to the damage dealt. In addition, on a critical hit, the target takes 4d4 persistent void damage; if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes the same amount of persistent damage (its wielder rolls the flat check to see if the persistent damage ends, or the GM rolls if the shield is no longer in someone's possession). Unlike normal void damage, the void damage from an entropic destabilizer damages objects, constructs, and the like by eroding them away.

The void damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's void resistance or immunity.

Akashic Lens (Tactical).name: 阿卡夏透镜（战术型） Akashic Lens (Tactical)
Akashic Lens (Tactical).description:
作为隐形眼镜、眼镜或其他护目镜佩戴时，这些经过魔法处理的镜片会投射出一种特殊的数据界面，利用虚拟智能和快速眼动追踪，迅速循环显示信息，直到你找到所寻之物。它使你在使用“数据库扫描”时，以所选技能进行的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定获得 +1 物品加值。

激活—数据库扫描 2 (专注)

频率 每10分钟一次

效果 该镜片施放一个4环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{阿卡西下载}，并以该镜片替代通讯装置。

Worn as a contact lens, spectacles, or other eyewear, these magically treated lenses project a special data display that uses virtual intelligence and rapid eye tracking to quickly cycle through information until you find what you seek. It grants you a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks with the skill chosen when you use Database Scan.

Activate—Database Scan 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The lens casts a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{Akashic Download} that uses the lens instead of a comm unit.
