Telepathy Node.name: 心灵感应节点 Telepathy Node
Telepathy Node.description:
一件由经过处理的合金与水晶制成、刻有符文且只有卵石大小的装置被植入你大脑的通讯中枢。你获得30英尺范围的有限心灵感应。

A rune-carved device of treated alloys and crystal the size of a pebble is implanted into your brain's communication center. You gain limited telepathy to a range of 30 feet.

Jetpack (Tactical).name: 喷气背包（战术型） Jetpack (Tactical)
Jetpack (Tactical).description:
安装在你护甲上的推进器让你能够飞行。

激活—飞行 1 (manipulate)

效果 你激活喷气背包，获得 40 尺的飞行速度。此效果持续 1 分钟，或直到你将其解除。你可以使用一个动作以飞行 0 尺来悬浮在原地，但在这样做时你处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。如果你处于超载状态，喷气背包无法将你抬起。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.0kP4P73w0PykYkPY]{效果：喷气背包}

Boosters attached to your armor allow you to fly.

Activate—Fly 1 (manipulate)

Effect You activate a jetpack to gain a fly Speed of 40 feet. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until you Dismiss it. You can use an action to Fly 0 feet to hover in place, but you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} while doing so. A jetpack can't lift you if you're encumbered.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.0kP4P73w0PykYkPY]{Effect: Jetpack}

Aegis Series.name: 神盾系列 Aegis Series
Aegis Series.description:
升级： 0

神盾装甲服是注入了星铁的外壳，能够将穿戴者完全包覆其中，包括一个无护目镜的附连头盔，该头盔通常会被雕塑成定制风格。内置于装甲服中的传感器会将感官信息传递给穿戴者，而动力肢体则有助于执行机动动作。在神盾装甲服中移动虽显笨拙，却力量十足。

Upgrades: 0

Aegis armor suits are starmetal-infused shells that encase the wearer entirely, including an attached visorless helmet that's often sculpted into a custom style. Sensors built into the suit feed sensory information to the wearer, and powered limbs aid maneuvers. Movement in an aegis suit is clumsy, but powerful.

Null Space Chamber (Commercial).name: 零空间舱室（商用） Null Space Chamber (Commercial)
Null Space Chamber (Commercial).description:
这台光滑的黑色装置可固定在背包、手提包或钥匙环上。当你按下装置侧面的按钮时，它会创造一个通往异次元袋状空间的圆形传送门。该空间的容量取决于装置的类型。

你可以对虚空空间舱使用交互，将物品存放其中或将其取出。虚空空间舱只能从外部开启和关闭。当虚空空间舱在有空气的大气环境中被打开时，其剩余容量中每留有 1 Bulk，舱内就会充满可供呼吸 10 分钟的空气。虚空空间舱内的物品不会提供任何益处，除非先将其取出。将虚空空间舱连接到计算机后，它会显示其中所存放全部物品的读数。

容量 25 Bulk

This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 25 Bulk

Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).name: 燃烧手榴弹（商用） Incendiary Grenade (Commercial)
Incendiary Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 5英尺

这些手雷利用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生强烈高热，并造成1d8点火焰伤害，目标可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:5]）。如果你能使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷处击退。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 1d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:5]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Lock (Elite).name: 锁（菁英型） Lock (Elite)
Lock (Elite).description:
撬开一把菁英锁需要六次成功的 [[/act pick-a-lock dc=40]]{DC 40 盗窃} 检定。

Picking an elite lock requires six successful [[/act pick-a-lock dc=40]]{DC 40 Thievery} checks.

Skyfire Armor.name: 天火护甲 Skyfire Armor
Skyfire Armor.description:
升级位： 0

这些装饰性的中型护甲配有夸张的肩甲、风格化的龙翼，以及遍布胸甲背部与前胸的龙类纹章。天火护甲通常镀有黄金或其他华丽金属，以牺牲升级空间为代价来换取外观风格。

Upgrades: 0

These decorative suits of medium armor feature exaggerated shoulder guards, stylized dragon wings, and draconic emblems across the breastplate's back and chest. Skyfire armor is often plated with gold or other attractive metals, sacrificing upgrade space for style.

Machine Gun.name: 机枪 Machine Gun
Machine Gun.description:
升级： 1

这些久经考验且可靠的自动武器能够进行短点射，或将弹匣彻底打空以扫清战场。

Upgrades: 1

These proven and reliable automatic weapons are capable of firing in short bursts or completely emptying their magazines to clear a battlefield.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial Picks).name: 渗透者工具包（商用开锁器） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial Picks)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial Picks).description:
这些是 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.coJUVZGcuVg3FoYh]{渗透者工具包（商用）} 的替代选项。

These are replacement picks for @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.coJUVZGcuVg3FoYh]{Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)}.

Energy Shielding (Advanced).name: 能量护盾（先进型） Energy Shielding (Advanced)
Energy Shielding (Advanced).description:
这件护甲经过特殊的绝缘处理，可防护特定类型的伤害。你获得对酸蚀、寒冷、电击或火焰的 15 点抗性。制作者在制作该升级时选择伤害类型。一套护甲中可以安装多个能量护盾升级，但每个都必须提供对不同伤害类型的抗性。

This armor is specially treated with insulation to protect against a specific type of damage. You gain resistance 15 to acid, cold, electricity, or fire. The crafter chooses the damage type when creating the upgrade. Multiple energy shielding upgrades can be placed into a suit of armor, but each must provide resistance to a different damage type.

Mobility Enhancer (Commercial).name: 机动增强器（商业） Mobility Enhancer (Commercial)
Mobility Enhancer (Commercial).description:
自动化支架帮助你在笨重护甲中移动得更快。将你的护甲对速度的减值减少 5 英尺。

Automated braces help you to move faster in bulky armor. Reduce your armor's penalty to Speeds by 5 feet.

Data Chip.name: 数据芯片 Data Chip
Data Chip.description:
数据芯片包含足以存储宗教文本、相册、个人日记或类似内容的内存。你可以用计算机查看数据芯片上的信息，例如你通讯器中的那台。

A data chip contains enough memory for a religious text, photo album, personal journal, or the like. You can view the information on a data chip with a computer, such as the one in your comm unit.

Basic Environmental Protection.name: 基础环境防护 Basic Environmental Protection
Basic Environmental Protection.description:
此升级可保护使用者免受太空以及稠密和稀薄大气环境效果的影响。只要该升级处于内嵌状态，这件护甲便失去暴露（特征）。

This upgrade protects the user against the effects of space as well as thick and thin atmospheres. This armor loses the exposed trait for as long as the upgrade is installed.

Cycling Crystal.name: 循环水晶 Cycling Crystal
Cycling Crystal.description:
循环水晶让你能更好地控制流经你星辰显现的能量循环。

激活——停止循环 f （专注）

频率 每10分钟一次

触发条件 你以带有循环特征的动作的一部分，使用你的星辰武器或星辰耀斑造成重击

效果 你可以选择是否改变你的调谐状态，或保持当前的调谐状态。

A cycling crystal gives you greater control over the cycle of energies flowing through your solar manifestations.

Activate—Halt Cycle f (concentrate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You critically hit with your solar weapon or solar flare as part of an action with the cycle trait

Effect You can choose whether to change your attunement state or remain in your current attunement state.

Estex Suit.name: 埃斯特克斯战甲 Estex Suit
Estex Suit.description:
升级： 1

这套厚重的飞行服在战术织物层之间缝入了薄薄的聚碳板作为加固。

Upgrades: 1

This bulky flight suit is reinforced with thin polycarbon panels sewn between layers of tactical fabric.

Silencer (Tactical).name: 消音器（战术型） Silencer (Tactical)
Silencer (Tactical).description:
圆筒内部装有声音挡板以降低噪音。该武器在开火时不会发出很大的声响。不过，被弹药击中的生物仍然可能因疼痛而喊叫出声。

战术消音器是一件同时具有魔法和科技（特征）的混合物品。由战术消音器射出的子弹会以魔法方式抑制周围的声音。若一次Strike获得重击成功，目标会变得无法发出声音。目标不能使用音波攻击，也不能使用带有听觉（特征）的动作。这同样会阻止目标施放法术，因为施法涉及咒语吟诵或其他声音，但微妙法术除外。目标可以通过成功的 @Check[will|dc:27] 豁免来抵抗消音器的效果。

A cylinder is filled with internal sound baffles to reduce noise. The weapon doesn't make a loud noise when fired. However, creatures hit by the ammunition might still cry out in pain.

A tactical silencer is a hybrid item with the magical and tech traits. Shots fired from a tactical silencer magically dampen sounds around them. On a critically successful Strike, the target becomes unable to make sound. The target can't use sonic attacks, nor can it use actions with the auditory trait. This also prevents the target from casting spells due to the incantations or sounds involved in casting, with the exception of subtle spells. The target can resist the effects of the silencer with a successful @Check[will|dc:27] save.

Cryopike.name: 低温长戟 Cryopike
Cryopike.description:
升级： 1

这把长柄武器的柄杆内储存着快速循环的超冷气体，这些气体会冷凝并将吸热能量导入低温刀刃之中。

Upgrades: 1

This polearm's shaft houses rapidly circulating supercooled gas that condenses and channels endothermic energy into a cryogenic blade.

Autorecognition Lens.name: 自动识别晶状体 Autorecognition Lens
Autorecognition Lens.description:
一个通过显微线路接入你大脑的人造眼晶状体，会在你与他人会面或互动时，自动追踪一个关联姓名与面容的数据库。你在得知某人的姓名和外貌后，只要你正在看着他们、知晓其存在，且其外貌没有发生巨大变化（由GM酌情裁定），一个微型HUD就会向你显示他们的名字。这无法帮助你看见或识别那些试图隐藏自己外貌或进行伪装的人。此增强改造不计入你的植入体上限。

An artificial eye lens microscopically wired into your brain automatically tracks a database of associated names and faces as you meet or interact with individuals. After you've learned someone's name and appearance, a tiny HUD displays their name to you whenever you're looking at them as long as you're aware of their presence and their appearance hasn't dramatically changed (at the GM's discretion). This doesn't help you see or identify people who are trying to hide or disguise their appearance. This augmentation doesn't count toward your implant limit.

Active Camouflage (Advanced).name: 主动伪装（先进型） Active Camouflage (Advanced)
Active Camouflage (Advanced).description:
硬光投影仪会通过不断变化的色彩与图案来改变你护甲的外观，以响应你的环境。穿着该护甲时，你的隐匿检定获得+3物品加值。

Hardlight projectors shift the appearance of your armor using shifting colors and patterns that respond to your environment. You gain a +3 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing the armor.

Fly Spell Amp.name: 飞行法术增幅 Fly Spell Amp
Fly Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可直接使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1（操作）

效果 第4环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]{Fly} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.A2JfEKe6BZcTG1S8]{Fly} spell

Jump Spell Amp.name: 跳跃法术增幅 Jump Spell Amp
Jump Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的增益。

激活——注射 1 (manipulate)

效果 第1环阶 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Q7QQ91vQtyi1Ux36]{Jump} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Q7QQ91vQtyi1Ux36]{Jump} spell

Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical).name: 下挂式榴弹发射器（战术型） Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical)
Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical).description:
这种支架式榴弹发射器最常宣传用于发射破片手雷，但也能高效投送实用型弹药，例如烟雾弹和闪光弹。与专用榴弹发射器不同，为下挂式榴弹发射器装填需要 10 分钟：你需要将手雷安装到一种专用的可重复使用击发底盖上，把它重新组装成弹药。一旦手雷已装填，就只能通过拆解整枚手雷才能安全取出，而这会在过程中将其摧毁。

这种榴弹发射器的射程为 30 英尺，并具有 tracking +1 特性。

激活——发射 1 （攻击）

效果 你发射已装填的手雷。

This bracket-mounted grenade launcher is most often advertised for use with fragmentation grenades, but can efficiently deploy utility ordinances, such as smoke grenades and flashbangs. Unlike a dedicated grenade launcher, it takes 10 minutes to load an undermounted grenade launcher, reassembling the grenade into ammunition by mounting it on a specialized reusable firing cap. Once a grenade has been loaded, it can only be safely removed by disassembling the entire grenade, destroying it in the process.

This grenade launcher has a range of 30 feet and the tracking +1 trait.

Activate—Launch 1 (attack)

Effect You launch the loaded grenade.

Grenade Launcher (Tactical).name: 榴弹发射器（战术型） Grenade Launcher (Tactical)
Grenade Launcher (Tactical).description:
升级 1

激活 2 区域射击

这种自动后膛装填发射器的旋转弹巢可容纳最多六枚带有智能装填技术的任意类型手雷，使其持用者每次开火时都能选择不同的手雷。榴弹发射器是一种军用远程武器，装填值为2，射程为350英尺。

Upgrades 1

Activate 2 Area Fire

The rotating barrel of this automatic breechloading launcher holds up to six grenades of any variety with smart loading technology, allowing its wielder to choose a different grenade each time they fire. A grenade launcher is a martial ranged weapon, has a reload of 2, and a range 350 feet.

Photon Crystal (Commercial).name: 光子水晶（商业级） Photon Crystal (Commercial)
Photon Crystal (Commercial).description:
光子水晶会增强流入你星辰显现中的光子，使其焚烧并致盲你的敌人。处于光子调谐时，你的星辰武器或星辰耀斑会额外造成 @Damage[1d6[fire]] 伤害。处于光子调谐时，若你造成重击，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:23] 豁免，否则将被 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1 轮。

A photon crystal increases the flow of photon into your solar manifestations, burning and blinding your foes. While photon attuned, your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage. On a critical hit while you're photon attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round.

Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial).name: 焕彩法术强化（商业） Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial)
Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial).description:
在大多数世界中，这种物品通常被称为“法术安瓿”，是一种可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能够赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (操作)

效果 1环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{容光焕发} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up} spell

Shrouding Sphere.name: 遮蔽球体 Shrouding Sphere
Shrouding Sphere.description:
这个玻璃球内充满了旋涡状的紫色气体，并散发出淡淡的花香。

激活—抖出来 1 (manipulate)

频率 每天一次

效果 你摇动球体，使其中的气体穿过玻璃渗出并缠绕在你周围，遮蔽你的动作。你在3轮内对远程攻击处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。此外，在持续时间内，你进行 [[/act hide]] 的隐匿检定获得+1环境加值。强风可以驱散这种气体，使效果提前结束。

激活—扔出去 1 (manipulate)

效果 你将球体掷出，使60尺内一名生物获得“抖出来”的增益，持续1分钟。这会导致该球体粉碎，并获得消耗品特征。

This glass sphere is filled with a swirling purple gas and exudes a faint floral fragrance.

Activate—Shake it Out 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You shake the sphere, causing the gas inside to seep through the glass and coil around you, obscuring your motions. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} against ranged attacks for 3 rounds. In addition, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to [[/act hide]] for the duration. This gas can be dispersed by strong wind, ending the effects early.

Activate—Yeet it Out 1 (manipulate)

Effect You throw the sphere, granting one creature within 60 feet the benefits of Shake it Out for 1 minute. This causes the orb to shatter, gaining the consumable trait.

Medpatch (Tactical).name: 医疗贴（战术） Medpatch (Tactical)
Medpatch (Tactical).description:
激活 1 (操作)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Speed Suspension (Commercial).name: 悬浮速度（商业） Speed Suspension (Commercial)
Speed Suspension (Commercial).description:
高性能电控机械替换了你双腿中的关节和肌腱。你的地面速度获得 +5 英尺物品加值。

High-performance cybernetics replace the joints and tendons in your legs. You gain a +5-foot item bonus to your land Speed.

Smoke Grenade (Advanced).name: 烟雾手雷（先进型） Smoke Grenade (Advanced)
Smoke Grenade (Advanced).description:
激活 1 区域射击

这枚手雷在一个 @Template[burst|distance:15] 内释放出一团提供遮蔽的烟雾。区域内的生物具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，且对它们而言，所有其他生物也都是隐蔽的。烟雾持续 1 分钟，或直到被强风或类似效果驱散为止。

Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:15]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Stellar Cannon.name: 恒星巨炮 Stellar Cannon
Stellar Cannon.description:
升级： 1

这门便携式加农炮的弹药装填了经过精心布置、内含箭弹的小型导弹，爆炸时会将离爆心过近的任何人撕碎。

Upgrades: 1

The rounds of this portable cannon are loaded with carefully positioned mini-missiles packed with flechettes that shred anyone too close to the blast.

Machine Mind Serum (Advanced).name: 机械心智血清（先进型） Machine Mind Serum (Advanced)
Machine Mind Serum (Advanced).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

当你注入这份血清时，魔法科技纳米机器人会将如机械般的回路注入你的身体，在你的皮肤下脉动并发光。持续1小时，你对抗精神效果的豁免检定获得+3物品加值。你还获得精神伤害抗性15。由于你更接近机械的本质，你获得电击弱点15。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

When you inject this serum, magitech nanites infuse your body with machine-like circuitry that pulses and glows beneath your skin. For 1 hour, you gain a +3 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects. You also gain resistance 15 to mental damage. Due to your more machine-like nature, you gain weakness 15 to electricity.

Datapad.name: 数据板 Datapad
Datapad.description:
这些无处不在的手持式计算机集成了通讯装置、麦克风、扬声器、摄像头、信息圈浏览器和数据存储功能。它们可以存储数千小时的录音、玩游戏，并执行简单的计算功能，例如时间追踪与通知、文字处理、计算、数据处理、流媒体播放，以及播送来自地方政府的紧急警报。在大多数社会中，商业数据板通常相对脆弱，设计上很快就会磨损，或在最新功能与更新方面落后，以鼓励消费者将其更换为更新的型号。相比之下，高端数据板则被设计得更加耐用，且通常配有更坚固的机身和额外功能。

These ubiquitous handheld computers incorporate a comm unit, microphone, speaker, camera, infosphere browser, and data storage. They can store thousands of hours of recordings, play games, and perform simple computing functions, such as time tracking and notifications, word processing, calculations, data processing, streaming media, and broadcasting emergency alerts from local governments. In most societies, commercial datapads are relatively flimsy, designed to rapidly wear out or fall behind on the latest features and updates to encourage the consumer to replace it with a newer model. In contrast, higher-end datapads are made to last and often include a sturdier chassis and extra functions.

Defrex Hide.name: 德弗雷克斯兽皮 Defrex Hide
Defrex Hide.description:
升级： 1

这种中型护甲由维斯克二号原生的一种凶猛哺乳动物的兽皮制成，尤其受维斯克蜥人的欢迎。将这种生物厚实的皮革鞣制成大片后，再用金属丝缝合在一起，关节处则以金属铆钉或鳞片加固。

Upgrades: 1

Made from the hide of a ferocious mammal native to Vesk-2, this medium armor is especially popular among vesk. Tanned slabs of the creature's thick hide are stitched together with metal wires, and the joints are reinforced with metal studs or scales.

Photosynthetic Skin.name: 光合作用皮肤 Photosynthetic Skin
Photosynthetic Skin.description:
专门化的纳米机器人强化了你天然的表层细胞，使其能够将太阳辐射转化为身体所需的养分。你不需要进食，并且只要你每天至少花费 1 小时沐浴在直射阳光下，你就不会因饥饿或饥荒而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态。你可以将晒太阳作为正常 8 小时休息的一部分。

Specialized nanites enhance your natural surface cells, allowing them to convert solar radiation into nourishment for your body. You don't need to eat, and you're never @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} as a result of hunger or starvation as long as you spend at least 1 hour per day basking in direct sunlight. You can bask as part of a normal 8-hour rest period.

Entropic Destabilizer (Commercial).name: 熵扰动器（商用） Entropic Destabilizer (Commercial)
Entropic Destabilizer (Commercial).description:
从附着在这件武器上的装置中迸射出一缕缕黑暗能量，包覆住武器及其弹药，使其染上一层令人不安的紫色光泽。当你用该武器命中时，对造成的伤害额外加上1d4虚空伤害。此外，在重击时，目标受到2d4持续性虚空伤害；如果目标正举起护盾，则该护盾受到等量的持续性伤害（由其持用者进行平检以确认持续性伤害是否结束；如果护盾已不在任何人持有中，则由GM掷骰）。不同于通常的虚空伤害，熵蚀扰乱器造成的虚空伤害会通过侵蚀的方式对物体、构装体及类似存在造成伤害。

Tendrils of dark energy soar from the unit affixed to this weapon, coating it and its ammunition in a disturbing purple hue. When you hit with the weapon, add 1d4 void damage to the damage dealt. In addition, on a critical hit, the target takes 2d4 persistent void damage; if the target has a shield raised, the shield takes the same amount of persistent damage (its wielder rolls the flat check to see if the persistent damage ends, or the GM rolls if the shield is no longer in someone's possession). Unlike normal void damage, the void damage from an entropic destabilizer damages objects, constructs, and the like by eroding them away.

Vesk Scales.name: 维斯克蜥人的鳞片 Vesk Scales
Vesk Scales.description:
你的祖先是维斯克蜥人中最坚韧的个体，曾长途跋涉、四处游历，并在充满敌意的环境中生存下来。你的鳞片视为板甲组中的中甲。它们给予你 AC +3 的物品加值，敏捷上限为 +1，检定减值为 –2，力量阈值为 +3，并具有舒适和暴露特征。此物品加值在 5 级时提升为 +4。你可以穿飞行服，但不能穿其他护甲。你可以将护甲符文蚀刻到你的鳞片上，但不能安装护甲升级。

Your ancestors were the hardiest specimens of vesk, having traveled far and wide while enduring hostile environments. Your scales count as medium armor in the plate armor group. They grant a +3 item bonus to AC, have a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, and a Strength threshold of +3, and have the comfort and exposed traits. This item bonus increases to +4 at 5th level. You can wear a flight suit, but you can't wear other armor. You can etch armor runes onto your scales, but you can't install armor upgrades.

Feline Senses Spell Amp.name: 猫科感官法术增幅 Feline Senses Spell Amp
Feline Senses Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1（操作）

类型 猫科感官法术安瓿；等级 7；价格 530 信用点

效果 3环阶 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1lv6Zmp2eWRIPn1n]{Feline Senses} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Type feline senses spell amp; Level 7; Price 530 credits

Effect 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1lv6Zmp2eWRIPn1n]{Feline Senses} spell

Projectile Ammo.name: 投射武器弹药 Projectile Ammo

Aeon Stone (Projecting).name: 永世石（投射） Aeon Stone (Projecting)
Aeon Stone (Projecting).description:
这些宝石是阿兹兰特星际帝国内的常见物品，也是冒险者与富有收藏家喜爱的身份象征。尽管这些石头有着千差万别的形态与功能，但据说它们全都是远界实体在远古时代用来构筑物质宇宙的水晶工具碎片。

当你注入这些经过精密切割的水晶之一时，这颗石头会绕着你的头部运行（如果你没有头部，则绕着你身体上另一个可见部位运行），而不是佩戴在身上。你可以用一个交互动作收起一颗万古石，而一颗正在环绕的石头也可以被人以对你成功的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}动作从空中夺走。被收起或移除的石头仍然保持已注入状态，但其效果会处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态，直到你让它再次回到头部周围运行。

万古石有多种不同类型，各自拥有不同的外观与魔法效果。每颗万古石在嵌入特定物品时还会获得一种共鸣力量，例如带有万古特征的武器，或称为寻路仪的古老魔法装置。

这枚乳光蓝宝石圆锥赋予你一种有限形式的投射共情，范围为100英尺；无论语言是否相通，生物都能大致理解其内容，其中包含情绪的种类与强度，例如“轻微愤怒”“强烈喜悦”或“深切悲伤”。当你对30英尺内的一个生物察觉动机时，你会探测到该生物是否存在思绪，如同你施放了@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qOLMHvkAGsVYLhtn]{侦测思想}的1动作版本。其共鸣力量使你每天可以将@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uBo6g5aW087cLSJR]{心灵穿刺}作为一个1环异能内在法术施放一次。

Staple items within the Azlanti Star Empire, these gemstones are popular status symbols for adventurers and wealthy collectors. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to build the Universe in ancient times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head (or another visible part of your anatomy if you don't have a head) instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into specific items, such as weapons with the aeon trait or antique magical devices called wayfinders.

This opalescent sapphire cone grants you a limited form of projected empathy with a range of 100 feet that can be roughly understood by creatures regardless of language and includes a type and intensity of emotion, such as "mild anger," "intense joy," or "deep sadness." When you Sense the Motive of a creature within 30 feet, you detect the presence or absence of thoughts from the creature as though you cast the 1-action version of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qOLMHvkAGsVYLhtn]{Detect Thoughts}. The resonant power allows you to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uBo6g5aW087cLSJR]{Mind Skewer} as a 1st-rank occult innate spell once per day.

Presence Intensifier.name: 存在增强器 Presence Intensifier
Presence Intensifier.description:
这种增强会强化你的个性，强化构成你身份核心的那些部分。你在外交和威吓检定上获得+2物品加值。当你获得这种增强时，你的魅力调整值提高1，或将其提高至+4，以能让你获得更高数值者为准。

激活—不可抗拒的念头 2 (专注)

频率 每小时一次

效果 你操纵自己的妆容，以如同4环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qwlh6aDgi86U3Q7H]{暗示术}（DC 38）般影响一个生物。

This augmentation strengthens your personality, intensifying the parts of you that form the core of your identity. You gain a +2 item bonus to Diplomacy and Intimidation checks. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Charisma modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Irresistible Idea 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You manipulate your cosmetics to influence a creature as a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qwlh6aDgi86U3Q7H]{Suggestion} (DC 38).

+1 Weapon Potency Crystal.name: +1 武器效能水晶 +1 Weapon Potency Crystal
+1 Weapon Potency Crystal.description:
这件物品将复制恒星行为所需的专注结晶化。使用太阳武器或耀斑进行的攻击检定获得+1物品加值，且该武器或耀斑可以从一枚轨道水晶中受益。

This item crystallizes the focus needed to replicate the actions of a star. Attack rolls with the solar weapon or flare gain a +1 item bonus, and the weapon or flare can benefit from one orbital crystal.

Celebrity Serum.name: 名人血清 Celebrity Serum
Celebrity Serum.description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

这种粉红色的起泡调制饮品带有轻微的醉人效果，并使你的表演检定获得+1物品加值，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.dCDZQr7EBfCALmT2]{效果：名流血清}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This fizzy pink concoction is mildly intoxicating and grants a +1 item bonus to Performance checks for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.dCDZQr7EBfCALmT2]{Effect: Celebrity Serum}

Spell Gem (7th-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（7环法术） Spell Gem (7th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (7th-Rank Spell).description:
这些网格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并编码有施放某个单一且特定法术所需的魔法符文。从法术宝石中施放法术需要你单手持握该宝石，并以“施放法术”活动激活它，所用动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，并且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Crystallized Shockshard (Tactical).name: 晶化震击碎片（战术型） Crystallized Shockshard (Tactical)
Crystallized Shockshard (Tactical).description:
激活 f (concentrate)

触发条件 你用该武器对一个生物造成伤害。

这枚电蓝色水晶噼啪作响，涌动着能量。当你激活震击碎晶时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:17] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续 1 分钟。若目标具有科技特征，则它改为陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}。

Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Maneuvering Unit (Commercial).name: 机动单元（商用） Maneuvering Unit (Commercial)
Maneuvering Unit (Commercial).description:
内部稳定器和推进喷口会同步你的零重力移动。处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{未束缚的} 状态时，你不会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，也不会变得笨拙。

激活—推进 1 (move)

要求 你处于零重力环境中

效果 你朝所选的任意方向移动 5 尺。你开始向该方向漂浮。

Internal stabilizers and jets synchronize your movements in zero gravity. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered}.

Activate—Thrust 1 (move)

Requirements You're in a zero-g environment

Effect You move 5 feet in any direction you choose. You begin to float in that direction.

Petrified Bark.name: 石化树皮 Petrified Bark
Petrified Bark.description:
注意 仅限石化传承

你的身体覆盖着厚重、成板状的树皮。你的树皮属于板甲组的中甲，给予 AC +4 物品加值，敏捷上限为 +1，检定减值为 –2，速度减值为 –5 尺，力量值为 16，并具有巨垒、舒适和暴露特征。你永远不能穿戴其他护甲，也不能移除这层树皮。你可以将护甲符文蚀刻在树皮上。

Note Petrified heritage only

Your body is covered in thick, plated bark. Your bark is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, has a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a Speed penalty of –5 feet, a Strength value of 16, and has the bulwark, comfort, and exposed traits. You can never wear other armor or remove the bark. You can etch armor runes onto the bark.

Zero Knife.name: 零刀 Zero Knife
Zero Knife.description:
升级： 1

如同一把弹簧刀般展开，这把武器内部的超冷腔室会瞬间形成一片冰刃。

Upgrades: 1

Unfolding like a switchblade, a supercooled chamber within this weapon instantly forms a blade of ice.

Holoskin (Commercial).name: 全息皮肤（商用） Holoskin (Commercial)
Holoskin (Commercial).description:
安装在腰带或肢体绑带上的全息投影器可以用一个交互动作来启动。它可以被编程为投射出与你体型类别相同的另一种生物的外貌，从而隐藏你的真实外表。全息伪装皮不会改变你的声音、气味或举止。手持和穿戴物品的外观不会受到影响。你通常需要一件全息伪装皮来设置伪装，才能使用欺瞒技能去@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}某人。

A holographic projector mounted to a belt or limb strap can be activated as an Interact action. It can be programmed to project the appearance of another creature of the same size category as yourself, hiding your true appearance. A holoskin doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. The appearance of held and worn items aren't affected. You usually need a holoskin to set up a disguise in order to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} someone using the Deception skill.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Tailblade.name: 尾刃 Tailblade
Tailblade.description:
升级： 1

可调节的绑带将这把轻型刀刃固定在尾巴、触手或类似的附肢上。

Upgrades: 1

Adjustable bands secure this lightweight blade to a tail, tentacle, or similar appendage.

Climbing Kit (Commercial).name: 攀爬工具包（商业） Climbing Kit (Commercial)
Climbing Kit (Commercial).description:
一套商业攀爬工具包包含50英尺的缆绳、抓钩、安全带、滑轮、岩钉、一把锤子和冰爪。攀爬工具包让你在进行攀爬时把自己固定在你正在攀爬的墙面上，使你的移动速度变为通常的一半（最少5英尺），但让你在重度失败时可以尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 以防止坠落。

单个工具包的材料只够一名攀爬者使用；每位攀爬者都需要自己的工具包。

A commercial climbing kit includes 50 feet of cable line, a grappling hook, harnesses, pulleys, pitons, a hammer, and crampons. Climbing kits allow you to attach yourself to the wall you're Climbing, moving half as quickly as usual (minimum 5 feet) but letting you attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5] whenever you critically fail to prevent a fall.

A single kit has only enough materials for one climber; each climber needs their own kit.

Medpatch (Elite).name: 医疗贴片（菁英） Medpatch (Elite)
Medpatch (Elite).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(8d6+21)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内获得对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定 +3物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(8d6+21)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +3 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Necrolung (Superior).name: 死灵肺（卓越型） Necrolung (Superior)
Necrolung (Superior).description:
海绵状的黑色网状组织从一团灰紫色的坏死血肉中向外蔓延，这团血肉暴露在空气中时会搏动。死灵肺由死灵植入制造过程中产生的废料在培养槽中专门培育而成，能让活体生物在伊奥克斯高效且安全地呼吸，使其在每等级额外24小时内实际上免疫其大气中的毒素，并且你在对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定中获得+3物品加值。

安装死灵肺需要一分钟，且无需进行任何技能检定。内嵌后，死灵肺会滑入你的喉咙（或相应的异星解剖结构），并整合进你的呼吸系统。大多数使用者在使用这项科技时会注意到一种无害的苍白肤色与腐烂气味。

Spongy black webbing radiates from a grayish purple mass of necrotized flesh that pulses when it's exposed to air. Specially grown in vats from waste produced in the necrograft manufacturing process, necrolungs allow living creatures to breathe efficiently and safely on Eox, becoming effectively immune to the toxins in its atmosphere for an additional 24 hours per level, and you gain a +3 item bonus to saves against diseases and poisons.

Installing a necrolung takes one minute and requires no skill checks. When installed, a necrolung slithers down your throat (or appropriate alien anatomy) and integrates into your respiratory system. Most users notice a harmless pallor and rotting smell while using the tech.

Gluon Crystal (Advanced).name: 胶子晶体（先进型） Gluon Crystal (Advanced)
Gluon Crystal (Advanced).description:
胶子晶体驾驭熵以造成严重且持久的创伤。你的太阳武器或太阳耀斑额外造成 @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。若重击，目标将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，直到其从持续性流血伤害中恢复。

A gluon crystal harnesses entropy to cause serious lasting wounds. Your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d8[persistent,bleed]] damage. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until it recovers from the persistent bleed damage.

Frag Grenade (Elite).name: 破片手榴弹（菁英型） Frag Grenade (Elite)
Frag Grenade (Elite).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @Damage[1d6[bleed]]

这些破片手雷会爆炸成一团弹片云，并在一个 @Template[burst|distance:15] 内造成 10d8 穿刺伤害，且可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d6[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 10d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Antigrav Harness (Commercial).name: 反重力背带（商用） Antigrav Harness (Commercial)
Antigrav Harness (Commercial).description:
这张由合成织带构成、错综复杂的束带网在某些亚文化中被作为时尚宣言穿戴，但在极端环境中也有实用用途。你获得 Acrobatics 检定的 +1 物品加值，且当你在零重力中未束缚时，不会处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态，也不会变得笨拙。

激活—重力改变 1 (manipulate)

效果 你将重力视为提高或降低一级（例如，零重力变为低重力，低重力变为标准重力，标准重力变为高重力，而高重力变为极端重力，反之亦然）。这只影响你、你的装备以及你的移动，并持续到你下一回合结束。

This convoluted web of synthweave straps is worn as a fashion statement in some subcultures but has a useful application in extreme environments. You gain a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks, and you aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while untethered in zero-g.

Activate—Gravity Alteration 1 (manipulate)

Effect You treat gravity as being one step higher or lower (for example, zero-g becomes low gravity, low gravity becomes standard, standard gravity becomes high gravity, and high gravity becomes extreme gravity, or vice versa). This only affects you, your gear, and your movement and lasts until the end of your next turn.

Reality Ripper.name: 现实撕裂者 Reality Ripper
Reality Ripper.description:
这把流线型步枪会将能量转化为高度集中的魔法弹体，通过摧毁物质与现实之间的联系来将其撕裂。现实撕裂者是模块化武器，具有两种模式：毁灭模式和收割模式。处于毁灭模式时，现实撕裂者造成强酸伤害，并获得拆毁（特征）。处于收割模式时，现实撕裂者造成虚空伤害，并获得震荡（特征）。

现实撕裂者的最低武器改进为战术（型），这意味着其追踪 +1 无法被移除，不过仍然可以继续施加其他改进。

This sleek rifle converts energy into projectiles of concentrated magic that tears apart matter by destroying its bindings to the reality. A reality ripper is modular and has two modes: destructive and reaping. While in destructive mode, the reality ripper deals acid damage and gains the razing trait. While in reaping mode, a reality ripper deals void damage and gains the concussive trait.

A realty ripper's minimum weapon improvement is tactical, meaning its tracking +1 cannot be removed, though further improvements can be still applied.

Flash Grenade (Paragon).name: 闪光手雷（完美型） Flash Grenade (Paragon)
Flash Grenade (Paragon).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 目眩 2 轮

闪光手雷会释放一阵强光爆炸，要求 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内的生物进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免检定。若失败，该生物会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical dazzled for 2 rounds

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:5] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Hypopen (Tactical).name: 低氧笔（战术型） Hypopen (Tactical)
Hypopen (Tactical).description:
这个微型圆筒内含专用纳米机器人，可以执行以下任一效果：

  • 移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 状况
  • 使 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心} 状况的值减少 1。

This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.

Chem Tank (Superior).name: 化学储罐（卓越型） Chem Tank (Superior)

Shirren-eye Rifle.name: 希灵眼步枪 Shirren-eye Rifle
Shirren-eye Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这把狙击步枪配有一个复合式科技瞄准镜，使狙击手能够通过自然的眼球运动来调整焦距和倍率，而不必使用可能干扰其瞄准的活动部件。

Upgrades: 1

This sniper rifle comes with a compound technological scope that allows snipers to adjust focus and magnification with natural eye movements instead of using moving parts that might disrupt their aim.

Frag Grenade (Ultimate).name: 破片手榴弹（终极型） Frag Grenade (Ultimate)
Frag Grenade (Ultimate).description:
激活 1 区域火力

重击 @Damage[1d8[bleed]]

这些破片手榴弹会爆炸成一团弹片云，并在一个 @Template[burst|distance:20] 内造成 12d8 穿刺伤害，且可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d8[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 12d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Gluon Crystal (Superior).name: 胶子水晶（卓越型） Gluon Crystal (Superior)
Gluon Crystal (Superior).description:
胶子水晶驾驭熵能以造成严重且持久的创伤。你的星能武器或太阳耀斑额外造成 @Damage[1d10[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。若重击，目标在从持续性流血伤害中恢复前，处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 状态。

A gluon crystal harnesses entropy to cause serious lasting wounds. Your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d10[persistent,bleed]] damage. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until it recovers from the persistent bleed damage.

Smoke Grenade (Superior).name: 烟雾手雷（卓越型） Smoke Grenade (Superior)
Smoke Grenade (Superior).description:
激活 1 区域射击

这枚手雷会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:30] 内释放出一团提供遮蔽的烟雾。区域内的生物具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状况，而对它们而言，所有其他生物也都是隐蔽的。烟雾持续 1 分钟，或直到被强风或类似效果驱散。

Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:30]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Arc Pistol.name: 电弧手枪 Arc Pistol
Arc Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把笨重的手枪不使用传统弹药，而是内置一个电容器，用来产生一道道电弧。它的枪托由聚碳酸酯或其他合成绝缘材料制成，通常带有亮黄色着色，并刻有代表高压的通用闪电符号。

Upgrades: 1

Instead of traditional ammunition, this bulky pistol contains a capacitor that generates arcs of electricity. Its stock is crafted from polycarbon or other synthetic insulators, often tinted bright yellow and inscribed with the universal bolt symbol for high voltage.

Reusable Grenade Shell.name: 可重复使用的手雷外壳 Reusable Grenade Shell
Reusable Grenade Shell.description:
这种军械最初被制成暴徒球的形状，旨在为这项本就危险的比赛增添视觉效果和额外风险。你可以投掷这个外壳来引爆其内嵌的手榴弹，使用该手榴弹的射程、伤害和其他效果。外壳会保留下来，并在24小时内修复该手榴弹；在此期间，你无法再内嵌另一枚手榴弹。该外壳体积过大，无法用于榴弹发射器。

激活—安装手榴弹 1 (manipulate) 你将一枚商用、战术型或先进型手榴弹内嵌到该外壳中。该外壳一次只能储存一枚手榴弹，你也可以通过 Interact 正常取出该手榴弹。

This ordinance was originally shaped like a brutaris ball and intended to add both visual effects and additional risk to the already dangerous game. You can throw the shell to explode the installed grenade, using the grenade's range, damage, and other effects. The shell remains and repairs the grenade over the course of 24 hours, during which time you can't install another grenade. The shell is too large for a grenade launcher.

Activate—Install Grenade 1 (manipulate) You install a commercial, tactical, or advanced grenade in the shell. You can store one grenade in the shell at a time, and you can Interact to retrieve the grenade normally.

Maratan Headache (Advanced).name: 玛拉坦头痛（先进型） Maratan Headache (Advanced)
Maratan Headache (Advanced).description:
激活 1 区域射击

严重成功 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}

马拉坦头痛弹由脆弱的中空葫芦制成，内部填充着腐臭的污泥，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内造成 3d8 非致命毒素伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 1}

Maratan headaches are made from brittle hollow gourds filled with a putrid sludge, dealing 3d8 nonlethal poison damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] save.

Hardlight Handwraps (Superior).name: 硬光手缠带（卓越型） Hardlight Handwraps (Superior)
Hardlight Handwraps (Superior).description:
升级 2

这些手缠可以定制为在使用时发出可见光谱中的任意颜色，一些制造商还提供自定义固件，使其外观显现为爪击、巨大的拳头或锤头。它们甚至还可以以其他方式佩戴在身体的其他部位。这些手缠会强化你的徒手攻击，使其如同制式武器一样，从而让你可以为你的徒手攻击添加一个升级。为此，将这些手缠视为属于斗殴组、具有轻型体积的近战武器。

你的徒手攻击获得追踪 +2 特性，且伤害提升为两个骰子。

Upgrades 2

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Your unarmed attacks gain the tracking +2 trait and increase the damage to two dice.

Irising Shield.name: 虹圈盾 Irising Shield
Irising Shield.description:
虹圈盾由柔性聚碳材料制成，采用可折叠设计。收起时，虹圈盾看起来像装饰性的手镯、臂铠或手套。展开时，它的面板会张开，形成一面微型圆形护盾。

An irising shield is made of flexible polycarbon with a retractable design. When retracted, an irising shield looks like a decorative bangle, gauntlet, or glove. When deployed, its panels flare out and form a miniature circular shield.

Camping Kit.name: 露营套装 Camping Kit
Camping Kit.description:
一套露营套件包含一顶可防风雨的帐篷，可供四个中型生物或两个大型生物使用、铺盖、一件生火器、1周口粮，以及一把求生刀。

A camping kit contains a weatherproof tent for four Medium or two Large creatures, bedrolls, a fire igniter, 1 week of rations, and a survival knife.

Lock (Tactical).name: 锁定（战术） Lock (Tactical)
Lock (Tactical).description:
撬开一个战术锁需要两次成功的[[/act pick-a-lock dc=20]]{DC 20 偷窃}检定。

Picking a tactical lock requires two successful [[/act pick-a-lock dc=20]]{DC 20 Thievery} checks.

Puzzleblade.name: 谜刃 Puzzleblade
Puzzleblade.description:
升级： 1

这把卡萨坦剑可以拆解成相互咬合的部件，便于收纳和运输。传统派会练习以仪式方式组装拼图刃的技艺，不同的部件象征着卡萨坦人重视的信念、奉献、节制与传统等美德。罪犯和走私者则看重拼图刃低调隐蔽的设计。

Upgrades: 1

This kasathan sword breaks down into interlocking pieces for storage and transport. Traditionalists practice the art of ritually assembling puzzleblades, with different pieces symbolizing the kasathan virtues of conviction, dedication, moderation, and tradition. Criminals and smugglers value the puzzleblade for its discreet design.

Force Field (Advanced).name: 力场（先进型） Force Field (Advanced)
Force Field (Advanced).description:
力场会吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其版本。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你本应受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先施加到力场的生命值上，然后才施加到你的生命值上（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，你的力场和护盾都会受到伤害。如果一次攻击或效果造成的伤害使力场的生命值降至 0，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会解除激活，且 10 分钟内不能再次激活。力场在激活期间，每轮于你回合开始时恢复标示数量的生命值。

如果你的力场是战术型或更高等级，它还会保护你免受致命打击。每次你在力场激活期间受到重击时，针对所列 DC 尝试一次平检。若成功，则其改为普通命中。

该力场有 20 点生命值，并在你的回合恢复 4 点生命值，且 @Check[flat|dc:19]。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 20}

激活——升起力场 1 (操作)

频率 每日三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续激活 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 20 Hit Points and replenishes 4 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:19].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 20}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Crystallized Shockshard (Elite).name: 结晶震击碎片（菁英） Crystallized Shockshard (Elite)
Crystallized Shockshard (Elite).description:
激活 f (专注)

触发 你用该武器对一个生物造成伤害。

这块电蓝色水晶噼啪作响，充满能量。当你激活震击碎晶时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:29] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续 1 分钟。若目标具有科技特征，则改为陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。

Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:29] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Force Needle.name: 力场针 Force Needle
Force Needle.description:
升级： 1

当一整瓶液体插入这件武器的握柄底部时，它会生成一根能量针，用于固定并注入其载荷。

Upgrades: 1

When a full vial of liquid is inserted into the bottom of this weapon's hilt, it creates an energy needle to hold and inject its payload.

Spell Gem (3rd-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（3阶法术） Spell Gem (3rd-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (3rd-Rank Spell).description:
这些晶格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并被编码入施放某个单一且特定法术所必需的魔法符文。要从法术宝石中施放法术，你必须单手持握该宝石，并以“施放法术”活动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常需要的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术还必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所包含的法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以标示的环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Zero Pistol.name: 零式手枪 Zero Pistol
Zero Pistol.description:
升级： 1

零度手枪使用装有超冷液体的透明罐作为弹药。

Upgrades: 1

Zero pistols use transparent canisters of supercooled liquid as ammunition.

Quantum Reaver.name: 量子劫掠者 Quantum Reaver
Quantum Reaver.description:
这把发光的长刃长达数英尺，其刃缘摇曳模糊；挥动时，现实仿佛会碎裂，让人沿着它划过的轨迹短暂瞥见其他世界。量子掠夺者是一把先进级武器，并且可以像通常那样改进。

激活—空间切裂 2

频率 每10分钟一次

效果 你令量子掠夺者穿相于时空之中，对30尺内的任一生物进行一次近战打击，视同你与其相邻。若造成重击，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}，持续3轮。

The edge of this glowing, several-foot-long blade wavers and blurs, and reality seems to fracture when it's swung, offering fleeting glimpses of other worlds along its path. The quantum reaver is an advanced-grade weapon, and can be improved as normal.

Activate—Spatial Slice 2

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Effect You phase the quantum reaver through space-time, making a melee Strike against any creature within 30 feet as if you were adjacent to it. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 3 rounds.

Ultralight Wings (Superior).name: 轻量化翅膀（卓越型） Ultralight Wings (Superior)
Ultralight Wings (Superior).description:
可折叠的翅膀连接在你的肩胛骨或身体上类似的位置，使它们能够承载你的重量并辅助你的飞行动作。你可以用一个 Interact 动作展开翅膀，但当你穿着超过轻甲的护甲时，无法展开或使用它们。翅膀展开期间，且你未超载时，你获得 60 尺的飞行速度，并在用于空中机动的 Acrobatics 检定上获得 +2 物品加值。

Foldable wings are attached to your shoulder blades or a similar location on your body that allows them to lift your weight and assist your flying movements. You can deploy the wings with an Interact action, but you can't deploy or use them while you're wearing more than light armor. While the wings are deployed and you're not encumbered, you gain a fly Speed of 60 feet and a +2 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Maneuver in Flight.

Shuriken Drone.name: 手里剑无人机 Shuriken Drone
Shuriken Drone.description:
升级： 1

这件星形武器环绕着一台微小的单旋翼无人机；如果它没有命中目标，就会返回投掷者手中。

Upgrades: 1

This star-shaped weapon surrounds a tiny single rotor drone designed to return to its thrower if it doesn't hit its target.

Crystallized Shockshard (Superior).name: 结晶化震击碎片（卓越型） Crystallized Shockshard (Superior)
Crystallized Shockshard (Superior).description:
激活 f (专注)

触发 你用该武器对一个生物造成伤害。

这块电蓝色水晶噼啪作响，充满能量。当你激活震击碎晶时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:25] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续1分钟。若目标具有科技特征，则它改为陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。

Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Aeon Rifle.name: 永世步枪 Aeon Rifle
Aeon Rifle.description:
升级： 0

作为阿兹兰特星际帝国的主力装备，这把流线型激光步枪带有一个可嵌入万劫石的插槽，用以增强并聚焦其光束的强度。

Upgrades: 0

A mainstay of the Azlanti Star Empire, this sleek laser rifle includes a slot for aeon stones to enhance and focus the intensity of its beams.

Plasma Caster.name: 等离子投射器 Plasma Caster
Plasma Caster.description:
升级： 1

这把袖珍手枪会发射凝缩等离子球。若在开火前同时按住扳机和保险夹，枪管中就会积聚更多等离子体。

Upgrades: 1

This compact pistol shoots balls of condensed plasma. Holding down the trigger and safety clip at the same time before firing results in the barrel building up more plasma.

Dreamlink Serum.name: 梦链血清 Dreamlink Serum
Dreamlink Serum.description:
激活 1（操作）

一种光亮的紫色糖浆，其中旋绕着黑色与绿色的条纹。饮下这份血清后，你的思绪会飘忽游离，并捕捉到来自新诞者的灵能残印，使你以牺牲当前感知为代价，获得深奥知识与异界智慧。你在10分钟内的神秘学与宗教检定获得+2物品加值。在持续时间内，你有一次机会可以对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定掷两次，并采用较好的结果（这是一种幸运效果）；如果你在使用这种幸运效果时两次都掷出1或两次都掷出20，你会在眼角余光中瞥见一个神秘身影的轮廓，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

A glossy purple syrup swirled with streaks of black and green. After drinking this serum, your mind drifts and latches onto psychic impressions from the Newborn, granting you esoteric knowledge and alien wisdom at the expense of your current awareness. You gain a +2 item bonus to Occultism and Religion checks for 10 minutes. Once during the duration, you can roll a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} twice and use the better result (this is a fortune effect); if you roll a 1 or a 20 twice using this fortune effect, you glimpse the silhouette of a mysterious figure in the corner of your eye and become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Dermal Plating (Elite).name: 真皮镀层（菁英型） Dermal Plating (Elite)
Dermal Plating (Elite).description:
坚固的镀层保护你的皮肤，并帮助你偏转物理打击。带有真皮镀层的肢体可作为护盾运作。你可以用你的肢体执行“举起护盾”，使你在下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 的环境加值，但使用时不需要占用手。你可以用你的肢体使用“护盾格挡”反应。真皮镀层的硬度为 25。在你使用“护盾格挡”后，你的真皮镀层会受损，并且在纳米机器人修复这些耐用镀层的 24 小时内无法使用。

Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 25. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Frost Module (Tactical).name: 寒霜模块（战术型） Frost Module (Tactical)
Frost Module (Tactical).description:
这个模块会从武器的打击刃部和弹药中虹吸热量，并利用多余的能量为自身供能，同时冷却周围的空气。成功进行一次 Strike 时，它会额外造成 1d6 点寒冷伤害。若造成重击，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，直到你下个回合结束，除非其成功通过一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] 豁免。

此武器造成的寒冷伤害无视目标的寒冷抗性。

This module siphons the heat from the weapon's striking edge and ammunition, powering itself with the excess energy as it chills the air around it. It deals an additional 1d6 cold damage on a successful Strike. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:34] save.

Cold damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's cold resistance.

Explosive Defense Unit.name: 爆炸防御单元 Explosive Defense Unit
Explosive Defense Unit.description:
强化定制护甲板会自动生成一道遏制力场，保护你免受附近爆炸的影响，使你对区域伤害获得 2 点抗性（仅限强酸、寒冷、电击和火焰伤害）。你还可以在爆炸防御单元中存放一枚手雷，并在不伤害自己的情况下将其引爆。

激活—存放手雷 2 (manipulate)

效果 你将一枚手雷放入爆炸防御单元内的强化隔间中。你可以正常以 Interact 取出该手雷。你一次只能在该护甲升级中存放一枚手雷。

激活—防御性引爆 1 (manipulate)

需求 你存放了一枚手雷

效果 你引爆存放在爆炸防御单元中的手雷。爆炸以你所处的空间为中心，但该升级会生成一道遏制力场来保护你免受其效果影响。除此之外，这枚手雷的运作方式与正常激活时相同。

Reinforced custom armor plates automatically generate a containment field to protect you from nearby explosions, granting you resistance 2 to area damage (acid, cold, electricity, and fire damage only). You can also store a grenade in the explosive defense unit and detonate it without harming yourself.

Activate—Store Grenade 2 (manipulate)

Effect You place a grenade inside a reinforced compartment in the explosive defense unit. You can Interact to retrieve the grenade normally. You can store only one grenade in the armor upgrade at a time.

Activate—Defensive Detonation 1 (manipulate)

Requirements You have a stored grenade

Effect You detonate the grenade stored in the explosive defense unit. The explosion is centered on your space, but the upgrade generates a containment field to protect you from its effects. The grenade otherwise functions as if you'd activated it normally.

Smoke Grenade (Paragon).name: 烟雾手雷（完美型） Smoke Grenade (Paragon)
Smoke Grenade (Paragon).description:
激活 1 区域射击

这枚手雷会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:100] 内释放出一团提供遮蔽的烟雾。区域内的生物具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，且对他们而言，所有其他生物也都是隐蔽的。烟雾持续1分钟，或直到被强风或类似效果驱散为止。

Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:100]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Shielding Skin (Commercial).name: 阻隔性表皮（商用） Shielding Skin (Commercial)
Shielding Skin (Commercial).description:
你的皮肤经过生物工程改造，可保护你的整个身体（包括大脑）免受有害效果影响。你获得对豁免检定的 +1 物品加值。

Your skin is biologically engineered to protect your entire body, including your brain, from harmful effects. You gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws.

Loudener (Tactical).name: 扩音器（战术型） Loudener (Tactical)
Loudener (Tactical).description:
这个专用锥形装置内嵌在武器的枪口或握柄上，利用助记脉冲和被动声学来提高其攻击的音量。它额外造成 1d6 点音波伤害。若造成重击，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:34] 豁免，否则将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 1 分钟（若严重失败则为 1 小时）。

这件武器造成的音波伤害无视目标的音波抗性。

This specialized cone is installed over the muzzle or hilt of a weapon to use pneumonic pulses and passive acoustics to increase the volume of its attacks. It deals an extra 1d6 sonic damage. On a critical hit, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute (or 1 hour on a critical failure).

Sonic damage dealt by this weapon ignores the target's sonic resistance.

Thermal Capacitor (Advanced).name: 热能电容（先进型） Thermal Capacitor (Advanced)
Thermal Capacitor (Advanced).description:
这件护甲升级会调节热量，保护你免受极端温度的影响。你受到保护，不受极寒和轻度高温的影响。

This armor upgrade regulates heat, protecting you from extreme temperatures. You're protected from extreme cold and mild heat.

Grenade Launcher (Ultimate).name: 榴弹发射器（终极型） Grenade Launcher (Ultimate)
Grenade Launcher (Ultimate).description:
升级 3

激活 2 区域射击

这种自动后膛装填发射器的旋转弹巢可容纳至多六枚带有智能装填技术的任意种类手榴弹，使其持用者每次开火时都能选择不同的手榴弹。手榴弹发射器是一种军用远程武器，装填值为 2，射程为 490 英尺。

Upgrades 3

Activate 2 Area Fire

The rotating barrel of this automatic breechloading launcher holds up to six grenades of any variety with smart loading technology, allowing its wielder to choose a different grenade each time they fire. A grenade launcher is a martial ranged weapon, has a reload of 2, and a range 490 feet.

Battle Ribbon.name: 战斗缎带 Battle Ribbon
Battle Ribbon.description:
升级： 1

这条纯粹的纳米碳丝带锋利得足以切开血肉，同时又不会打断使这种武器闻名的传统战舞。

Upgrades: 1

This sheer nanocarbon ribbon is sharp enough to cut through flesh without interrupting the traditional battle dances that make the weapon famous.

Retinal Reflectors.name: 视网膜反射器 Retinal Reflectors
Retinal Reflectors.description:
这些植入你视觉器官中的反光材料薄片会增强你的视力，而不会改变你的外观。你获得微光视觉，以及在以视觉进行的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻} 察觉检定中获得 +1 物品加值。

These sheets of reflective material, implanted in your visual organs, enhance your vision without changing your appearance. You gain low-light vision and a +1 item bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} if they involve sight.

Electromag Grenade (Tactical).name: 电磁手雷（战术型） Electromag Grenade (Tactical)
Electromag Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}

这些手雷会释放出一片电击场，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内造成 2d8 点电击伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定。若你可使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对电磁手雷的豁免检定大失败的科技生物和无人看管的科技物品会陷入故障状态。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 2d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Spell Chip (6th-Rank Spell).name: 法术芯片（6环法术） Spell Chip (6th-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (6th-Rank Spell).description:
用法 内嵌于计算机或通讯器中；

这些芯片可以内嵌于通讯器和其他计算机中，使该设备能够施放法术。每台设备只能拥有一个法术芯片。从法术芯片施放法术时，你必须单手持握该计算机或通讯器，并以“施放法术”动作，按该法术通常所需的动作数来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是由你来施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传承。如果该法术具有法器，你仍然必须持有该法器，才能通过法术芯片施放该法术。法术芯片不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含的法术而变化。

除了施放该法术所消耗的充能外，构成法术芯片核心晶格的精密组件若连续快速使用，还可能会被损坏。若试图在一天内使用法术芯片超过一次，则需要对其进行超频。再次施放该法术，然后进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:10]。若成功，法术芯片损坏。若失败，法术芯片被摧毁。若任何人试图对当天已经超频过的法术芯片再次超频，则该法术芯片会自动被摧毁（即使它已经被修复），且不会施放任何法术。

激活 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加超频

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Electroencephalon.name: 脑波仪 Electroencephalon
Electroencephalon.description:
这个魔法矩阵会记录死灵裔的意识、思想与灵魂，同时还赋予其一种受限形式的心灵感应。如此经改造而增强的灵能感知，是在死灵裔肉体被摧毁时保存其记忆过程中的关键，其中也包括导致其毁灭之事的相关记忆。

当死灵裔被摧毁时，脑波仪会在接下来的 1d10 天内开始重建其肉体。即使将死灵裔的尸体彻底分解，也无法完全消灭这种生物。死灵裔的新身体会显现在脑波仪旁边，完全恢复，但不带有旧身体上的任何装备。

标准脑波仪是一件约有通讯器大小、通过神秘学手段构筑而成的复杂魔法科技装置。该装置通常具有 10 点硬度和 40 HP。

This magical matrix records the consciousness, thoughts, and soul of a necrovite and also grants a limited form of telepathy. Such augmented psychic awareness is key to the process of preserving a necrovite's memories when their body is destroyed, including memories of whatever caused their destruction.

When a necrovite is destroyed, electroencephalon begins rebuilding their their physical form over the next 1d10 days. Not even disintegrating a necrovite's corpse can fully destroy the creature. The necrovite's new body manifests next to the electroencephalon, fully healed but without any equipment from their old body.

A standard electroencephalon is a piece of complex magitech about the size of a comm unit that has been constructed via occult means. This device typically has Hardness 10 and 40 HP.

Datajack (Tactical).name: 数据接口（战术型） Datajack (Tactical)
Datajack (Tactical).description:
这种电控机械是一个内嵌于你身体中的可编程数据端口，使你能够访问计算机和数字存储设备。任何手持计算机都可以连接到该端口，而更大的系统通常需要一根适配线缆。你不需要界面来访问该系统，因为它会通过数据接口直接连接到你的神经系统。你仍然必须进行与操作该设备相关的任何技能检定，例如使用计算机访问某个系统。有些封闭系统根本不允许直接数据访问。

当你使用战术数据接口访问系统时，你的计算机检定获得+1物品加值。

This cybernetic is a programmable data port installed into your body, allowing you to access computers and digital storage devices. Any handheld computer can connect to the port, while larger systems typically require an adapter cable. You don't need an interface to access the system, as it connects directly to your nervous system via the datajack. You must still attempt any skill checks associated with operating the device, such as Computers to access a system. Some closed systems don't allow direct data access at all.

You gain a +1 item bonus to Computers checks when accessing a system with a tactical datajack.

Active Camouflage (Tactical).name: 主动伪装（战术型） Active Camouflage (Tactical)
Active Camouflage (Tactical).description:
硬光投影仪会根据周围环境变化，用不断变换的色彩与图案改变你护甲的外观。穿着该护甲时，你的隐匿检定获得 +2 物品加值。

Hardlight projectors shift the appearance of your armor using shifting colors and patterns that respond to your environment. You gain a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing the armor.

Hardlight Handwraps (Elite).name: 硬光缠手（菁英） Hardlight Handwraps (Elite)
Hardlight Handwraps (Elite).description:
升级 3

这些手缠带可以定制为在使用时发出可见光谱中的任意颜色，且一些制造商提供可修改其外观的定制固件，使其显现为爪击、巨大的拳头或锤头。它们甚至可以用其他方式佩戴在身体的其他部位。这些手缠带会像制式武器一样强化你的徒手攻击，使你能够为徒手攻击添加一项升级。为此，将这些手缠带视为属于斗殴组、具有轻型体积的近战武器。

你的徒手攻击获得追踪 +2 特性，且伤害提高为三个骰子。

Upgrades 3

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Your unarmed attacks gain the tracking +2 trait and increase the damage to three dice.

Degradation Grenade (Ultimate).name: 劣化手雷（终极型） Degradation Grenade (Ultimate)
Degradation Grenade (Ultimate).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 @Damage[1d8[persistent,acid]] 伤害

降解手雷会制造出猛烈的魔法爆炸，将物质撕扯进不同的现实之中，只留下焦黑的物质残块，随后消散为虚无。当手雷爆炸时，它会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:20] 内造成 12d8 酸蚀伤害，且需进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d8[persistent,acid]] damage

Degradation grenades create violent blasts of magic that rip matter into different realities, leaving behind blackened hunks of matter that dissipate into nothingness. When the grenade explodes, it deals 12d8 acid damage in a @Template[burst|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Vocal Modulator.name: 声调调制器 Vocal Modulator
Vocal Modulator.description:
一系列微型致动器和动态超谐振腔重塑了你的声带。声音调制器让你能够改变自己声音的音高、音色和语调，从而模仿口音或发出外星语言的音。使用欺骗进行冒充时，如果你声音的变化也有助于你的伪装，则你获得 +1 物品加值（由 GM 自行裁定）。

A series of miniature actuators and dynamic hyper-resonant chambers reshape your voice box. A vocal modulator allows you to change the pitch, timbre, and tone of your voice so you can imitate accents or pronounce alien languages. When using Deception to Impersonate, you gain a +1 item bonus if the change in your voice also helps your disguise (at the GM's discretion).

Great Absalom Relay Medal.name: 伟大阿布萨洛姆接力赛奖章 Great Absalom Relay Medal
Great Absalom Relay Medal.description:
这枚奖章表明你是“伟大的艾巴萨罗姆空间站接力赛”的获胜者，嵌入其中的数据驱动器还包含了该赛事转播的完整录影。佩戴它时，赛事的粉丝会认出你，并且更愿意帮助你。你在与艾巴萨罗姆空间站居民交流时进行的外交检定获得+1物品加值。

This medal marks you as the winner of The Great Absalom Relay, and the embedded data drive contains a full recording of the event broadcast. Fans of the event recognize you while wearing it and are more willing to assist you. You gain a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy checks made to communicate with residents of Absalom Station.

Fire Extinguisher (Commercial).name: 灭火器（商用） Fire Extinguisher (Commercial)
Fire Extinguisher (Commercial).description:
灭火器会在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内喷射泡沫，自动扑灭非魔法火焰，并尝试以2环位对任何魔法火焰效果进行反制，反制调整值为 [[/r 1d20+7 #Counteract]]{+7}。灭火器每次使用时都会消耗1份化学剂，并使用商用化学剂罐。

A fire extinguishes sprays foam in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], automatically putting out non-magical fires and attempting to counteract any magical fire effects at 2nd rank with a [[/r 1d20+7 #Counteract]]{+7} counteract modifier. A fire extinguisher expends one chem each time it's used and uses a commercial chem tank.

Doshko.name: 多什科 Doshko
Doshko.description:
升级： 1

这是维斯卡里姆的传统武器，这种动力长柄斧配有一到三片三角形斧刃，锻造时兼顾了大幅度的过顶挥砍与战术招架。

Upgrades: 1

The traditional weapon of the Veskarium, this powered poleaxe features one to three triangular blades forged for both wide overhead swings and tactical parrying.

Skyfire Sword.name: 天火之剑 Skyfire Sword
Skyfire Sword.description:
升级： 1

这把火焰刀刃因被天火军团的战士们广泛使用而闻名，它由磁场固定的燃烧气体提供动力。

Upgrades: 1

Famously wielded by warriors of the Skyfire Legion, this flaming blade is powered by burning gas held in place by magnetic fields.

Rotolaser.name: 旋转激光器 Rotolaser
Rotolaser.description:
升级： 1

旋转激光枪会同时发射多道等离子体光束。这把大型突击步枪配有一组旋转枪管，能够在进行自动射击时防止过热。

Upgrades: 1

A rotolaser fires multiple beams of plasma at once. This massive assault rifle has a set of rotating barrels that prevent overheating when spewing auto-fire.

Fear Projector (Commercial).name: 恐惧投射器（商用） Fear Projector (Commercial)
Fear Projector (Commercial).description:
这个集成的全息影像投影仪会让该武器造成的伤口看起来比实际严重得多。当你用此武器造成重击时，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

This integrated hologram projector makes the wounds caused by the weapon look way worse than they are. When you critically hit with this weapon, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Sonic Rifle.name: 音波步枪 Sonic Rifle
Sonic Rifle.description:
升级： 1

音波步枪会发射一道狭窄的超声波束，能有效地将其击中的任何物体变成扬声器，并以高超音速振动将目标震碎。

Upgrades: 1

A sonic rifle creates a narrow beam of ultrasound that effectively turns whatever it hits into a speaker, breaking its targets apart with hypersonic vibrations.

Spell Gem (1st-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（1环法术） Spell Gem (1st-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (1st-Rank Spell).description:
这些晶格状宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并刻录有施放某个单一、特定法术所需的魔法符文。要从法术宝石中施放法术，你必须单手持握宝石，并以“施放法术”活动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，并且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Cairn Form Spell Amp (Tactical).name: 石冢形态法术增幅（战术） Cairn Form Spell Amp (Tactical)
Cairn Form Spell Amp (Tactical).description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是即用型的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (manipulate)

效果 第6环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HAaRcHfN4g83eSEC]{Cairn Form} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HAaRcHfN4g83eSEC]{Cairn Form} spell

Incendiary Grenade (Elite).name: 燃烧手雷（菁英型） Incendiary Grenade (Elite)
Incendiary Grenade (Elite).description:
激活 1 区域火焰

重击 10 feet

这些手雷使用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生一阵强烈高热，并造成 10d8 火焰伤害，附带一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:15]）。如果你可以使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷处击退。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 10 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 10d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:15]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Programmer's Plushie (Tactical).name: 程序员毛绒玩偶（战术） Programmer's Plushie (Tactical)
Programmer's Plushie (Tactical).description:
这些微缩模型有许多形状，通常类似于程序员的个人头像或流行媒体角色，例如礼宾船长或丧。这个毛绒玩偶有助于整理你的思绪；你在计算机检定上获得 +2 物品加值。

激活—秘密口令 1 (听觉)

效果 你低声说出一段只有你自己和你的程序员毛绒玩偶才知道的秘密口令，使一台计算机、容器、门或锁免遭入侵，如同一个 3阶 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{Lock}，DC 为 25。任何生物只要在触碰目标时拿着程序员毛绒玩偶，就可以使用该口令绕过这把锁。

These miniatures come in many shapes, often resembling a programmer's personal avatar or popular media character, such as Captain Concierge or Zo!. The plush helps organize your thoughts; you gain a +2 item bonus to Computers checks.

Activate—Secret Password 1 (auditory)

Effect You whisper a secret passcode known only to yourself and your programmer's plushie, securing a computer, container, door, or lock from intrusion as a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{Lock} with a DC of 25. Any creature can bypass this lock using the passcode while touching the target with the programmer's plushie.

Dragon Gland (Ultimate).name: 龙喉腺体（终极型） Dragon Gland (Ultimate)
Dragon Gland (Ultimate).description:
通过尖端外科手术，你在喉咙后部被植入了一个经过改造的魔法腺体，使其能够为你的族裔的生物发挥功能。当该器官被生体塑造时，从以下列表中选择你的吐息武器的伤害类型：强酸、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波。你获得以下激活方式。

激活—呼气 1 (操纵)

频率 每 10 分钟一次

效果 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的每个生物都受到 @Damage[(14d6)[untyped]] 点伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:43|basic] 豁免。伤害取决于该强化的版本。

With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(14d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:43|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Dermal Plating (Advanced).name: 真皮镀层（先进型） Dermal Plating (Advanced)
Dermal Plating (Advanced).description:
坚固的镀层保护你的皮肤，并帮助你偏转物理打击。带有真皮镀层的肢体视为一面护盾。你可以用你的肢体执行“举起护盾”，使你在直到你下个回合开始前获得AC +1的环境加值，但使用它不需要手。你可以用你的肢体使用“护盾格挡”反应。真皮镀层的硬度为15。你使用“护盾格挡”后，你的真皮镀层会受损，并且在纳米机器人修复这些耐久镀板的24小时内无法使用。

Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 15. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Diva's Microphone (Tactical).name: 歌姬的麦克风（战术型） Diva's Microphone (Tactical)
Diva's Microphone (Tactical).description:
这支华丽炫目的水晶麦克风镶嵌着闪闪发光的珠宝与精巧的灯饰，并会随着音乐的节拍脉动发光。它同时兼具麦克风与扬声器的功能，能够放大你的声音，使其足够响亮，让最远500英尺内的所有听众都能清晰听见，即使原本会被其他环境噪音掩盖也不例外。这不会增加其他听觉或语言类效果的范围或区域，而墙壁等实体障碍仍会像平常一样阻挡或削弱你的声音。

歌姬的麦克风使你使用它进行的表演检定获得+2物品加值。

激活—盛大终曲 2 （听觉）

频率 每10分钟一次

效果 你的歌声抵达震裂耳膜的高潮，你从自身所在空间施放一个4环的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QpP30fcEl4NGjHwo]{Sonic Scream}（DC 27）。

This ostentatious crystal microphone is embellished with glimmering jewels and delicate lights that pulse in time to music. It functions as both a microphone and speaker, amplifying your voice loud enough for you to be heard clearly by all listeners up to 500 feet away, even if other ambient noise would otherwise block the sound. This doesn't increase the range or area of other auditory or linguistic effects, and physical barriers such as walls still block or muffle your voice as normal.

The diva's microphone grants a +2 item bonus to Performance checks attempted with it.

Activate—Grand Finale 2 (auditory)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Your song reaches an eardrum-bursting climax as you cast a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QpP30fcEl4NGjHwo]{Sonic Scream} originating from your space (DC 27).

Maratan Headache (Commercial).name: 马拉坦头痛（商用） Maratan Headache (Commercial)
Maratan Headache (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}

马拉坦头痛弹由易碎的中空葫芦制成，里面装满了腐臭的污泥，在 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成 1d8 点非致命毒素伤害，并需进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 1}

Maratan headaches are made from brittle hollow gourds filled with a putrid sludge, dealing 1d8 nonlethal poison damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] save.

Holospark.name: 全息火花 Holospark
Holospark.description:
这种微型全息投影器常伪装成耳环、翻领别针或吊坠。它可储存一种简单的个性化视觉投影，例如光环或翅膀，并配有简短音频，例如一段流行歌曲片段或一个音效。你的全息火花可以用计算机进行编程，例如你个人通讯器中的那台。

This tiny holoprojector is often disguised as an earring, lapel pin, or pendant, It stores a simple visual projection of personal flair, such as a halo or wings, accompanied by short audio, such as a clip of a popular song or a sound effect. Your holospark can be programmed with a computer, such as the one in your comm unit.

Shredskin (Advanced).name: 碎皮（先进型） Shredskin (Advanced)
Shredskin (Advanced).description:
这件石板灰色的衣物涌动着死灵系能量。正确穿着时，这件魔法紧身衣会将一个活体生物的外观转变为不死生物的模样，并使其在隐匿检定上获得 +3 物品加值。

激活—死灵化 2 (操控)

频率 每天一次

持续时间 1 小时（见正文）

效果 碎皮衣会将你的外观转变为你自己的不死生物版本。你的伪装会影响你的视觉外观、声音、气味以及其他一切侦测形式，包括生命感知。在该能力的正常持续时间结束后，你可以通过用长袍上的钩子刺穿自己，将其再延长 1 小时，但这会使你失去 @Damage[50[healing]] 生命值。持续时间不能第二次延长，且如果这些生命值被治疗，该效果会立刻结束。

This slate-gray garment ripples with necromantic energy. When worn properly, this magical bodysuit transforms the appearance of a living creature into that of an undead creature and grants a +3 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate—Necrotize 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Duration 1 hour (see text)

Effect The shredskin transforms your appearance into an undead version of yourself. Your disguise affects your visual appearance, sound, scent, and all other forms of detection, including lifesense. After the normal duration of this ability ends, you can extend it by 1 more hour by piercing yourself with hooks on the robe, causing you to lose @Damage[50[healing]] Hit Points. The duration can't be extended a second time, and if these Hit Points are healed, the effect ends immediately.

Medkit (Tactical).name: 医疗包（战术型） Medkit (Tactical)
Medkit (Tactical).description:
这些包含进行医学检定所需的镇痛药、绷带、无菌纱布和缝合工具，用于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}。战术医疗工具包为此类检定提供 +1 物品加值。医药包是一种工具包。

These contain analgesics, bandages, sterile gauze, and suturing tools necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. Tactical medical toolkits provide a +1 item bonus to such checks. A medkit is a toolkit.

Streetsweeper.name: 扫街者 Streetsweeper
Streetsweeper.description:
升级： 1

这门巨大的便携式加农炮利用扬声器发射高密度超声波，其威力足以将街道上路径中的一切横扫一空。

Upgrades: 1

This enormous portable cannon uses speakers to broadcast dense ultrasonic waves powerful enough to sweep a street clean of anything in its path.

Machine Mind Serum (Commercial).name: 机械心智血清（商业） Machine Mind Serum (Commercial)
Machine Mind Serum (Commercial).description:
激活 1（操作）

当你注入这瓶血清时，魔法科技纳米机器人会将如机器般的回路注入你的身体，在你的皮肤下脉动并发光。持续1分钟，你对抗精神效果的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。你还获得精神伤害抗性5。由于你更接近机械的本质，你获得弱电5。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

When you inject this serum, magitech nanites infuse your body with machine-like circuitry that pulses and glows beneath your skin. For 1 minute, you gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against mental effects. You also gain resistance 5 to mental damage. Due to your more machine-like nature, you gain weakness 5 to electricity.

Shock Truncheon.name: 电击警棍 Shock Truncheon
Shock Truncheon.description:
升级： 1

这种可折叠警棍深受安保部队欢迎，每次打击都会释放电流。握柄内的嗡鸣装置会产生电压，在完全充能时会发出如同一群嗡嗡作响的昆虫般的声音。

Upgrades: 1

Popular among security forces, this retractable baton discharges electricity with each Strike. A whirring device inside the grip generates voltage, creating a sound like a swarm of buzzing insects when it's fully charged.

Phase Shield.name: 相位盾 Phase Shield
Phase Shield.description:
相位盾是一种精巧但耐用的科技装置，通常绑在肢体上或佩戴在腰带上，展开时会投射出一道具有防护作用的硬光屏障。相位盾呈半透明并带有色调，拥有种类繁多且可完全自定义的颜色与图像投影器。许多使用者会选择自己喜爱的名人、所爱之人或宜人风景的图像，以在危急情况下振奋自己的战斗精神。

A phase shield is an intricate but durable technological device often worn strapped to a limb or belt that projects a protective hardlight barrier when deployed. Phase shields are translucent and tinted, with a wide variety of fully customizable colors and image projectors. Many wielders choose an image of a favorite celebrity, loved one, or pleasant scenery to bolster their fighting spirit in a dire situation.

Disintegration Lash.name: 裂解鞭 Disintegration Lash
Disintegration Lash.description:
升级： 1

通电后，这条鞭子会显现为一条起伏不定的黑蛇，迸发出泛着红光的能量，并在原子层面撕裂其所击中的一切。

Upgrades: 1
