Appearing as an undulating black snake when powered, this whip crackles with red-tinged energy that sunders whatever it strikes at the atomic level.

Nano-Optics Node.name: 纳米光学节点 Nano-Optics Node
Nano-Optics Node.description:
一个植入你枕叶中的晶体纳米碳节点通过微观纤维连接到视神经。你可以激活该节点，将X射线数据叠加到你的正常视觉上。你可以用单个动作关闭该叠加层，该动作具有专注特征。

激活——X射线叠加层 1 (concentrate)

效果 你的纳米光学节点将收集到的X射线数据直接传输到你的眼睛中，并叠加在你的正常视觉上。你可以看穿60英尺内的大多数材料和墙壁。你的视线会被2英尺厚的木材或塑料、1英尺厚的石材、2英寸厚的普通金属、任意厚度的铅或任意星铁阻挡，并且你只能以黑白方式看见。由于海量视觉信息会造成干扰，在叠加层激活期间，你的察觉检定承受 –2 的环境减值。

A crystalline nanocarbon node implanted in your occipital lobe connects to optic nerves by microscopic fibers. You can activate the node to overlay your normal vision with X-ray data. You can deactivate the overlay as a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Activate—X-Ray Overlay 1 (concentrate)

Effect Your nano-optics node relays collected X-ray data directly to your eyes, overlaying your normal vision. You can see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white. Due to the distracting amount of visual information, you take a –2 circumstance penalty to Perception checks while the overlay is active.

Frag Grenade (Commercial).name: 破片手榴弹（商业） Frag Grenade (Commercial)
Frag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域火焰

重击 @Damage[1[bleed]]

这些破片手雷会爆炸成一团弹片云，并在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成 1d8 点穿刺伤害，且可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 1d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Compact Shield.name: 袖珍盾 Compact Shield
Compact Shield.description:
这种流线型护盾深受特工和其他机动作战者的喜爱。它最常见的设计是一块聚碳酸酯面板，经过贴合式塑形，可紧密覆盖在前臂或其他肢体上。

This sleek shield is a favorite of operatives and other mobile combatants. It's most common design is a polycarbon panel contoured to fit snugly over a forearm or other limb.

Dragon Gland (Elite).name: 龙喉腺体（菁英型） Dragon Gland (Elite)
Dragon Gland (Elite).description:
通过尖端外科手术，你的喉咙后部被植入了一个经过改造的魔法腺体，使其能够为你族裔的生物发挥作用。当该器官被生体塑造时，从以下列表中选择你的吐息武器的伤害类型：酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波。你获得以下激活。

激活——呼出 1（操纵）

频率 每 10 分钟一次

效果 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]内的每个生物都要承受 @Damage[(10d6)[untyped]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:37|basic] 豁免。伤害取决于该增幅的版本。

With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(10d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:37|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Adaptive Energy Shielding.name: 自适应能量护盾 Adaptive Energy Shielding
Adaptive Energy Shielding.description:
该装置会改变你护甲上内嵌的绝缘层的化学成分，使其对不同类型的能量作出反应。

激活—适应 r

频率 每10分钟1次

触发 你受到酸蚀、寒冷、电击或火焰伤害

效果 你的能量护盾升级会变为触发该效果的伤害类型。该效果会持续，直到你再次适应，或从同一件护甲上卸载任意自适应能量护盾或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.fQxWOthZx2HZUEzZ]{能量护盾} 升级为止。如果你的这件护甲上有多个能量护盾升级，则你在适应时选择其中一个进行改变。

This device changes the chemical composition of the insulation installed on your armor, reacting to different types of energy.

Activate—Adapt r

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You take acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage

Effect Your energy shielding upgrade changes to the triggering damage type. This lasts until you Adapt again or uninstall any adaptive energy shielding or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.fQxWOthZx2HZUEzZ]{Energy Shielding} upgrade from the same armor. If you have multiple energy shielding upgrades on this armor, choose one to change when you Adapt.

Arc Rifle.name: 电弧步枪 Arc Rifle
Arc Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这把步枪宽大的枪身内装有一个电弧手枪电容器的放大版，配有短枪管和聚碳酸酯枪托，旨在将持用者与高压电隔离开来。电弧步枪更大的电容器使其能够产生足以制服一头狂暴伦克罗达的电荷。

Upgrades: 1

This rifle's oversized body contains a larger version of an arc pistol capacitor, with a short barrel and polycarbon stock designed to insulate the wielder from high voltage. The arc rifle's larger capacitor allows it to produce a charge with enough power to subdue a rampaging renkroda.

Spell Chip (7th-Rank Spell).name: 法术芯片（7环法术） Spell Chip (7th-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (7th-Rank Spell).description:
用法 内嵌于计算机或通讯装置；

这些芯片可以内嵌于通讯装置和其他计算机中，使该设备能够施放法术。每个设备只能有一个法术芯片。从法术芯片施放法术需要你用一只手持握该计算机或通讯装置，并以该法术通常所需的动作数，使用“施放法术”活动来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是你在施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。如果该法术具有法器，你仍必须持有该法器，才能从法术芯片施放该法术。法术芯片不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所容纳的法术而变化。

除了施放该法术所消耗的充能外，构成法术芯片核心晶格的精密部件如果在短时间内连续使用，也可能会被损坏。若要在一天内使用法术芯片超过一次，则需要对其进行超频。再次施放该法术，然后进行一次@Check[flat|dc:10]。若成功，法术芯片损坏。若失败，法术芯片被摧毁。如果任何人试图对当天已经超频过的法术芯片再次超频，则该法术芯片会自动被摧毁（即使它已经被修复），且不会施放任何法术。

激活 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加超频

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Haste Spell Amp.name: 加速法术增幅 Haste Spell Amp
Haste Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界上，这种被称为“法术安瓿”的物品是可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (manipulate)

效果 3环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} spell

Chem Tank (Elite).name: 化学储罐（菁英） Chem Tank (Elite)

Electromag Grenade (Elite).name: 电磁手雷（菁英型） Electromag Grenade (Elite)
Electromag Grenade (Elite).description:
激活 1 区域火焰

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}

这些手雷会释放出一片电击力场，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:15] 内造成 10d8 点电击伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定。若你可以使用手雷的重击专精效果，则在对抗电磁手雷时豁免检定大失败的科技生物和无人持用的科技物品会陷入故障。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 10d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Ghost Killer.name: 幽灵杀手 Ghost Killer
Ghost Killer.description:
这项升级让你能够伤害没有实体形态的生物。幽灵杀手武器对虚体生物尤其有效，而虚体生物几乎总是对幽灵杀手武器具有特定的弱点。虚体生物可以触碰、持握并挥舞幽灵杀手武器（与大多数实体物品不同）。

This upgrade lets you harm creatures without physical form. A ghost killer weapon is particularly effective against incorporeal creatures, which almost always have a specific vulnerability to ghost killer weapons. Incorporeal creatures can touch, hold, and wield ghost killer weapons (unlike most physical objects).

Container (Designer).name: 容器（设计师） Container (Designer)
Container (Designer).description:
容器包括背包、公文包、行李袋和手提包。容器最多可容纳 4 Bulk，其中前 2 Bulk 的物品不计入你的 Bulk 上限。如果你是携带或收纳该容器，而非将其穿戴在身上，则它的 Bulk 为轻型而非可忽略。

当你携带一件设计师容器时，例如设计师手提包，你在对上流社会人士进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 检定时获得 +1 物品加值。

Containers include backpacks, briefcases, duffel bags, and handbags. A container holds up to 4 Bulk and the first 2 Bulk of those items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the container rather than wearing it on your person, its Bulk is light instead of negligible.

You gain a +1 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on high society individuals while carrying a designer container, such as a designer handbag.

Incendiary Grenade (Tactical).name: 燃烧手雷（战术型） Incendiary Grenade (Tactical)
Incendiary Grenade (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 5尺

这些手雷使用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生一阵强烈热浪，并造成 2d8 火焰伤害，可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:10]）。如果你可以使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷处击退。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 5 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 2d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:10]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Musical Instrument (Handheld, Tactical).name: 乐器（手持式，战术） Musical Instrument (Handheld, Tactical)
Musical Instrument (Handheld, Tactical).description:
除了最传统的乐器之外，其余几乎都使用现代技术来放大声音、提供音乐伴奏，或与其他乐器进行无线连接。手持乐器包括自动号、吉他、精神活性波板、数字合成器台、全息长笛等等。GM 可能会裁定，特别大的手持乐器具有更高的 Bulk。有些乐器具有科技特征。

战术型乐器在使用该乐器进行表演检定时，给予 +1 物品加值。

All but the most traditional instruments use modern technology to amplify their sound, provide musical accompaniment, or connect wirelessly to other instruments. Handheld instruments include autohorns, guitars, psychoactive wave plates, digital synth decks, holoflutes, and more. The GM might rule that an especially large handheld instrument has greater Bulk. Some instruments have the tech trait.

A tactical instrument gives a +1 item bonus to Performance checks using that instrument.

Spell Chip (1st-Rank Spell).name: 法术芯片（1环法术） Spell Chip (1st-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (1st-Rank Spell).description:
用法 内嵌于计算机或通讯器中；

这些芯片可以内嵌于通讯器和其他计算机中，使该设备能够施放法术。每台设备只能拥有一个法术芯片。从法术芯片施放法术需要你用一只手持握该计算机或通讯器，并以“施放法术”动作使用该法术通常所需的动作数来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传承。若该法术具有法器，你仍必须持有该法器，才能从法术芯片施放该法术。法术芯片不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所容纳的法术而变化。

除了施放该法术所消耗的充能外，构成法术芯片核心晶格的精密元件如果在短时间内连续使用，也可能被损坏。若要在一天内使用法术芯片超过一次，则需要对其进行超频。再次施放该法术，然后掷一次 @Check[flat|dc:10]。若成功，法术芯片损坏。若失败，法术芯片被摧毁。若任何人试图对当天已经超频过的法术芯片再次超频，则该法术芯片会自动被摧毁（即使它已被修复），且不会施放任何法术。

激活 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加超频

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

+3 Weapon Potency Crystal.name: +3武器威能水晶 +3 Weapon Potency Crystal
+3 Weapon Potency Crystal.description:
此物品将复制恒星行为所需的专注结晶化。使用太阳武器或耀斑进行的攻击检定获得+3物品加值，且该武器或耀斑可从三枚轨道水晶中受益。

This item crystallizes the focus needed to replicate the actions of a star. Attack rolls with the solar weapon or flare gain a +3 item bonus, and the weapon or flare can benefit from three orbital crystals.

Resist Energy Spell Amp (Commercial).name: 抗能量法术放大器（商用） Resist Energy Spell Amp (Commercial)
Resist Energy Spell Amp (Commercial).description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”的法术安瓿是一种可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (manipulate)

效果 2环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{抵抗能量} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy} spell

Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Commercia.name: 下挂式榴弹发射器（商业型） Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Commercial)
Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Commercia.description:
这种支架式榴弹发射器最常宣传用于发射破片手榴弹，但也能高效投送实用型弹药，例如烟雾弹和闪光弹。与专用榴弹发射器不同，为下挂式榴弹发射器装填需要10分钟，需将手榴弹安装到专用的可重复使用击发帽上，重新组装为弹药。一旦手榴弹装填完毕，只有将整枚手榴弹完全拆解才能安全取出，而这会在过程中将其摧毁。

这种榴弹发射器的射程为20尺。

激活—发射 1 (攻击)

效果 你发射已装填的手榴弹。

This bracket-mounted grenade launcher is most often advertised for use with fragmentation grenades, but can efficiently deploy utility ordinances, such as smoke grenades and flashbangs. Unlike a dedicated grenade launcher, it takes 10 minutes to load an undermounted grenade launcher, reassembling the grenade into ammunition by mounting it on a specialized reusable firing cap. Once a grenade has been loaded, it can only be safely removed by disassembling the entire grenade, destroying it in the process.

This grenade launcher has a range of 20 feet.

Activate—Launch 1 (attack)

Effect You launch the loaded grenade.

Dermal Plating (Paragon).name: 真皮镀层（完美型） Dermal Plating (Paragon)
Dermal Plating (Paragon).description:
坚硬的板甲保护你的皮肤，并帮助你偏转物理打击。带有真皮镀层的肢体可作为护盾使用。你可以用你的肢体执行“举盾”，使你的 AC 在你下个回合开始前获得 +1 环境加值，但使用它不需要手。你可以用你的肢体使用“护盾格挡”反应。真皮镀层的硬度为 35。在你使用“护盾格挡”后，你的真皮镀层会受损，并且在接下来的 24 小时内无法使用，因为纳米机器人会修复这些坚固的板甲。

Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 35. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Knife.name: 匕首 Knife
Knife.description:
升级： 1

小刀既是武器也是工具，极为实用，其形状、风格和材质多种多样，从星铁到陶瓷，应有尽有。

Upgrades: 1

Invaluable as both a weapon and a tool, knives come in a variety of shapes, styles, and materials ranging from starmetals to ceramics.

Coil Rifle.name: 线圈步枪 Coil Rifle
Coil Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这把步枪的枪管周围环绕着一圈线圈，利用精确校准的磁场为弹药提供动力并提升精度，从而加速其射出。

Upgrades: 1

The barrel of this rifle is surrounded by a coil that accelerates ammunition with power and accuracy using carefully aligned magnetic fields.

Speed Suspension (Advanced).name: 悬挂速度（先进型） Speed Suspension (Advanced)
Speed Suspension (Advanced).description:
高性能电控机械替换了你腿部的关节与肌腱。你的地面速度获得+15英尺的物品加值。

High-performance cybernetics replace the joints and tendons in your legs. You gain a +15-foot item bonus to your land Speed.

Maneuvering Unit (Tactical).name: 机动单元（战术型） Maneuvering Unit (Tactical)
Maneuvering Unit (Tactical).description:
内部稳定器和喷射器会在零重力环境中同步你的动作。当你处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{未束缚的}状态时，你不会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}或笨拙。

激活—推进 1 (move)

需求 你处于零重力环境中

效果 你朝自己选择的任意方向移动10尺。你开始朝该方向漂浮。

Internal stabilizers and jets synchronize your movements in zero gravity. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered}.

Activate—Thrust 1 (move)

Requirements You're in a zero-g environment

Effect You move 10 feet in any direction you choose. You begin to float in that direction.

Shredskin (Tactical).name: 裂皮（战术） Shredskin (Tactical)
Shredskin (Tactical).description:
这件石板灰色的衣物涌动着死灵能量。正确穿戴后，这件魔法紧身衣会将活物的外表转变为不死生物的模样，并给予隐匿检定 +2 物品加值。

激活—死灵化 2 (操作)

频率 每天一次

持续时间 10 分钟（见正文）

效果 裂肤衣会将你的外表转变为你自己的不死生物版本。你的伪装会影响你的视觉外观、声音、气味，以及其他所有形式的侦测，包括生命感应。在此能力的正常持续时间结束后，你可以用长袍上的钩子刺穿自己，将其再延长 10 分钟，这会使你失去 @Damage[25[healing]] 生命值。持续时间不能第二次延长，且如果这些生命值被恢复，该效果会立即结束。

This slate-gray garment ripples with necromantic energy. When worn properly, this magical bodysuit transforms the appearance of a living creature into that of an undead creature and grants a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate—Necrotize 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Duration 10 minutes (see text)

Effect The shredskin transforms your appearance into an undead version of yourself. Your disguise affects your visual appearance, sound, scent, and all other forms of detection, including lifesense. After the normal duration of this ability ends, you can extend it by 10 more minutes by piercing yourself with hooks on the robe, causing you to lose @Damage[25[healing]] Hit Points. The duration can't be extended a second time, and if these Hit Points are healed, the effect ends immediately.

Moodskin.name: 心境皮肤 Moodskin
Moodskin.description:
注入你皮肤中的魔法灌注纳米机器人会自动对你的情绪作出反应，改变你皮肤的色素沉着。颜色变化是渐进的，通常至少需要 30 秒才能从一种颜色完全过渡到另一种颜色。情绪皮肤可以在安装时自定义，调整每种情绪所对应的颜色。此增强不计入你的植入体上限。

Magically infused nanites injected into your skin automatically react to your mood by changing the pigmentation of your skin. The color change is gradual, typically taking at least 30 seconds to fully transition from one color to another. Moodskin can be customized to adjust which colors correspond to each mood during installation. This augmentation doesn't count toward your implant limit.

Marrow Paste (Tactical).name: 骨髓膏（战术） Marrow Paste (Tactical)
Marrow Paste (Tactical).description:
这种洋红色酊剂由伊欧西安医疗集团 Nulife 开发并获得专利，其金属气味让人联想到新鲜血液。将骨髓膏涂抹于可从虚空治疗中受益的生物身体上时，它会使其获得快速治疗 3，持续 1 分钟。

Developed and patented by Eoxian medical conglomerate Nulife, this magenta tincture's metallic odor is reminiscent of fresh blood. When applied to the body of a creature that can benefit from void healing, marrow paste grants fast healing 3 for 1 minute.

Nano-edge Rapier.name: 纳米刃细剑 Nano-edge Rapier
Nano-edge Rapier.description:
升级： 1

这把精工打造的刺剑锋刃被磨至仅有单个原子的厚度，并借助再生纳米机器人在无数次劈刺后维持其状态。

Upgrades: 1

The edge of this precision-crafted foil is sharpened to the thickness of a single atom, using regenerating nanites to maintain itself after countless strikes.

Hardlight Handwraps (Ultimate).name: 硬光手缠带（终极型） Hardlight Handwraps (Ultimate)
Hardlight Handwraps (Ultimate).description:
升级 3

这些手裹在使用时可以定制为发出可见光谱中的任意颜色，一些制造商还提供自定义固件，使其外观呈现为爪击、巨大的拳头或锤头。它们甚至还能以其他方式佩戴在身体的其他部位。这些手裹会像制式武器一样强化你的徒手攻击，使你能够为你的徒手攻击添加一个升级。为此，将这些手裹视为格斗组中的近战武器，且具有轻型 Bulk。

你的徒手攻击获得追踪 +3 特性，且伤害提高为三个骰子。

Upgrades 3

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Your unarmed attacks gain the tracking +3 trait and increase the damage to three dice.

Spell Gem (8th-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（8环法术） Spell Gem (8th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (8th-Rank Spell).description:
这些带格栅结构的宝石悬置于硅制外壳中，并编码了施放某个特定法术所需的魔法符文。使用法术宝石施放法术时，需要将宝石握在一只手中，并以“施放法术”动作组激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术还必须属于你的施法传统。法术宝石中的法术只能被施放一次，并且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能包含戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所标示的环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Dragon Gland (Superior).name: 龙喉腺体（卓越型） Dragon Gland (Superior)
Dragon Gland (Superior).description:
通过尖端外科手术，你的喉咙后部被植入了一个经过改造的魔法腺体，使其能够为你的族裔生物发挥作用。当该器官被生体塑造时，从以下列表中选择你吐息武器的伤害类型：强酸、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波。你获得以下激活方式。

激活—呼气 1（操作）

频率 每10分钟一次

效果 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的每个生物受到 @Damage[(6d6)[untyped]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] 豁免。伤害取决于该增强的版本。

With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(6d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Explorer's Canteen.name: 探索者食堂 Explorer's Canteen
Explorer's Canteen.description:
这个保温瓶有两个隔层。上层隔层内含纳米机械与过滤器，可针对常见污染物，使大多数食物和水变得可安全食用，并使你对食物或水中存在的任何毒素或疾病进行的豁免获得 +1 物品加值。下层隔层会将放入的通用聚合物按 2 通用聚合物兑换 1 天食物供给的比例转化为可食用的营养糊。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.52tyG1y50LmTqCA9]{效果：探索者水壶}

This thermos has two compartments. The upper compartment contains nanomachines and filters that target common contaminants, making most food and water safe to consume and granting a +1 item bonus to saves against any poisons or diseases present in the food or water. The lower compartment converts inserted UPBs into edible nutri-paste at a rate of 2 UPBs per 1 day of nourishment.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.52tyG1y50LmTqCA9]{Effect: Explorer's Canteen}

Degradation Grenade (Commercial).name: 劣化手雷（商用） Degradation Grenade (Commercial)
Degradation Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 @Damage[1[persistent,acid]] 伤害

劣化手雷会产生猛烈的魔法爆炸，将物质撕扯进不同的现实，留下一块块焦黑的物质残片，随后消散为虚无。手雷爆炸时，会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成 1d8 点强酸伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[persistent,acid]] damage

Degradation grenades create violent blasts of magic that rip matter into different realities, leaving behind blackened hunks of matter that dissipate into nothingness. When the grenade explodes, it deals 1d8 acid damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Plasma Cannon.name: 等离子加农炮 Plasma Cannon
Plasma Cannon.description:
升级： 1

这种长管武器会发射电离气体充能，爆炸时形成一团过热等离子体。

Upgrades: 1

This long-barreled weapon shoots charges of ionized gas that explode in a blast of superheated plasma.

Photon Crystal (Tactical).name: 光子水晶（战术型） Photon Crystal (Tactical)
Photon Crystal (Tactical).description:
光子水晶会增加流入你恒星显化中的光子流，灼烧并致盲你的敌人。当处于光子调谐时，你的恒星武器或恒星耀斑额外造成 @Damage[1d6[fire]] 伤害。处于光子调谐时造成重击时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:31] 豁免，否则将被 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{致盲} 2 轮。

当处于光子调谐时，你的恒星武器或耀斑造成的伤害无视目标对火焰的抗性。

A photon crystal increases the flow of photon into your solar manifestations, burning and blinding your foes. While photon attuned, your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage. On a critical hit while you're photon attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:31] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 2 rounds.

Damage dealt by your solar weapon or flare while photon attuned ignores the target's resistance to fire.

Dermal Plating (Tactical).name: 真皮镀层（战术型） Dermal Plating (Tactical)
Dermal Plating (Tactical).description:
坚硬的镀层保护你的皮肤，并帮助你偏转物理打击。带有真皮镀层的肢体可作为护盾使用。你可以用该肢体执行“举起护盾”，使你在下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 的环境加值，但使用时不需要占用手。你可以用该肢体使用“护盾格挡”反应。真皮镀层的硬度为 10。在你使用“护盾格挡”后，你的真皮镀层会损坏，并且在纳米机器人修复这些耐用镀板的 24 小时内无法使用。

Hardened plates protect your skin and help you deflect physical blows. A limb with dermal plating functions as a shield. You can Raise a Shield with your limb, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use. You can use the Shield Block reaction with your limb. Dermal plating has Hardness 10. After you use Shield Block, your dermal plating becomes damaged and can't be used for 24 hours as the nanites repair the durable plates.

Spell Chip (3rd-Rank Spell).name: 法术芯片（3阶法术） Spell Chip (3rd-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (3rd-Rank Spell).description:
用法 内嵌于计算机或通讯器中；

这些芯片可以内嵌于通讯器和其他计算机中，使该设备能够施放法术。每台设备只能有一个法术芯片。从法术芯片施放法术需要一只手持握计算机或通讯器，并以施放该法术通常所需的动作数，通过“施放法术”活动来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是你在施放该法术，所以使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传承。如果该法术具有法器，你仍必须持有该法器才能从法术芯片施放该法术。法术芯片不能容纳戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

除了施放该法术所消耗的充能外，构成法术芯片核心晶格的精密部件若被快速连续使用，也可能被损坏。试图在一天内使用法术芯片超过一次需要对其进行超频。再次施放该法术，然后进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:10]。若成功，法术芯片损坏。若失败，法术芯片被摧毁。如果有人试图对当天已经超频过的法术芯片再次超频，则该法术芯片会自动被摧毁（即使它已经被修复），且不会施放任何法术。

激活 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加超频

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Cosmic Connector.name: 太空连接器 Cosmic Connector
Cosmic Connector.description:
这项义体强化让你的心智向宇宙底层的太空真理敞开。当你获得这项义体强化时，你的感知调整值提高 1，或将其提高至 +4，以能让你获得更高数值者为准。

激活—重归现实 r （专注、幸运）

频率 每小时一次

触发 你对一个魔法效果的豁免检定失败

效果 你可以重掷此次豁免，并采用较好的结果。

This augmentation opens your mind to the underlying cosmic truths of the universe. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Wisdom modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Reground in Reality r (concentrate, fortune)

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You fail a saving throw against a magical effect

Effect You can reroll the save and use the better result.

Degradation Grenade (Superior).name: 劣化手雷（卓越型） Degradation Grenade (Superior)
Degradation Grenade (Superior).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 @Damage[1d6[persistent,acid]] 伤害

劣化手雷会制造出猛烈的魔法爆炸，将物质撕裂到不同的现实中，只留下焦黑的物质残块，随后消散于虚无。当手雷爆炸时，它会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:15] 内造成 8d8 强酸伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d6[persistent,acid]] damage

Degradation grenades create violent blasts of magic that rip matter into different realities, leaving behind blackened hunks of matter that dissipate into nothingness. When the grenade explodes, it deals 8d8 acid damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Holy Module (Tactical).name: 圣洁模块（战术型） Holy Module (Tactical)
Holy Module (Tactical).description:
这项升级通常饰有宗教符号，并引导天族之力。它会额外造成 1d4 点灵魂伤害，或者对邪秽目标造成 3d4 点灵魂伤害。如果你是邪秽，你在携带或持用这把武器时会处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2} 状态。若造成重击，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}（若为邪秽则为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}）直到你的下个回合结束，除非其成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:35] 豁免。

This upgrade is often adorned with a religious symbol and channels celestial power. It deals an additional 1d4 spirit damage, or 3d4 spirit against an unholy target. If you are unholy, you are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} while carrying or wielding this weapon. On a critical hit, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} if unholy) until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds at a @Check[fortitude|dc:35] save.

Starfall Pistol.name: 星陨手枪 Starfall Pistol
Starfall Pistol.description:
升级： 1

虽然最初是由拼装改造的等离子投射器，但商业型号会发射炽热超高温的等离子流。阿基顿的狂欢者喜欢在户外庆典期间朝天发射这些手枪。

Upgrades: 1

While originally a kit-bashed plasma caster, the commercial models fire streams of superheated plasma. Akitonian revelers enjoy discharging these pistols into the air during outdoor celebrations.

Chem Tank (Tactical).name: 化学罐（战术型） Chem Tank (Tactical)

Container (Ordinary).name: 容器（普通） Container (Ordinary)
Container (Ordinary).description:
容器包括背包、公文包、行李袋和手提包。容器最多可容纳 4 Bulk，其中前 2 Bulk 的物品不计入你的 Bulk 限制。如果你是在携带或收纳该容器，而不是将其穿戴在身上，则其 Bulk 为轻型而非可忽略。

Containers include backpacks, briefcases, duffel bags, and handbags. A container holds up to 4 Bulk and the first 2 Bulk of those items don't count against your Bulk limits. If you're carrying or stowing the container rather than wearing it on your person, its Bulk is light instead of negligible.

Microgoggles.name: 微型护目镜 Microgoggles
Microgoggles.description:
这些笨重的护目镜配有可调节的放大镜片和照明灯，使你在任何能从极近距离视力中受益的技能检定上获得+2物品加值，例如侦测复杂的伪造品、辨认血液样本中的病原体，或制造药物或药剂。

These bulky goggles include adjustable magnifying lenses and lights, granting you a +2 item bonus to any skill check that benefits from exceedingly close vision, such as detecting complicated forgeries, identifying pathogens in blood samples, or crafting drugs or medicinals.

Autograppler (Commercial).name: 自动抓钩器（商业型） Autograppler (Commercial)
Autograppler (Commercial).description:
你可以用一个交互动作将这个锚定装置连接到缆绳上。夹钳会自动从自动抓钩器的底部沿着已连接的缆绳滑动，使其能够像打结的绳索一样被攀爬。你也可以投掷自动抓钩器，使其附着在坚固表面上，并使用你的简易武器熟练度进行一次远程攻击检定，对抗取决于目标的DC，通常至少为DC 20。此次攻击具有秘密特征。若成功，你的自动抓钩器会牢牢固定；但若大失败，抓钩器看起来似乎能固定住，却会在你爬到半途时脱落。

You can attach this anchoring device to a cable line with an Interact action. Clamps automatically slide from the base of the autograppler along the attached cable, allowing it to be climbed like a knotted rope. You can throw the autograppler to attach it to a solid surface, attempting a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your autograppler has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the grappler seems like it will hold but detaches when you're partway up.

Cloaking Skin (Commercial).name: 隐形皮肤（商用） Cloaking Skin (Commercial)
Cloaking Skin (Commercial).description:
你身上的许多毛孔被经过魔法调控并定向的全息投影器所取代；当其被激活时，这些投影器会同步运作，自动与周围环境相匹配，使你变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。

激活—隐蔽 1 （专注）

频率 每天一次

效果 你获得 2环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术} 的效果，持续 1 分钟，或直到你花费一个具有专注特征的动作将其停用为止。

Many of your pores are replaced with magically regulated and directed holographic projectors that synchronize when activated to automatically match your surroundings, rendering you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}.

Activate—Cloak 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain the effects of 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} for 1 minute or until you spend an action, which has the concentrate trait, to deactivate it.

Thermal Capacitor (Superior).name: 热能电容器（卓越型） Thermal Capacitor (Superior)
Thermal Capacitor (Superior).description:
这项护甲升级会调节温度，保护你免受极端温度影响。你会受到保护，免受难以置信的严寒和轻度高温影响。

This armor upgrade regulates heat, protecting you from extreme temperatures. You're protected from incredible cold and mild heat.

Force Field (Elite).name: 力场（菁英型） Force Field (Elite)
Force Field (Elite).description:
力场能够吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其型号。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先作用于力场的生命值，然后才作用于你的生命值（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，则你的力场和护盾都会受到伤害。如果一次攻击或效果造成的伤害使力场降至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会停用，并且在 10 分钟内无法再次激活。力场在激活期间，每轮于你回合开始时恢复其标示数量的生命值。

如果你的力场为战术型或更高等级，它还会保护你免受致命重击。每当你在力场激活期间受到重击时，针对所列 DC 尝试一次平检。若成功，则改为普通命中。

该力场有 32 点生命值，并在你的回合恢复 6 点生命值，且 @Check[flat|dc:17]。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 32}

激活—升起力场 1 (manipulate)

频率 每日三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续激活 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 32 Hit Points and replenishes 6 Hit Points on your turn, and @Check[flat|dc:17].

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 32}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Marrow Paste (Commercial).name: 骨髓糊（商业） Marrow Paste (Commercial)
Marrow Paste (Commercial).description:
这款由埃俄克斯医疗集团 Nulife 开发并获得专利的洋红色酊剂，散发着令人联想到新鲜血液的金属气味。将骨髓膏涂抹在能够从虚空治疗中受益的生物身体上时，它会使其获得快速愈合 1，持续 1 分钟。

Developed and patented by Eoxian medical conglomerate Nulife, this magenta tincture's metallic odor is reminiscent of fresh blood. When applied to the body of a creature that can benefit from void healing, marrow paste grants fast healing 1 for 1 minute.

Holoskin (Tactical).name: 全息皮肤（战术型） Holoskin (Tactical)
Holoskin (Tactical).description:
安装在腰带或肢体绑带上的全息投影仪可以通过一个 Interact 动作来启动。它可以被编程为投射出与你体型类别相同的另一种生物的外貌，从而隐藏你的真实外表。全息皮肤不会改变你的声音、气味或举止。你手持和穿戴物品的外观不会受到影响。你通常需要全息皮肤来设置伪装，以便使用欺瞒技能 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充} 某人。战术全息皮肤为相关检定提供 +1 物品加值。

A holographic projector mounted to a belt or limb strap can be activated as an Interact action. It can be programmed to project the appearance of another creature of the same size category as yourself, hiding your true appearance. A holoskin doesn't change your voice, scent, or mannerisms. The appearance of held and worn items aren't affected. You usually need a holoskin to set up a disguise in order to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} someone using the Deception skill. A tactical holoskin adds a +1 item bonus to relevant checks.

Defiance Series.name: 反抗系列 Defiance Series
Defiance Series.description:
升级： 1

这套小队护甲是由强化聚碳酸酯制成的模压外壳，配有头盔和可折叠面罩。

Upgrades: 1

This squad armor is a molded shell of reinforced polycarbon with a helmet and retractable visor.

Commando Serum.name: 突击队血清 Commando Serum
Commando Serum.description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

这种酸爽的深红色灵药会赋予你 1d10+5 点临时生命值，并使你拥有的任意速度获得 +5 尺物品加值，持续 1 分钟。当你饮下这瓶血清时，你的血管会凸起，双眼也会泛起红色。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.uf3Fb7Fm7dSzc7Os]{效果：突击队员血清}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This tangy crimson elixir grants you 1d10+5 temporary Hit Points, as well as a +5-foot item bonus to any Speed you have for 1 minute. When you drink this serum, your veins protrude, and your eyes take on a reddish tinge.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.uf3Fb7Fm7dSzc7Os]{Effect: Commando Serum}

Slough-Do (Commercial).name: 斯拉夫-杜（商业） Slough-Do (Commercial)
Slough-Do (Commercial).description:
这团绿色黏泥看起来像一坨果冻，但戴在头上时，你可以通过 Interact 将它打理成类似发型的样式。佩戴时，绿色液体的细流会缓缓滴入你的耳朵，并沿着前额和脖子流下，使其不适合长期使用。

蜕垢发型使你在神秘学检定中获得 +1 物品加值，并允许你将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.h7IhypLwItepwhou]{Adhere} 戏法作为天生异能奥术法术施放。

This wad of green slime looks like a mass of jelly, but when worn on the head, you can Interact to style it into hair-do-like fashions. While worn, rivulets of green liquid slowly dribble into your ears and down your forehead and neck, making it uncomfortable to use long-term.

Slough-do grants you a +1 item bonus to Occultism checks, and allows you to cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.h7IhypLwItepwhou]{Adhere} cantrip as an occult innate spell.

Deflecting Field.name: 偏斜力场 Deflecting Field
Deflecting Field.description:
这面护盾并非手持——相反，它是作为护甲或武器升级内嵌的。偏斜力场呈现为整合进升级物品中的半透明面板，并会在启动时创造一道临时的防护性硬光屏障。

This shield isn't held—instead, it's installed as an armor or weapon upgrade. A deflecting field appears as a translucent panel integrated into the upgraded item and creates a temporary protective hardlight barrier when activated.

Incendiary Grenade (Paragon).name: 燃烧手雷（完美型） Incendiary Grenade (Paragon)
Incendiary Grenade (Paragon).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 10尺

这些手雷使用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，形成一阵强烈高热的爆炸，并造成 14d8 火焰伤害，可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定 (@Template[burst|distance:20])。如果你可以使用手雷的重击专精效果，那么对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷处击退。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 10 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 14d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:20]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Sniper's Scope (Advanced).name: 狙击镜（先进型） Sniper's Scope (Advanced)
Sniper's Scope (Advanced).description:
一个伸缩式瞄准镜附件有助于观察远处目标。

通过瞄准镜进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{寻找} 生物的视觉察觉检定时，该瞄准镜给予你 +2 物品加值。

激活—调整瞄具 1 (操纵)

效果 使该瞄准镜所附着武器的射程增量增加 20 尺。若该武器的基础射程增量为 50 尺或更高，则改为使该武器的射程增加 40 尺。此效果持续至你下一回合开始时，或直到你不再持用该瞄准镜所附着的武器为止，以先发生者为准。此效果不会增加区域攻击的范围大小。

A telescopic sighting attachment helps view distant targets.

The scope grants you a +2 item bonus to visual Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} creatures through the scope.

Activate—Adjust Sight 1 (manipulate)

Effect Increase the range increment of the weapon the scope is attached to by 20 feet. If the weapon has a base range increment of 50 feet or more, increase the range of the weapon by 40 feet instead. This lasts until the beginning of your next turn or until you're no longer wielding the weapon this scope is attached to, whichever comes first. This does not increase the size of area attacks.

Hypernerves.name: 超神经 Hypernerves
Hypernerves.description:
这种植入体会强化你的肌肉和神经系统，显著提升你的柔韧性与反应速度。你获得特技检定 +3 的物品加值。当你获得这种植入体时，你的敏捷调整值提高 1，或将其提高至 +4，以能给予你更高数值者为准。

激活—启动超神经 f (专注)

频率 每天一次

触发条件 你的一个反应被触发，但你没有剩余的反应用以消耗

效果 你获得一个反应，并立即使用该被触发的反应。你在你的下一回合中处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

This augmentation enhances your muscles and nervous system to dramatically improve your flexibility and reaction time. You gain a +3 item bonus to Acrobatics checks. When you get this augmentation, you either increase your Dexterity modifier by 1 or increase it to +4, whichever would give you a higher value.

Activate—Engage Hypernerves f (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Trigger One of your reactions triggers, but you have no remaining reactions to spend

Effect You gain a reaction and immediately use the triggering reaction. You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} on your following turn.

Force Field (Commercial).name: 力场（商用） Force Field (Commercial)
Force Field (Commercial).description:
力场吸收伤害。力场的生命值取决于其版本。当你的力场处于激活状态时，你将要受到的任何物理或能量伤害都会先作用于力场的生命值，然后才作用于你的生命值（包括临时生命值）。如果你已举起护盾，你的力场和护盾都会受到伤害。如果一次攻击或效果造成的伤害使力场降至 0 生命值，你会承受任何超出的伤害，力场会解除激活，且在 10 分钟内无法再次激活。力场在处于激活状态时，会在你的每个回合开始时恢复标示数量的生命值。

如果你的力场为战术型或更高型号，它还会保护你免受致命重击。每当你在力场处于激活状态时受到重击，便对照所列 DC 进行一次平检。若成功，则其改为一次普通命中。

该力场有 6 点生命值，并会在你的回合恢复 2 点生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{效果：力场 6}

激活——举起力场 1 (manipulate)

频率 每天三次

效果 你的力场变为激活状态。它会持续 1 分钟，或直到其生命值降至 0。

Force fields absorb damage. A force field's Hit Points are based on its version. While your force field is active, any physical or energy damage you would take is applied to the force field's Hit Points first before being applied to your Hit Points (including temporary Hit Points). If you have a shield raised, your force field and shield both take damage. If damage from an attack or effect reduces the force field to 0 Hit Points, you take any excess damage, the force field deactivates, and it can't be activated again for 10 minutes. Force fields replenish the indicated number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of your turn while they're active.

If your force field is tactical or better, it also protects you from deadly blows. Each time you're critically hit while your force field is active, attempt a flat check against the listed DC. On a success, it becomes a normal hit.

The force field has 6 Hit Points and replenishes 2 Hit Points on your turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.7CtHz1DQcMXLafOS]{Effect: Force Field 6}

Activate—Raise Force Field 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect Your force field becomes active. It remains active for 1 minute or until it's reduced to 0 Hit Points.

Crystallized Shockshard (Advanced).name: 结晶震击碎片（先进型） Crystallized Shockshard (Advanced)
Crystallized Shockshard (Advanced).description:
激活 f (专注)

触发 你用该武器对一个生物造成伤害。

这块电蓝色水晶噼啪作响，充满能量。当你激活震击碎晶时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:20] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续1分钟。如果目标具有科技特征，则改为陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 2}。

Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.

Quasar Crystal.name: 类星体水晶 Quasar Crystal
Quasar Crystal.description:
类星体水晶将你的太阳能量凝聚为一个点，并在冲击时准备释放。使用此武器进行的攻击在骰出 19 时视为重击，只要该结果为成功即可。若结果本应为失败，则此属性在骰出 19 时没有效果。

Quasar crystals condense your solar energy into a single point ready to release on impact. Attacks with this weapon are a critical hit on a 19 on the die as long as that result is a success. This property has no effect on a 19 if the result would be a failure.

Pain Journal (Tactical).name: 痛觉日志（战术型） Pain Journal (Tactical)
Pain Journal (Tactical).description:
你的原始情感为这本合成皮革日志中写下的诗歌与词句注入力量。在你的痛苦日志中书写 1 天后，选择外交、威吓或表演。痛苦日志一旦选定一种技能，便无法更改。直接朗读日志中的内容会引导你的痛苦回忆，投射你的情绪，并使你使用所选技能进行的检定获得 +2 物品加值。

激活—痛苦回忆 2 (manipulate)

频率 每天一次

效果 你吟诵一首充满极致痛苦的诗篇，将你的悲惨散播给另一名生物，施放一个 7 环级的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EhN3GjdjXChMdiFk]{分担痛苦}（DC 34）。

Your raw emotions empower the poems and phrases penned in this synthetic leather journal. After spending 1 day writing in your pain journal, select Diplomacy, Intimidation, or Performance. Once a skill is selected for a pain journal, it can't be changed. Reading directly from the journal harnesses your painful memories, projects your emotions, and gives you a +2 item bonus to checks using the selected skill.

Activate—Painful Memory 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You recite a poem of utter anguish to spread your misery to another creature, casting a 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EhN3GjdjXChMdiFk]{Share Pain} (DC 34).

Swarmsuit.name: 集群服装 Swarmsuit
Swarmsuit.description:
升级： 1

特化纳米机器人会形成一套网状服装，并会变化以贴合具有独特或可变形生理结构的穿戴者。

Upgrades: 1

Specialized nanites form a mesh suit that shifts to fit wearers with unique or transformable physiologies.

Dueling Sword.name: 决斗剑 Dueling Sword
Dueling Sword.description:
升级： 1

这些传统且久经考验的武器有着多种样式，并经过先进锻造技艺与现代材料的打磨锤炼。

Upgrades: 1

Coming in a variety of styles, these traditional and time-tested weapons have been honed with advanced smithing techniques and modern materials.

Repair Toolkit (Tactical).name: 修理工具包（战术型） Repair Toolkit (Tactical)
Repair Toolkit (Tactical).description:
修理工具包包含各种精细工具与补给，让你能够在旅行途中进行简单维修。你可以使用修理工具包，借助制作技能来修理物品。战术修理工具包会给予你的检定 +1 物品加值。你可以在使用它的动作中一并取出并收回一套穿着的修理工具包。

A repair toolkit contains a variety of delicate tools and supplies that allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. You can use a repair toolkit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. A tactical repair toolkit gives you a +1 item bonus to the check. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Resist Energy Spell Amp (Advanced).name: 抗能量法术增幅（高级） Resist Energy Spell Amp (Advanced)
Resist Energy Spell Amp (Advanced).description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可即用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1（操作）

效果 第7环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{抗能量伤害} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy} spell

Carbon Skin.name: 碳质皮肤 Carbon Skin
Carbon Skin.description:
升级： 1

这套贴身的碳纤维服装包覆全身。大多数通常是暗灰色、注重实用的服装，而价格更高的定制款则如钻石般耀眼。

Upgrades: 1

This form-fitting suit of carbon fiber encases the body. Most are usually dull-gray, functional garments, while pricier, bespoke suits dazzle like diamonds.

Electromag Grenade (Paragon).name: 电磁手雷（完美型） Electromag Grenade (Paragon)
Electromag Grenade (Paragon).description:
激活 1 区域喷射

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}

这些手雷会释放出一片电击场，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:20] 内造成 14d8 点电击伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定。若你可使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对电磁手雷的豁免检定大失败的科技生物和无人看管的科技物品会陷入故障状态。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 14d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Psychoactive Eyes (Commercial).name: 致幻眼（商业） Psychoactive Eyes (Commercial)
Psychoactive Eyes (Commercial).description:
你的虹膜被注入了会产生标志性万花筒效果的精神活性染料，或者你的眼睛已被精巧的魔法科技装置彻底替换。你可以激活这些染料，以不同的效果魅惑你所注视的对象，具体取决于物品的类型。

激活—凝视 2 （专注、精神、视觉）

频率 每日一次

效果 你将目光集中在30英尺内一个能看见你的生物身上。该生物进行一次 @Check[will|dc:17] 豁免检定，结果如下。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{目眩神迷} 1轮。

大失败 只要该生物还能看见你，它就会一直处于目眩神迷状态。对该生物采取敌对动作会结束此效果。

Your irises are injected with psychoactive dyes that cause a signature kaleidoscopic effect, or your eyes have been completely replaced with delicate magitech devices. You can activate these dyes to enthrall those you look upon with varying effects depending on the item's type.

Activate—Gaze 2 (concentrate, mental, visual)

Frequency once per day

Effect You focus your eyes on a creature that can see you within 30 feet. The creature attempts a @Check[will|dc:17] saving throw with the following results.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated for as long as it can see you. Taking a hostile action against the creature ends the effect.

Filtered Rebreather (Advanced).name: 过滤式呼吸器（先进型） Filtered Rebreather (Advanced)
Filtered Rebreather (Advanced).description:
此护甲升级可增强你护甲的环境防护，并滤除常见污染物，包括防护大多数有毒大气。

你在对抗吸入效果的强韧豁免检定中获得 +2 状态加值。

This armor upgrade supplements your armor's environmental protections and filters out common contaminants, including protection from most toxic atmospheres.

You gain a +2 status bonus to Fortitude saves against inhaled effects.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical).name: 潜入者工具包（战术） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical).description:
你需要一套潜入者工具包，才能使用巧手技能进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。战术型潜入者工具包会使开锁或解除装置的检定获得 +1 物品加值。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill. A tactical infiltrator's toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks to Pick Locks or Disable Devices.

Grindblade.name: 磨刃刀 Grindblade
Grindblade.description:
升级： 1

这把宽刃剑的剑锋由微裂分纳米粒子构成，能够以外科手术般的精度将目标切开。

Upgrades: 1

The edge of this broad-tipped sword is composed of micro-splitting nanoparticles that slice apart targets with surgical precision.

Maratan Headache (Tactical).name: 马拉坦头痛（战术） Maratan Headache (Tactical)
Maratan Headache (Tactical).description:
激活 1 区域投掷

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}

马拉坦头痛弹由易碎的中空葫芦制成，里面装满了腐臭的污泥，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内造成 2d8 点非致命毒素伤害，并需进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 1}

Maratan headaches are made from brittle hollow gourds filled with a putrid sludge, dealing 2d8 nonlethal poison damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] save.

Hardlight Handwraps (Commercial).name: 硬光裹手（商业） Hardlight Handwraps (Commercial)
Hardlight Handwraps (Commercial).description:
升级 1

这些手缠带在使用时可以定制为在可见光谱中的任意颜色发光，某些制造商还提供自定义固件，使其外观呈现为爪击、巨大的拳头或锤头。它们甚至还能以其他方式佩戴在身体的其他部位。这些手缠带会像制式武器一样强化你的徒手攻击，使你能够为你的徒手攻击添加一个升级。为此，将这些手缠带视为搏斗组中的近战武器，且其负重为轻。

Upgrades 1

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Magnetar Rifle.name: 磁星步枪 Magnetar Rifle
Magnetar Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这把步枪使用强力电磁体来加速简单弹丸，将其发射为致命且极为精准的射弹，全程无需使用任何活动部件。

Upgrades: 1

This rifle uses powerful electromagnets to accelerate simple slugs into deadly, highly accurate projectiles without the use of any moving parts.

Datajack (Advanced).name: 数据接口（先进型） Datajack (Advanced)
Datajack (Advanced).description:
这件电控机械是一个内嵌于你体内的可编程数据端口，使你能够接入计算机和数字存储设备。任何手持式计算机都可以连接到该端口，而更大的系统通常需要适配器线缆。你不需要接口来访问该系统，因为它会通过数据接口直接连接到你的神经系统。你仍然必须尝试进行与操作该设备相关的任何技能检定，例如使用计算机来访问系统。有些封闭系统根本不允许直接数据访问。

当你使用先进型数据接口访问系统时，你在计算机检定上获得 +2 物品加值。

This cybernetic is a programmable data port installed into your body, allowing you to access computers and digital storage devices. Any handheld computer can connect to the port, while larger systems typically require an adapter cable. You don't need an interface to access the system, as it connects directly to your nervous system via the datajack. You must still attempt any skill checks associated with operating the device, such as Computers to access a system. Some closed systems don't allow direct data access at all.

You gain a +2 item bonus to Computers checks when accessing a system with an advanced datajack.

Invisibility Potion.name: 隐形药水 Invisibility Potion
Invisibility Potion.description:
启动 A （操作）

隐形药水是一种无色而且异常轻盈的药水。喝下它之后，你获得2环级@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术 Invisibility}的效果。

Chemalyzer.name: 化学分析仪 Chemalyzer
Chemalyzer.description:
这台手持式采样装置在辨识未知药物、药品、毒药或其他化学物质的技能检定上提供 +1 情境加值。

This handheld sampling unit grants a +1 circumstance bonus to skill checks to identify an unknown drug, medicinal, poison, or other chemical substance.

Tempweave.name: 临时编织 Tempweave
Tempweave.description:
升级： 1

临温编织服是带兜帽的加固服装，由隔热织物和通风导线编织而成，常用于前往潮湿气候地区的旅行，例如卡斯卓韦或普洛尼斯的丛林。

Upgrades: 1

Tempweave suits are reinforced hooded garments woven with thermal fabric and venting wires, popularly worn for trips to humid climates like the jungles of Castrovel or Pulonis.

Spell Chip (8th-Rank Spell).name: 法术芯片（8环法术） Spell Chip (8th-Rank Spell)
Spell Chip (8th-Rank Spell).description:
用法 内嵌于计算机或通讯器中；

这些芯片可以内嵌于通讯器和其他计算机中，使该设备能够施放法术。每台设备只能拥有一个法术芯片。从法术芯片施放法术需要你用一只手持握该计算机或通讯器，并以施放该法术通常所需的动作数，通过“施放法术”动作来激活它。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传统。如果该法术具有法器，你仍必须持有该法器，才能从法术芯片施放该法术。法术芯片不能容纳戏法或仪式。该物品的特征会根据其所容纳的法术而变化。

除了施放该法术所消耗的充能外，构成法术芯片核心晶格的精密部件如果在短时间内连续使用，也可能会被损坏。若要尝试在一天内使用法术芯片超过一次，则需要对其进行超频。再次施放该法术，然后进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:10]。若成功，法术芯片损坏。若失败，法术芯片被摧毁。如果任何人试图对当天已经超频过的法术芯片再次超频，则该法术芯片会自动被摧毁（即使它已经被修复），且不会施放任何法术。

激活 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加超频

效果 你以所标示的环阶施放该法术。

Usage installed in computer or comm unit;

These chips can be installed in comm units and other computers to allow the device to cast spells. Each device can have only one spell chip. Casting a spell from a spell chip requires holding the computer or comm unit in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. If the spell has a locus, you must still have that locus to cast the spell from a spell chip. Spell chips can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

In addition to the charge expended to Cast the Spell, the delicate components that make up the core lattice of a spell chip can be destroyed if used in quick succession. Attempting to use a spell chip more than once per day requires overclocking it. Cast the Spell again, then roll a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, the spell chip is broken. On a failure, the spell chip is destroyed. If anyone tries to overclock a spell chip that's already been overclocked that day, the spell chip is automatically destroyed (even if it's been repaired) and no spell is cast.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overclock

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Flashlight (Commercial).name: 手电筒（商用） Flashlight (Commercial)
Flashlight (Commercial).description:
手电筒发出明亮光照。商用手电筒会在30英尺的散发范围内发出光照（并在接下来的30英尺内提供微光照）。

A flashlight sheds bright light. A commercial flashlight emits light in a 30-foot emanation (and dim light in the next 30 feet).

Hypopen (Commercial).name: 低压笔（商业） Hypopen (Commercial)
Hypopen (Commercial).description:
这个小圆筒内含有专门设计的纳米机器人，可以：

  • 移除@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}状态
  • 使@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心}状态的值降低 1。

This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 渗透者工具包（商业） Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一套渗透者工具包，才能使用“盗窃”技能来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置}（某些类型）。

You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Akashic Lens (Commercial).name: 阿卡西透镜（商用） Akashic Lens (Commercial)
Akashic Lens (Commercial).description:
作为隐形眼镜、眼镜或其他眼部佩戴物佩戴时，这些经过魔法处理的镜片会投射出一种特殊的数据界面，利用虚拟智能和快速眼动追踪，迅速循环浏览信息，直到你找到所寻之物。它使你在使用“数据库扫描”时所选择的技能进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定时获得 +1 物品加值。

激活—数据库扫描 2 (专注)

频率 每 10 分钟一次

效果 该镜片施放一个 1 环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{阿卡西下载}，并以镜片代替通讯终端。

Worn as a contact lens, spectacles, or other eyewear, these magically treated lenses project a special data display that uses virtual intelligence and rapid eye tracking to quickly cycle through information until you find what you seek. It grants you a +1 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks with the skill chosen when you use Database Scan.

Activate—Database Scan 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The lens casts a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{Akashic Download} that uses the lens instead of a comm unit.

Duo-Enhancers.name: 双重强化器 Duo-Enhancers
Duo-Enhancers.description:
这个魔法科技接口是一对复杂的联动臂铠、腕带、手套，或其他适合生物用于持握武器之身体部位的穿戴物。成对强化器中的一个带有显示屏，用于显示佩戴者当前所持武器的数据；另一个强化器则内含魔法水晶。当你用佩戴显示器的那只手持用一把武器时，该武器的品级（例如战术型）会复制到你用佩戴水晶强化器的那只手所持用的武器上，但仅用于决定该武器的额外伤害骰和追踪特征（该特征会为攻击检定提供物品加值）。武器的任何其他属性，例如其伤害类型、弹药或升级，都不会被复制。

只有在你同时佩戴两个强化器时，这种复制效果才会生效；并且一旦你不再用任意一只手持用武器，该效果就会立刻结束。因此，该增益不适用于投掷攻击，也不适用于你只是拿着武器但并未持用它的情况（例如单手拿着一把需要双手持用的武器，或在非活动手中拿着武器）。

This magitech interface is a sophisticated pair of linked bracers, wristbands, gloves, or other garments suitable to the part of a creature's anatomy it uses to wield weapons. One of the paired enhancers includes a screen that displays data about the weapons the wearer is wielding, and the other enhancer contains magical crystals. When you wield a weapon in the hand wearing the display, the weapon's grade (such as tactical) is replicated onto the weapon you're wielding in the hand with the crystal enhancer, but only for purposes of determining the weapon's extra damage dice and tracking trait (which adds an item bonus to attack rolls). Any other properties of the weapon, such as its damage type, ammo, or upgrades, aren't replicated.

The replication functions only if you wear both enhancers, and it ends as soon as you cease wielding a weapon in one of your hands. Consequently, the benefit doesn't apply to thrown attacks or if you're holding a weapon but not wielding it (such as holding in one hand a weapon that requires two hands to wield, or holding a weapon in non-active hands).

Antigrav Harness (Advanced).name: 反重力背带（先进型） Antigrav Harness (Advanced)
Antigrav Harness (Advanced).description:
这张由合成织物带构成的错综复杂的网状束带，在某些亚文化中被当作时尚宣言穿戴，但在极端环境中也有实用用途。你获得杂技检定 +3 物品加值，并且在零重力环境中未束缚时，你不会处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态，也不会笨拙。

激活—重力改变 1 (manipulate)

效果 你将重力视为提高或降低两个等级（例如，零重力变为标准重力，低重力变为高重力，标准重力变为极端重力，反之亦然）。这只影响你、你的装备和你的移动，并持续 1 分钟。

This convoluted web of synthweave straps is worn as a fashion statement in some subcultures but has a useful application in extreme environments. You gain a +3 item bonus to Acrobatics checks, and you aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while untethered in zero-g.

Activate—Gravity Alteration 1 (manipulate)

Effect You treat gravity as being two steps higher or lower (for example, zero-g becomes standard gravity, low gravity becomes high gravity, standard gravity becomes extreme gravity, or vice versa). This only affects you, your gear, and your movement and lasts 1 minute.

Gyrojet Pistol.name: 陀螺喷射手枪 Gyrojet Pistol
Gyrojet Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪因其强大的制止力而备受重视，配备了一根大口径强化枪管，专为发射能够将敌人击倒在地的小型火箭弹而设计。

Upgrades: 1

Valued for its stopping power, this pistol sports a large caliber reinforced barrel designed to shoot tiny rockets capable of knocking enemies to the ground.

Smuggler's Grip (Commercial).name: 走私者之握（商用） Smuggler's Grip (Commercial)
Smuggler's Grip (Commercial).description:
这些握把的设计使其便于隐藏你的武器，因此经常被侦探、外交官和走私者使用。该武器获得易藏特征。

These grips are designed to make it easy to conceal your weapon and are frequently used by detectives, diplomats, and smugglers. The weapon gains the concealable trait.

Medpatch (Ultimate).name: 医疗贴片（终极） Medpatch (Ultimate)
Medpatch (Ultimate).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(10d6+27)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +4 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(10d6+27)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +4 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Ivory Chompers.name: 象牙利齿 Ivory Chompers
Ivory Chompers.description:
隐藏在这些华丽牙贴面内部的微型气动活塞会将它们变成致命武器。由不死生物媒体大亨丧.率先打造，专为那些需要时刻保持武装又不失时尚的名流而设，象牙咬牙器能让佩戴者在危急关头对攻击者发动一次撕咬攻击。特殊设计师版本还融入了定制字母组合压印、珠宝和金属镀层，打造出终极微笑。

Tiny pneumatic pistons hidden inside these ornate dental veneers turn them into deadly weapons. Pioneered by the undead media mogul Zo! for celebrities who need to stay armed and fashionable at all times, ivory chompers provide a last-ditch biting attack against attackers. Special designer versions incorporate custom monogrammed imprints, jewels, and metal plating for the ultimate smile.

Retrieval Boosters.name: 回收推进器 Retrieval Boosters
Retrieval Boosters.description:
当你用这件武器进行一次投掷打击时，一套复杂的稳定器与推进器组合会在此次打击完成后将其推回你的空闲手（或其他附肢）中。若武器返回时你的手都已占满，它会掉落到你所在空间的地面上。

When you make a thrown Strike with this weapon, a complex combination of stabilizers and boosters propels it back into your free hand (or other appendage) after the Strike is complete. If your hands are full when the weapon returns, it falls to the ground in your space.

Animated Intelligence (Commercial).name: 活化智能（商用） Animated Intelligence (Commercial)
Animated Intelligence (Commercial).description:
魔法电路生成一个可自定义个性的虚拟动态智能，但其没有自由意志。极少数情况下，虚拟智能最终可能在强大魔法或奇迹的帮助下进化为具有自我意识与自由意志的真正人工智能。

激活——自动攻击 2 （专注，操作）

效果 你放开该武器，它会在空中滑行，并自行与您最后一次攻击的敌人战斗；如果你的目标已被击败，则改为攻击离它最近的敌人。每轮在你的回合结束时，该武器可以以其 30 英尺的飞行速度飞行，随后还可以再次飞行，或对其射程或触及范围内的一个生物进行一次打击。

该武器占据 5 英尺空间，但不会阻挡或妨碍敌人试图穿过该空间移动，也不能获得或提供夹击。就能够以其为目标的效果而言，该动态智能被视为一个科技生物。该武器不能穿过敌人的空间移动。该武器不能使用反应，且它的飞行动作不会触发反应。

在其被激活期间，该动态智能以 +18 外加其物品攻击检定加值的攻击调整值进行打击。它使用该武器的正常伤害，但力量和敏捷调整值均为 +0。该武器在命中或重击时自动触发的能力仍然生效，但该武器在动态化期间不能被激活，也不能从你的任何能力中受益。

每轮当该武器完成其动作后，进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:6]。若失败，则此次激活结束。该武器落到地面上，并且 10 分钟内不能再次自动攻击。

Magical circuitry generates a virtual animated intelligence with a customizable personality and no free will. Rarely, a virtual intelligence might eventually evolve into a true artificial intelligence with self-awareness and free will, usually with the help of powerful magic or a miracle.

Activate—Autoattack 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect You Release the weapon and it glides through the air, fighting on its own against the last enemy you attacked, or the nearest enemy to it if your target has been defeated. At the end of your turn each round, the weapon can Fly up to its fly Speed of 30 feet, and then can either Fly again or Strike one creature within its range or reach.

The weapon has a space of 5 feet, but it doesn't block or impede enemies attempting to move though that space, nor does it benefit from or provide flanking. The animated intelligence is considered a technological creature for the purpose of effects that can target it. The weapon can't move through an enemy's space. The weapon can't use reactions, and its Fly actions don't trigger reactions.

While it's activated, the animated intelligence Strikes with an attack modifier of +18 plus its item bonus to attack rolls. It uses the weapon's normal damage but has a +0 Strength and Dexterity modifier. The weapon's abilities that automatically trigger on a hit or critical hit still function, but the weapon can't be activated or benefit from any of your abilities while animated.

Each round, when the weapon finishes using its actions, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:6]. On a failure, the activation ends. The weapon falls to the ground and can't Autoattack again for 10 minutes.

Hacking Toolkit (Advanced).name: 黑客工具包（先进型） Hacking Toolkit (Advanced)
Hacking Toolkit (Advanced).description:
进行计算机检定以入侵计算机时，需要黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与该计算机有物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的连接网络进行接触。先进黑客工具包会使你使用其进行的检定获得+1物品加值，并允许你在30英尺的距离内访问计算机，除非你处于放射性环境中。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network. An advanced hacking toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks made with it and allows you to access computers at a range of 30 feet, unless you're in a radioactive environment.

Flight Suit.name: 飞行服 Flight Suit
Flight Suit.description:
升级： 0

这件舒适的连体工作服由轻质保温面料制成，常常缀有补丁，展示个人徽记、军衔，甚至最喜欢的乐队或运动队。

Upgrades: 0

This comfortable coverall is made from lightweight thermal fabric and often adorned with patches displaying personal insignia, military rank, or even favorite bands or sports teams.

Consecrated Keycaps.name: 祝圣键帽 Consecrated Keycaps
Consecrated Keycaps.description:
这些奇怪的键帽被留在已故新械族 Tier-99-Professor 的纪念碑前，作为一份礼物。

激活—空闲打字 2 (专注)

频率 每天一次

效果 你施放一个 1 环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZBeKxBcUOsXrfMRo]{植入数据} 法术。

These strange keycaps were left as a gift at the memorial of the deceased anacite, Tier-99-Professor.

Activate—Idle Typing 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZBeKxBcUOsXrfMRo]{Implant Data} spell.

Bone Serum.name: 骨骼血清 Bone Serum
Bone Serum.description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

这种黑色污泥是从灵脑人的骨质中提炼而成，尝起来像薄荷。饮用后，你获得虚空治疗，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Crg77XKCHxittH5a]{效果：骨质血清}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This black sludge is distilled from elebrian bone matter and tastes like mint. Upon drinking it, you gain void healing for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Crg77XKCHxittH5a]{Effect: Bone Serum}

Autotarget Rifle.name: 自动瞄准步枪 Autotarget Rifle
Autotarget Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这把短而笨重的突击步枪采用了活塞系统，使使用者能够切换至自动射击，并在一次扣动扳机时倾泻整个弹匣。

Upgrades: 1

This short, bulky assault rifle incorporates a piston system that allows the user to switch to auto-fire and unload a magazine with one trigger squeeze.

Phase Cutlass.name: 相位弯刀 Phase Cutlass
Phase Cutlass.description:
升级： 1

相位弯刀在未启动时看起来像一把传统的弧形剑。启动后，它的剑刃会变成一片闪烁的虚空，其中每一颗微小的星辰都代表着一个曾被它终结的生命。

Upgrades: 1

A phase cutlass resembles a traditional curved sword until it's powered. Then its blade morphs into a shimmering void, with a tiny star for each life it ended.

Shotalashu Armor.name: 兽塔拉舒护甲 Shotalashu Armor
Shotalashu Armor.description:
升级： 1

这种传统护甲由层层叠加的柔韧而坚固的甲片构成，是卡斯卓韦上的拉申塔人骑兵所穿戴的护甲。过去，shotalashu骑兵成员会用其坐骑蜕下的皮，或更罕见地用阵亡坐骑的皮来打造自己的护甲，以在未来的战斗中向它们致敬。在卡斯卓韦的某些地区，合成仿制品也很流行。

Upgrades: 1

Flexible but sturdy plates layered together form this traditional armor worn by lashunta cavalry on Castrovel. In times past, a shotalashu cavalry member forged their armor from their mount's shed skin, or more rarely, the skin of a fallen mount, to honor them in future battles. Synthetic imitations are fashionable on some parts of Castrovel.

Painglaive.name: 痛刃薙刀 Painglaive
Painglaive.description:
升级： 1

这柄凶悍却又带着欺骗性优雅的长柄武器以电机驱动的獠刃撕裂敌人。可调节的脉冲扳机使持用者能够通过这把武器传导额外的痛苦。

Upgrades: 1

This fierce but deceptively elegant polearm rips apart enemies with a motor-powered fangblade. An adjustable pulse trigger allows the wielder to channel extra pain through the weapon.

Cloaking Device (Tactical).name: 隐形装置（战术型） Cloaking Device (Tactical)
Cloaking Device (Tactical).description:
这台投影仪会让光线绕过你的身体。

激活—弯折光线 1（操作）

频率 每天三次

效果 你变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，持续1分钟，并获得2环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术}的效果。

This projector bends light around your body.

Activate—Bend Light 1 (manipulate)

Frequency three times per day

Effect You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} for 1 minute, gaining the effects of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell.

Abadarcorp Travel Suit.name: 阿巴达尔集团旅行服 Abadarcorp Travel Suit
Abadarcorp Travel Suit.description:
升级： 2

阿巴达尔集团的高管让这些装甲商务套装在会议室和战场上都流行起来。应急力场和隐藏式装甲板能在敌对环境中保护穿戴者。更高品级的旅行套装能提供更多防护——还有设计师品牌标签。

Upgrades: 2

AbadarCorp executives popularized these armored business suits for boardrooms and battle. Contingent force fields and concealed plating protect the wearer in hostile situations. Higher grades of travel suits offer more protection—along with a designer label.

Dragon Gland (Commercial).name: 龙喉腺体（商业） Dragon Gland (Commercial)
Dragon Gland (Commercial).description:
通过尖端外科手术，你的喉咙后方被植入了一枚魔法腺体，并经过改造以适用于你的族裔生物。 当该器官被生物塑造时，从以下列表中选择你的吐息武器的伤害类型：酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波。你获得以下激活。

激活—呼出 1 (操作)

频率 每10分钟一次

效果 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的每个生物受到 @Damage[(1d6)[untyped]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] 豁免。伤害取决于该义体强化的版本。

With cutting edge surgery, you're implanted with an magical gland modified to function for a creature of your ancestry at the back of your throat. Choose your breath weapon's damage type when the organ is biocrafted from the following list: acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. You gain the following activation.

Activate—Exhale 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect Each creature in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] takes @Damage[(1d6)[untyped]] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] save. The damage depends on the augmentation's version.

Crystallized Shockshard (Paragon).name: 结晶化震击碎片（完美型） Crystallized Shockshard (Paragon)
Crystallized Shockshard (Paragon).description:
激活 f (专注)

触发条件 你用该武器对一个生物造成伤害。

这块电蓝色水晶噼啪作响，充满能量。当你激活震击碎晶时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:38] 豁免，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 3}，持续1分钟。如果目标具有科技特征，则改为陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 3}。

Activate f (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to a creature with the weapon.

This electric-blue crystal crackles with energy. When you activate the shockshard, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:38] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} for 1 minute. If the target has the tech trait, it instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 3}.

Comm Unit.name: 通讯单元 Comm Unit
Comm Unit.description:
个人通讯单元是一种口袋大小的设备，结合了小型便携式计算机和蜂窝通信装置，可在行星范围内以音频和文本两种格式与其他通讯单元进行即时无线通信。个人通讯单元还包括计算器、手电筒（以你为中心5英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在接下来的5英尺内发出昏暗光照）、可访问任意本地信息圈的浏览器，以及数种娱乐功能（包括游戏）。

集成到护甲中的个人通讯单元具备一些语音激活功能；你可以无需空闲手便以音频格式与其他通讯单元通信并接收回复，但输入信息、浏览信息圈或使用应用程序仍至少需要使用一只手。

可在更远距离运作的通讯单元便携性较差；它们内置发电机以提供所需能量，并依赖活跃的漂流信标进行通信。这类通讯单元的短期使用服务可在大多数大型聚居地购买。

A personal comm unit is a pocket-sized device that combines a minor portable computer and a cellular communications device, allowing instantaneous wireless communication with other comm units in both audio- and text-based formats at planetary range. A personal comm unit also includes a calculator, a flashlight (emits bright light in a 5-foot radius around you and dim light in the next 5 feet), a browser that accesses any local infospheres, and several entertainment options (including games).

Personal comm units integrated into armor have some voice-activated capabilities; you can communicate with other comm units in audio-based formats and receive responses without needing a free hand, but typing a message, browsing the infosphere, or using an app requires the use of at least one hand.

Comm units that function at longer ranges aren't as portable; they include built-in generators that provide the necessary amount of power and rely on active Drift beacons to communicate. Short-term use of these units can be purchased in most major settlements.

Energy Shielding (Commercial).name: 能量护盾（商用） Energy Shielding (Commercial)
Energy Shielding (Commercial).description:
这件护甲经过特殊的绝缘处理，可防护特定类型的伤害。你获得 5 点酸蚀、寒冷、电击或火焰抗性。制作者在制作该升级时选择伤害类型。一套护甲上可以安装多个能量护盾升级，但每个升级都必须提供对不同伤害类型的抗性。

This armor is specially treated with insulation to protect against a specific type of damage. You gain resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, or fire. The crafter chooses the damage type when creating the upgrade. Multiple energy shielding upgrades can be placed into a suit of armor, but each must provide resistance to a different damage type.

Smuggler's Grip (Tactical).name: 走私者握柄（战术型） Smuggler's Grip (Tactical)
Smuggler's Grip (Tactical).description:
这些握把旨在让你的武器更易于隐藏，常被侦探、外交官和走私者使用。该武器获得易藏（特征）。

战术型走私者握把是一件具有异次元、魔法和科技（特征）的混合物品。你可以用一个交互动作将该武器拉入一个异次元空间，留下一个手掌大小的圆盘，并使你在“隐藏物品”的隐匿检定中获得 +4 物品加值。当武器位于异次元空间中时，你无法拔出它，但你可以用一个交互动作将其取回。

These grips are designed to make it easy to conceal your weapon and are frequently used by detectives, diplomats, and smugglers. The weapon gains the concealable trait.

A tactical smuggler's grip is a hybrid item with the extradimensional, magical, and tech traits. You can pull the weapon into an extradimensional space as an Interact action, leaving behind a palm-sized disk and granting you a +4 item bonus to your Stealth check to Conceal the Object. You can't draw the weapon while it's in the extradimensional space, but you can use an Interact action to retrieve it.

Radiation Sweeper.name: 辐射清扫器 Radiation Sweeper
Radiation Sweeper.description:
这台手持装置能够探测120英尺内的辐射。当你对该装置执行“交互”时，它会发出不同音调的提示音，以指示存在低度、中度、高度或严重辐射。它还会在一个简单的屏幕上显示辐射区域。当你移动时，它会自动更新数据，直到你下个回合开始。此后，你必须再次对该装置执行“交互”以进行另一轮扫描。辐射扫描器无法穿过3英尺厚的泥土或木材、1英尺厚的石头、1英寸厚的普通金属、薄薄的一层铅，或任何力场来探测辐射。辐射扫描器免疫辐射的效果。

This handheld device is capable of detecting radiation within 120 feet. When you Interact with the device, it emits pings in different tones to indicate the presence of low, medium, high, or severe radiation. It also displays the areas of radiation on a simple screen. It automatically updates the data as you move until the beginning of your next turn. After that, you must Interact with the device again to conduct another sweep. A radiation sweeper can't detect radiation through 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force field. A radiation sweeper is immune to the effects of radiation.

Truesight Sight (Commercial).name: 真视视觉（商业） Truesight Sight (Commercial)
Truesight Sight (Commercial).description:
镜片由晶体制成，在切割过程中特别灌注了法术，然后内嵌到自动对焦瞄具中。当你透过瞄准镜观察时，你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{寻找} 的视觉察觉检定时获得 +1 物品加值。

激活—看见真实 2 (操作)

频率 每天一次

效果 在接下来的 10 分钟内，当你透过瞄准镜观察时，你可以看见 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形} 生物，仿佛它们并未隐形。此外，你还能看见躲藏在物体表面 10 英尺范围内的灵体生物，例如幽灵。

Lenses are made of crystals specially infused with spells as they're cut, then installed into autofocusing sights. You gain a +1 item bonus to visual Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} when looking through the scope.

Activate—See the Truth 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect For the next 10 minutes, while looking through the scope, you can see @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures as though they weren't invisible. Additionally, you can see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, hiding within 10 feet of an object's surface.

Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Advanced).name: 下挂式榴弹发射器（先进型） Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Advanced)
Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Advanced).description:
这种托架式榴弹发射器最常宣传用于发射破片手雷，但也能高效投送烟雾弹和闪光弹等功能性弹药。与专用榴弹发射器不同，为下挂式榴弹发射器装填需要 10 分钟；你需要将手雷安装到专用的可重复使用击发帽上，把它重新组装成弹药。一旦手雷被装填，若要安全取出，只能将整枚手雷完全拆解，而这会在过程中将其摧毁。

这种榴弹发射器的射程为 40 尺，并具有 tracking +2 特性。

激活—发射 1 (攻击)

效果 你发射已装填的手雷。

This bracket-mounted grenade launcher is most often advertised for use with fragmentation grenades, but can efficiently deploy utility ordinances, such as smoke grenades and flashbangs. Unlike a dedicated grenade launcher, it takes 10 minutes to load an undermounted grenade launcher, reassembling the grenade into ammunition by mounting it on a specialized reusable firing cap. Once a grenade has been loaded, it can only be safely removed by disassembling the entire grenade, destroying it in the process.

This grenade launcher has a range of 40 feet and the tracking +2 trait.

Activate—Launch 1 (attack)

Effect You launch the loaded grenade.

Congealer Incense (Tactical).name: 凝结香（战术型） Congealer Incense (Tactical)
Congealer Incense (Tactical).description:
这缕精致的熏香装在一个手工吹制的玻璃小瓶中，以拥有数百年历史的厄俄克斯树木的石化木材制成，并掺入了灵脑人骨灰的酊剂与来自德米纳斯海洋的附魔沙粒。打破容器使其接触空气时，熏香会猛然迸发出甜腻的薰衣草香烟雾，黏附在虚体生物身上并稳定其形体。

激活—打破开启 1 (manipulate) 持续时间 1分钟

效果 紫色烟雾从熏香中滚滚涌出，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]。在每轮开始时，这个放射增加5尺（最大至30尺）。激活凝结熏香的生物可以以自由动作将其丢在一个空间内，或者继续用1只手携带它，从而在该生物的回合中移动这个放射的中心。任何进入该区域或在其中开始其回合的虚体生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:27] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 将该虚体生物的抗性视为降低4点。

失败 同成功，但该生物失去所有对精准伤害的免疫，并将其抗性视为降低8点。

大失败 同失败，但该生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

This delicate strand of incense is packaged in a hand-blown glass vial and crafted from petrified wood of centuries-old Eoxian trees, peppered with a tincture of elebrian ashes and enchanted sand from the Deminas Ocean. When exposed to air by breaking the container, the incense bursts into cloying, lavender-scented smoke that sticks to incorporeal creatures and stabilizes their form.

Activate—Break Open 1 (manipulate) Duration 1 minute

Effect Purple smoke billows out from the incense in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]. At the start of each round, this emanation increases by 5 feet (to a maximum of 30 feet). The creature who activated the congealer incense can drop it in a space as a free action, or can continue to carry it with them in 1 hand, thus moving the center of the emanation on that creature's turn. Any incorporeal creature who enters this area or begins their turn inside of it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:27] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success Treat the incorporeal creature's resistances as 4 lower.

Failure As success, but the creature loses all immunity to precision damage and treats its resistances as 8 lower.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Merciful.name: 仁慈 Merciful
Merciful.description:
仁慈武器会泛起一种在整个银河系都广为辨识的绿色光辉。仁慈武器具有非致命特征，且不能用于进行致命攻击。该武器本应造成的任何持续伤害都会被抵消。

当造成重击时，仁慈武器会使目标因被罪恶感与悔意所淹没，而对该武器的持用者陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷} 1分钟。这是一个精神效果。如果你可以使用该武器的重击专精效果，你可以选择使用它或仁慈效果。
