你原始的情感为这本合成皮革日志中写下的诗句与词句注入力量。在你的痛苦日志中书写 1 天后，选择交涉、威吓或表演。技能一旦为痛苦日志选定，便无法更改。直接诵读日志中的内容会引导你痛苦的回忆，投射你的情感，并使你使用所选技能进行的检定获得 +1 物品加值。

激活—痛苦回忆 2（操作）

频率 每天一次

效果 你吟诵一首极度痛苦的诗，将你的苦楚散播给另一个生物，施放 3 环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EhN3GjdjXChMdiFk]{分担痛苦}（DC 23）。

Your raw emotions empower the poems and phrases penned in this synthetic leather journal. After spending 1 day writing in your pain journal, select Diplomacy, Intimidation, or Performance. Once a skill is selected for a pain journal, it can't be changed. Reading directly from the journal harnesses your painful memories, projects your emotions, and gives you a +1 item bonus to checks using the selected skill.

Activate—Painful Memory 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You recite a poem of utter anguish to spread your misery to another creature, casting a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.EhN3GjdjXChMdiFk]{Share Pain} (DC 23).

Musical Instrument (Heavy, Tactical).name: 乐器（重型，战术） Musical Instrument (Heavy, Tactical)
Musical Instrument (Heavy, Tactical).description:
除了最传统的乐器之外，几乎所有乐器都会使用现代技术来放大其声音、提供音乐伴奏，或以无线方式连接到其他乐器。重型乐器，如鼓组平台和特雷门琴，便携性较差，通常需要固定不动才能演奏。某些乐器具有科技特征。

战术型乐器使你在使用该乐器进行表演检定时获得 +1 物品加值。

All but the most traditional instruments use modern technology to amplify their sound, provide musical accompaniment, or connect wirelessly to other instruments. Heavy instruments, such as drumdecks and theremins, are less portable and generally need to be stationary while played. Some instruments have the tech trait.

A tactical instrument gives a +1 item bonus to Performance checks using that instrument.

Screamer.name: 尖啸者 Screamer
Screamer.description:
升级： 1

尖啸器形似一个需要双手持握的大型定向扬声器，能发出震耳欲聋的轰鸣。在较低音量下，尖啸器可作为便携式扩音器使用。

Upgrades: 1

Resembling a large directional speaker held in two hands, a screamer produces a deafening boom. At lower volumes, a screamer functions as a portable loudspeaker.

Loudener (Commercial).name: 扩音器（商用） Loudener (Commercial)
Loudener (Commercial).description:
这种特制锥体内嵌在武器的枪口或握柄上，利用气动脉冲与被动声学来提高其攻击的音量。它额外造成 1d6 点音波伤害。若造成重击，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:24] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 1 分钟（若严重失败则为 1 小时）。

This specialized cone is installed over the muzzle or hilt of a weapon to use pneumonic pulses and passive acoustics to increase the volume of its attacks. It deals an extra 1d6 sonic damage. On a critical hit, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute (or 1 hour on a critical failure).

Maratan Headache (Superior).name: 马拉坦头痛（卓越型） Maratan Headache (Superior)
Maratan Headache (Superior).description:
激活 1 区域 火焰

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}

马拉坦头痛弹由易碎的中空葫芦制成，内部装满腐臭的污泥，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:15] 内造成 18d8 非致命毒素伤害，并需进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 2}

Maratan headaches are made from brittle hollow gourds filled with a putrid sludge, dealing 18d8 nonlethal poison damage in a @Template[burst|distance:15] with a @Check[fortitude|against:class|basic] save.

Infiltrator Serum.name: 渗透者血清 Infiltrator Serum
Infiltrator Serum.description:
激活 1 (操作)

这种油性的血清会使你在 10 分钟内对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置} 的检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.zXZoUqxzXFisGqmw]{效果：渗透者血清}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This oily serum grants a +1 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable a Device} for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.zXZoUqxzXFisGqmw]{Effect: Infiltrator Serum}

Graviton Crystal (Commercial).name: 引力子水晶（商业） Graviton Crystal (Commercial)
Graviton Crystal (Commercial).description:
引力水晶会增强你日轮显化周围的重力作用，加速其影响，并可能将敌人困在其重力场内。当你处于引力调谐时，你的日轮武器或日轮耀焰会额外造成 @Damage[1d6[untyped]] 你日轮武器或耀焰伤害类型的伤害。当你处于引力调谐且造成重击时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:23] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{减速 1}，直到你下个回合结束。

A graviton crystal increases the forces of gravity around your solar manifestations, accelerating its impact and possibly trapping foes within its gravity field. While graviton attuned, your solar weapon or solar flare deals an extra @Damage[1d6[untyped]] damage of your solar weapon's or flare's damage type. On a critical hit while you're graviton attuned, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of your next turn.

Arc Emitter.name: 弧光发射器 Arc Emitter
Arc Emitter.description:
升级： 1

这把武器由两条4英尺长的可伸展导轨组成，能向目标射出电弧，并且电弧会安全地避开其持用者释放。

Upgrades: 1

Composed of two 4-foot-long protracting rails, this weapon shoots arcs of electricity at targets, emitted safely away from its wielder.

Spell Gem (10th-Rank Spell).name: 法术宝石（10环法术） Spell Gem (10th-Rank Spell)
Spell Gem (10th-Rank Spell).description:
这些晶格状宝石悬浮在硅制外壳中，并编码了施放某个单一、特定法术所需的魔法铭文。从法术宝石中施放法术，需要你用一只手持握宝石，并以“施放法术”活动激活它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术必须属于你的施法传承。法术宝石中的法术只能施放一次，且法术宝石会作为施法的一部分被摧毁。法术宝石不能包含戏法或仪式。此物品的特征会根据其所含法术而变化。

激活 施放法术

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Aucturnite Chakram.name: 奥克腾岩轮刃 Aucturnite Chakram
Aucturnite Chakram.description:
升级： 1

这个带刃圆环由一块奥克腾岩雕刻而成，并被塑造成类似行星环的样子。这种材料神秘地出现在距离奥克腾原始轨道数光年之外的地方。

Upgrades: 1

This bladed hoop is carved from a chunk of aucturnite and sculpted to resemble a planet's ring. The material has mysteriously appeared light-years from Aucturn's original orbit.

Aeon Stone (Guiding).name: 永劫石（引导） Aeon Stone (Guiding)
Aeon Stone (Guiding).description:
作为阿兹兰特星际帝国内的常见物品，这些宝石是冒险者和富有收藏家喜爱的身份象征。尽管这些石头具有万般不同的形态与功能，但据说它们全都是远界实体在远古时期用来构筑物质宇宙的水晶工具碎片。

当你注入这些经精密切割的水晶之一时，这颗石头会环绕你的头部运行（如果你没有头部，则环绕你身体上其他可见的部位），而不是佩戴在身上。你可以用一个交互动作收起一颗万古石，而环绕运行的石头则可以被他人对你成功施展一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} 动作，从空中夺走。被收起或移除的石头仍保持已注入状态，但其效果会处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态，直到你再次让它环绕你的头部为止。

万古石有多种类型，每一种都有不同的外观与魔法效果。每颗万古石在嵌入特定物品时也会获得一种共鸣能力，例如具有万古特征的武器，或称为寻路仪的古老魔法装置。

这颗金色星辰闪耀着欢愉的能量。它的共鸣能力使你能够将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{Guidance} 作为一种神秘先天戏法施放。

激活—太空幸运 1 （专注，幸运）

频率 每天一次

触发条件 你在一次攻击检定、豁免检定或技能检定中大失败

效果 你将此次大失败改为失败。

Staple items within the Azlanti Star Empire, these gemstones are popular status symbols for adventurers and wealthy collectors. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to build the Universe in ancient times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head (or another visible part of your anatomy if you don't have a head) instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into specific items, such as weapons with the aeon trait or antique magical devices called wayfinders.

This gold star glitters with joyful energy. Its resonant power allows you to cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{Guidance} as an occult innate cantrip.

Activate—Cosmic Luck 1 (concentrate, fortune)

Frequency once per day

Trigger You critically fail an attack roll, saving throw, or skill check

Effect You change the critical failure into a failure.

Hearing Aid.name: 助听器 Hearing Aid
Hearing Aid.description:
该装置可安装在你的耳道或其他适合的听觉器官内。常见于通用聚合物打印终端，这种义体可恢复或增强听力。该义体不计入你的植入体上限。

This device fits into your ear canal or other suitable auditory organs. Commonly available at UPB printing kiosks, this augmentation restores or enhances hearing. This augmentation doesn't count toward your implant limit.

Maneuvering Unit (Superior).name: 机动单元（卓越型） Maneuvering Unit (Superior)
Maneuvering Unit (Superior).description:
内部稳定器与喷射器会同步你的零重力移动。处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{未束缚的}状态时，你不会处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态，也不会笨拙。

激活—推进 1 (move)

要求 你处于零重力环境中

效果 你朝任意自选方向移动30英尺。你开始朝该方向漂浮。

Internal stabilizers and jets synchronize your movements in zero gravity. You aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.z1ucw4CLwLqHoAp3]{Untethered}.

Activate—Thrust 1 (move)

Requirements You're in a zero-g environment

Effect You move 30 feet in any direction you choose. You begin to float in that direction.

Laser Eye.name: 激光眼 Laser Eye
Laser Eye.description:
一只来自阿卡夏巨龙（或其他生物）的激光眼眸已被植入你的体内。不论这只眼眸是在培养槽中生长而成，还是从猎获物身上剜取下来的，这都是你的秘密。你获得一个激光眼眸无武装攻击，造成1d4点火焰伤害，射程增量为60英尺。你的激光眼眸属于激光组，并具有灵巧、可隐藏、火焰、科技和无武装特征。

A laser eye from an Akashic dragon (or other creature) has been implanted into your body. Whether the eye was vat grown or carved from a kill is your secret. You gain a laser eye unarmed attack that deals 1d4 fire damage with a range increment of 60 feet. Your laser eye is in the laser group and has the agile, concealable, fire, tech, and unarmed traits.

Prosthetic Limb.name: 义肢肢体 Prosthetic Limb
Prosthetic Limb.description:
这种义肢可替代缺失或受损的肢体。义肢是常见的增强件，在许多世界的通用聚合物打印亭都可获得，并且有多种不同的材料和尺寸。该增强件可恢复肢体功能，包括在该肢体中安装其他增强件的能力，但它并不比被替代的肢体更耐用，也不会以其他方式表现出不同功能。义肢可以替代你失去的肢体，或者你也可以先移除一条肢体，再用义肢替换。该增强件不计入你的植入体上限。

This prosthesis replaces a missing or damaged limb. Prosthetic limbs are common augmentations available at UPB printing kiosks on many worlds and come in many different materials and sizes. The augmentation restores functionality, including the ability to install other augmentations in the limb, but it's no more durable than and doesn't otherwise function differently from the replaced limb. A prosthetic limb can replace one you've lost, or you can have a limb removed to replace it with a prosthetic. This augmentation doesn't count toward your implant limit.

Repair Toolkit (Commercial).name: 修理工具包（商用） Repair Toolkit (Commercial)
Repair Toolkit (Commercial).description:
修理工具包包含各种精密工具和补给，使你能够在旅途中进行简单修理。你可以使用修理工具包通过制作技能来修理物品。你可以在使用它的动作中作为该动作的一部分取出并收起一套穿用中的修理工具包。

A repair toolkit contains a variety of delicate tools and supplies that allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. You can use a repair toolkit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Glow Up Spell Amp (Advanced).name: 容光焕发法术增幅（先进） Glow Up Spell Amp (Advanced)
Glow Up Spell Amp (Advanced).description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可即用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的增益。

激活—注射 1（操纵）

效果 第5环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up} spell

Sharpshooter Serum (Tactical).name: 神射手血清（战术型） Sharpshooter Serum (Tactical)
Sharpshooter Serum (Tactical).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

这种烟雾缭绕的橙色液体会增强你的感官，并使你的目标因掩护而获得的 AC 情况加值在你进行远程打击时减少 2，持续 5 分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.UB0yKVxoS0EBXyCO]{效果：神射手血清}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This smoky orange liquid enhances your senses and reduces the circumstance bonus to AC your targets gain from cover by 2 against your ranged Strikes for 5 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.UB0yKVxoS0EBXyCO]{Effect: Sharpshooter Serum}

Antigrav Harness (Tactical).name: 反重力背带（战术） Antigrav Harness (Tactical)
Antigrav Harness (Tactical).description:
这张由合成织带构成、错综复杂的带网在某些亚文化中被当作时尚宣言佩戴，但在极端环境中也有实用用途。你获得 Acrobatics 检定的 +2 物品加值，并且当你在零重力中未束缚时，你不会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态，也不会变得笨拙。

激活—重力改变 1 (manipulate)

效果 你将重力视为提高或降低一级（例如，零重力变为低重力，低重力变为标准重力，标准重力变为高重力，而高重力变为极端重力，反之亦然）。这只影响你、你的装备以及你的移动，并持续 1 分钟。

This convoluted web of synthweave straps is worn as a fashion statement in some subcultures but has a useful application in extreme environments. You gain a +2 item bonus to Acrobatics checks, and you aren't @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} or clumsy while untethered in zero-g.

Activate—Gravity Alteration 1 (manipulate)

Effect You treat gravity as being one step higher or lower (for example, zero-g becomes low gravity, low gravity becomes standard, standard gravity becomes high gravity, and high gravity becomes extreme gravity, or vice versa). This only affects you, your gear, and your movement and lasts 1 minute.

Pulsecaster Pistol.name: 脉冲发射手枪 Pulsecaster Pistol
Pulsecaster Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把气势逼人的手枪会从枪管中射出一道能使人麻痹的电流。其剩余充能会以发光的能量线条显示出来，沿着枪身向下辐射。脉冲发射手枪常被赏金猎人和执法人员使用，他们需要让目标活着。

Upgrades: 1

This imposing pistol fires a jolt of paralyzing electricity from its barrel. Its remaining charges are visible as glowing lines of energy radiating down its body. Pulsecaster pistols are often used by bounty hunters and law enforcement who need to keep their targets alive.

Cardiac Accelerator.name: 心跳加速器 Cardiac Accelerator
Cardiac Accelerator.description:
这种植入体会直接整合进你的心脏。你可以触发加速器，短暂地让你身体的心血管系统超频运转。

激活——加速 f

频率 每10分钟一次

触发 你进行攀爬、Stride或游泳

效果 你在该触发动作中的速度提高20英尺。

This implant integrates directly into your heart. You can trigger the accelerator to briefly overclock your body's cardiovascular system.

Activate—Accelerate f

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You Climb, Stride, or Swim

Effect You increase your Speed by 20 feet for the triggering action.

Necrolung (Advanced).name: 死灵肺（先进型） Necrolung (Advanced)
Necrolung (Advanced).description:
海绵状的黑色网膜从一团灰紫色的坏死血肉中向外辐射，这团血肉在暴露于空气中时会搏动。死灵肺经过特殊培养，在槽罐中利用死灵植入制造过程中产生的废料培育而成，能让活物在伊奥克斯高效且安全地呼吸，使其在额外每等级24小时内实际上免疫其大气中的毒素，并且你获得对抗疾病和毒素豁免的+2物品加值。

安装死灵肺需要1分钟，且不需要技能检定。内嵌后，死灵肺会滑入你的喉咙（或适合的异星生物解剖结构）并整合进你的呼吸系统。大多数使用者在使用这项科技时会注意到一种无害的苍白肤色和腐烂气味。

Spongy black webbing radiates from a grayish purple mass of necrotized flesh that pulses when it's exposed to air. Specially grown in vats from waste produced in the necrograft manufacturing process, necrolungs allow living creatures to breathe efficiently and safely on Eox, becoming effectively immune to the toxins in its atmosphere for an additional 24 hours per level, and you gain a +2 item bonus to saves against diseases and poisons.

Installing a necrolung takes one minute and requires no skill checks. When installed, a necrolung slithers down your throat (or appropriate alien anatomy) and integrates into your respiratory system. Most users notice a harmless pallor and rotting smell while using the tech.

Bone Scepter.name: 白骨权杖 Bone Scepter
Bone Scepter.description:
升级： 1

这根刻有雕纹、由实心骨头制成的棍棒，使用源自虚空、能够汲取生命能量的材料进行了淬炼。

Upgrades: 1

This engraved club of solid bone is tempered using material from the void that can drain life energy.

Dizzying Anesthetic.name: 眩晕麻醉剂 Dizzying Anesthetic
Dizzying Anesthetic.description:
激活 2 (manipulate)

这种毒素取自结核晶实验员的体内储备，并被浓缩成更强效的形态；感染者会因此产生强烈眩晕，进而变得笨拙并疲乏。

豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:15]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害，且笨拙 1（1轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]]伤害、笨拙 1，且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}（1轮）

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Pulled from the internal reserves of a nodocite experimenter and concentrated into a more potent form, this poison causes intense dizziness in those infected, which in turn induces clumsiness and fatigue.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and clumsy 1 (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, clumsy 1, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} (1 round)

Maker's Toolkit (Commercial).name: 创客工具包（商业） Maker's Toolkit (Commercial)
Maker's Toolkit (Commercial).description:
你需要一个制造者工具箱，才能用制作技能从通用聚合物中制造物品。

You need a maker's toolkit to create items from UPBs with the Craft skill.

Shredskin (Commercial).name: 裂肤者（商用） Shredskin (Commercial)
Shredskin (Commercial).description:
这件石板灰色的服装涌动着死灵系能量。正确穿戴时，这件魔法紧身衣会将活物的外貌转变为不死生物的模样，并使你在隐秘检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

激活—死灵化 2（操作）

频率 每天一次

持续时间 1 分钟（见正文）

效果 裂皮衣会将你的外貌转变为你自身的不死生物版本。你的伪装会影响你的视觉外观、声音、气味，以及包括生命感知在内的所有其他侦测方式。此能力的正常持续时间结束后，你可以用长袍上的钩刺刺穿自己，将其再延长 1 分钟，并因此失去 @Damage[10[healing]] 生命值。持续时间不能第二次延长；如果这些生命值被恢复，此效果立即结束。

This slate-gray garment ripples with necromantic energy. When worn properly, this magical bodysuit transforms the appearance of a living creature into that of an undead creature and grants a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate—Necrotize 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Duration 1 minute (see text)

Effect The shredskin transforms your appearance into an undead version of yourself. Your disguise affects your visual appearance, sound, scent, and all other forms of detection, including lifesense. After the normal duration of this ability ends, you can extend it by 1 more minute by piercing yourself with hooks on the robe, causing you to lose @Damage[10[healing]] Hit Points. The duration can't be extended a second time, and if these Hit Points are healed, the effect ends immediately.

Shooting Starknife.name: 投掷星刃 Shooting Starknife
Shooting Starknife.description:
升级： 1

这种来自失落的戈拉里昂、采用传统星形刀刃设计的武器，通常以强化碳钢锻造，并经过化学处理，从而形成彩虹般的光泽。若经过恰当的配重与打磨，投掷用星刃在划破空气时会发出如歌般的鸣响。

Upgrades: 1

This traditional star-shaped blade design of lost Golarion is often forged from reinforced carbon steel and treated with chemicals that create an iridescent sheen. When properly balanced and honed, a shooting starknife sings as it slices through the air.

Neural Lash.name: 神经鞭笞 Neural Lash
Neural Lash.description:
升级： 1

这条鞭状电能触须会对灵能信号作出细微反应。持用经过正确校准的神经鞭的心灵感应者，会将其视为自己身体的延伸。

Upgrades: 1

This whiplike tendril of electricity subtly responds to psychic signals. Telepaths who wield a properly calibrated neural lash treat it as an extension of their body.

Frag Grenade (Paragon).name: 破片手雷（完美型） Frag Grenade (Paragon)
Frag Grenade (Paragon).description:
激活 1 区域火力

重击 @Damage[1d8[bleed]]

这些破片手榴弹会爆炸成一团弹片云，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:20] 内造成 14d8 穿刺伤害，并可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d8[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 14d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Bipod (Advanced).name: 两脚架（先进型） Bipod (Advanced)
Bipod (Advanced).description:
两脚架可以安装在强力武器上——即具有反冲特征的武器——让力量较低的持用者能够使用它们，但代价是机动性降低。你可以用一条肢体通过单个交互动作架设两脚架，将两脚架设置在你的方格内。使用两脚架时，发射反冲武器不会承受 –2罚值，即使你的力量值不足以避免该罚值也是如此。

在将武器移动到其他位置之前，你可以以自由动作进行交互来收起两脚架。以交互动作部署或收起两脚架时，不会像交互动作通常那样自动使你变为被察觉，只要你不是在生物能够看见它的位置架设或拆除两脚架即可。

每轮一次，你可以将部署或收起这个自动两脚架中的任一项改为自由动作，而非交互动作。

A bipod can be attached to powerful weapons—those with the kickback trait—to allow wielders with lower Strength to use them at the cost of mobility. You can set up the bipod with a single Interact action using one appendage, setting the bipod in your square. When using a bipod, you don't take the –2 penalty for firing a kickback weapon, even if your Strength isn't high enough to avoid the penalty.

You can Interact as a free action to retrieve the bipod before you can move the weapon to a different position. Deploying or retrieving a bipod with an Interact action doesn't automatically make you observed like an Interact action normally would, so long as you don't set up or remove the bipod when it's in a spot where creatures can see it.

Once per round, you can either deploy or retrieve this automatic bipod as a free action instead of an Interact action.

Hidden Soldier Armor.name: 隐秘士兵护甲 Hidden Soldier Armor
Hidden Soldier Armor.description:
升级： 1

这套重甲配有一顶带狭缝的头盔，只露出穿戴者的双眼。这套高科技陶瓷护甲由胸甲、肩甲、臂甲和胫甲组成，并会随身体动作灵活弯曲。

Upgrades: 1

This suit of heavy armor features a slitted helmet that reveals only the wearer's eyes. This high-tech ceramic suit consists of breastplate, shoulder guards, bracers, and greaves that flex with the body's movements.

Homespun Hat.name: 手工编织帽 Homespun Hat
Homespun Hat.description:
这顶粉色针织帽顶端带着一个绒球，由毛纺线和母亲的爱手工编织而成。它已经褪色、磨损，毫无时尚可言。戴上这顶帽子会让人知道你什么都不怕。

激活—尽管如此，仍要坚持 1 (专注)

频率 每轮一次

需求 你具有恐慌状态

效果 作为激活的一部分，你谴责令你恐惧与受压迫的来源。你和 @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] 内的每个盟友的恐慌值都减少 1。

This pink, knit cap with a pom pom on top is hand crafted from fur-spun yarn and a mother's love. It's faded, fraying, and the opposite of stylish. Wearing this hat tells people you're not scared of anything.

Activate—Nevertheless, Persist 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per round

Requirements You have the frightened condition

Effect As part of the activation, you denounce the source of your fear and oppression. You and each ally in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] reduce your frightened values by 1.

Sharpshooter Serum (Commercial).name: 神射手血清（商业） Sharpshooter Serum (Commercial)
Sharpshooter Serum (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

这种烟橙色液体会强化你的感官，并使你的目标因掩护获得的 AC 状况加值在你进行远程打击时减少 1，持续 5 分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.UB0yKVxoS0EBXyCO]{效果：神射手血清}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This smoky orange liquid enhances your senses and reduces the circumstance bonus to AC your targets gain from cover by 1 against your ranged Strikes for 5 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.UB0yKVxoS0EBXyCO]{Effect: Sharpshooter Serum}

Incendiary Grenade (Ultimate).name: 燃烧手榴弹（终极型） Incendiary Grenade (Ultimate)
Incendiary Grenade (Ultimate).description:
激活 1 区域火焰

致命 10英尺

这些手雷利用被点燃的化学物质爆炸，产生一阵强烈热浪，并造成12d8火焰伤害，可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定（@Template[burst|distance:20]）。如果你能使用手雷的重击专精效果，则对燃烧手雷的豁免检定大失败的生物会被从手雷旁击退。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical 10 feet

These grenades use an ignited chemical to explode in a blast of intense heat and deal 12d8 fire damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save (@Template[burst|distance:20]). If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, creatures who critically fail their saving throw against incendiary grenades are knocked away from the grenade.

Climbing Kit (Tactical).name: 攀爬套件（战术型） Climbing Kit (Tactical)
Climbing Kit (Tactical).description:
一套商用攀爬套件包括50英尺缆绳、一只抓钩、安全带、滑轮、岩钉、一把锤子和冰爪。攀爬套件让你能够将自己固定在正在攀爬的墙面上，移动速度变为平常的一半（最低5英尺），但可让你在严重失败时进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 以防止坠落。使用战术攀爬套件进行攀爬时，你在为攀爬而进行的运动检定上获得+1物品加值。

单套套件的材料只够一名攀爬者使用；每名攀爬者都需要各自的一套。

A commercial climbing kit includes 50 feet of cable line, a grappling hook, harnesses, pulleys, pitons, a hammer, and crampons. Climbing kits allow you to attach yourself to the wall you're Climbing, moving half as quickly as usual (minimum 5 feet) but letting you attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5] whenever you critically fail to prevent a fall. You gain a +1 item bonus to Athletics checks to Climb while using a tactical climbing kit.

A single kit has only enough materials for one climber; each climber needs their own kit.

Hardlight Handwraps (Paragon).name: 强光手缠（完美型） Hardlight Handwraps (Paragon)
Hardlight Handwraps (Paragon).description:
升级 4

这些手缠带在使用时可以自定义为可见光谱中的任意颜色发光，而且一些制造商还提供自定义固件，使其外观呈现为爪击、巨大的拳头或锤头。它们甚至还能以其他方式佩戴在身体的其他部位。这些手缠带会强化你的徒手攻击，使其如同制式武器一般，从而让你可以为徒手攻击添加一项升级。为此，将这些手缠带视为搏击组中的近战武器，且其体积为轻型。

你的徒手攻击获得追踪 +3 特征，且伤害提高为四个骰子。

Upgrades 4

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Your unarmed attacks gain the tracking +3 trait and increase the damage to four dice.

Hardlight Handwraps (Tactical).name: 硬光裹手（战术型） Hardlight Handwraps (Tactical)
Hardlight Handwraps (Tactical).description:
升级 1

这些裹手在使用时可定制为发出可见光谱中的任意颜色光芒，而一些制造商还提供可修改其外观的定制固件，使其显现为爪击、巨大的拳头或锤头。它们甚至还可以以其他方式佩戴在身体的其他部位。这些裹手会像制式武器一样强化你的徒手攻击，使你可以为你的徒手攻击添加一项升级。为此，将这些裹手视为属于搏斗组、具有轻体积的近战武器。

你的徒手攻击获得追踪 +1特性。

Upgrades 1

These handwraps can be customized to shine in any color in the visible spectrum when used, and some manufacturers offer custom firmware that modifies their appearance to manifest as a claw, oversized fist, or hammerhead. They can even be worn in alternate ways on other parts of the body. These handwraps enhance your unarmed attacks as if they were manufactured weapons, allowing you to add an upgrade to your unarmed attacks. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons in the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes.

Your unarmed attacks gain the tracking +1 trait.

Darkvision Capacitors (Commercial).name: 黑视电容义眼（商用） Darkvision Capacitors (Commercial)
Darkvision Capacitors (Commercial).description:
这些替换用的电控机械义眼赋予你黑暗视觉。黑视电容义眼的运作方式是发射低功率紫外激光，而电容中的受体能够探测到这些激光。对于能够在紫外光谱中视物的生物而言，这些激光是可见的。

These replacement cybernetic eyes grant you darkvision. Darkvision capacitors operate by emitting low-powered ultraviolet lasers that receptors in the capacitors can detect. These lasers are visible to creatures that can see on the ultraviolet light spectrum.

Parallel Accord.name: 平行协定 Parallel Accord
Parallel Accord.description:
平行协环是一枚小型金属圆盘，边缘环绕着超越现实的魔法符文，可作为你若干平行自我的枢纽。完成灌注后，平行协环会像王冠一样悬浮在你的头顶上方。

激活—平行定位 r（专注，传送）

触发 你在对抗一个法术的豁免检定中成功，或者一次打击未命中你

频率 每日一次

效果 你接入与平行协环相连的某个替代现实，将自己重新定位到你在另一现实中所处的位置。你传送到你视野内20英尺范围内任意一个未被占据的方格。若你在触发此次能力的豁免检定中获得大成功，或触发此次能力的打击对你造成了大失败未命中，你还会额外变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，直到你下一回合开始，因为你的身体会被其他现实的破碎倒影所笼罩。

A parallel accord is a small metallic disk ringed with magical runes that transcend reality, serving as a nexus for a number of your parallel selves. When invested, a parallel accord hovers over your head like a crown.

Activate—Parallel Positioning r (concentration, teleportation)

Trigger You succeed at a saving throw against a spell or a Strike misses you

Frequency once per day

Effect You tap into one of the alternate realities linked to your parallel accord, repositioning yourself into a location you occupy in another reality. You teleport to any unoccupied square you can see within 20 feet. If you critically succeeded at the triggering saving throw or were critically missed by the triggering Strike, you additionally become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} until the beginning of your next turn, as your body is shrouded in fragmented reflections of other realities.

Thinplate.name: 薄板装甲 Thinplate
Thinplate.description:
升级： 1

这种光滑但坚硬的板甲通常由半透明材料制成，用来展示穿戴者的真皮电路，并穿在宽松的衣物下面。

Upgrades: 1

This sleek but rigid plate armor is often constructed from translucent materials to show off a wearer's dermal circuitry and worn under baggy clothing.

Hideaway Limb (Commercial).name: 隐蔽义肢（商业） Hideaway Limb (Commercial)
Hideaway Limb (Commercial).description:
你可以将物品藏在你某条肢体（例如手臂、腿或尾巴）中的一个隐藏隔间内，并用密码保护它们。该隔间可容纳忽略体积的物品，以及体积较轻且足够小、能够装入你的肢体中，或能以其他方式折叠或收缩后装入的物品。腿中的暗格（对于人类而言）通常比手臂中的能容纳更多，而你的体型也会依GM裁定调整其容量。

当隔间关闭时，你肢体上的接缝很难被发现。你在藏匿肢体内对物件进行隐藏物品的隐匿检定时，获得+1物品加值。尽管这个隔间能骗过草率的搜身，但许多安检关卡都会包含用于侦测此类装置的扫描。

激活—拔出 1 （操纵）

效果 你进行一次交互，从你的藏匿肢体中取出一件@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}的物品。

You can conceal items inside a hidden compartment in one of your limbs (such as an arm, leg, or tail) and protect them with a passcode. The compartment holds items of negligible Bulk and items of light Bulk that are small enough to fit in your limb or can otherwise be folded or contracted to fit. A hideaway in a leg (in a human) can typically hold more than one in an arm, and your size also adjusts the capacity at the GM's discretion.

When the compartment is closed, the seam in your limb is difficult to detect. You gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks to Conceal an Object in a hideaway limb. Though this compartment can foil a cursory pat down, many security checkpoints include a scan to detect such devices.

Activate—Draw 1 (manipulate)

Effect You Interact to draw an item @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} in your hideaway limb.

Bipod (Commercial).name: 两脚架（商用） Bipod (Commercial)
Bipod (Commercial).description:
两脚架可以安装在强力武器上——具有反冲特征的武器——让力量较低的持用者也能使用它们，但代价是机动性降低。你可以用一个肢体通过单个 Interact 动作架设两脚架，将两脚架安置在你的方格内。使用两脚架时，你不会因发射具有反冲特征的武器而承受 –2 罚值，即使你的力量值不足以避免该罚值也是如此。

不过，在你将武器移动到其他位置之前，必须先花费单个 Interact 动作收起两脚架。通过 Interact 动作部署或收起两脚架，不会像 Interact 动作通常那样自动使你被观察到，只要你不是在生物能够看见它的位置架设或拆除两脚架即可。

A bipod can be attached to powerful weapons—those with the kickback trait—to allow wielders with lower Strength to use them at the cost of mobility. You can set up the bipod with a single Interact action using one appendage, setting the bipod in your square. When using a bipod, you don't take the –2 penalty for firing a kickback weapon, even if your Strength isn't high enough to avoid the penalty.

However, you must spend a single Interact action to retrieve the bipod before you can move the weapon to a different position. Deploying or retrieving a bipod with an Interact action doesn't automatically make you observed like an Interact action normally would, so long as you don't set up or remove the bipod when it's in a spot where creatures can see it.

Radiation Buffer (Superior).name: 辐射缓冲器（卓越型） Radiation Buffer (Superior)
Radiation Buffer (Superior).description:
一层经过处理的铅为你的护甲内衬，并配有集成的辐射传感器，联网至你的通讯装置。穿着带有此升级的护甲时，你获得对辐射效果造成的毒素伤害的 12 点抗性，并且对抗辐射的强韧豁免检定获得 +4 状态加值。

A layer of treated lead lines your armor with integrated radiation sensors networked into your comm unit. While you're wearing armor with this upgrade, you gain resistance 12 to poison damage from radiation effects and a +4 status bonus to Fortitude saves against radiation.

Akashic Lens (Advanced).name: 阿卡西透镜（先进型） Akashic Lens (Advanced)
Akashic Lens (Advanced).description:
这些经过魔法处理的镜片可作为隐形眼镜、眼镜或其他眼部佩戴物使用，能够投射出一种特殊的数据显示界面，利用虚拟智能和快速眼动追踪技术，迅速循环浏览信息，直到你找到所寻之物。当你使用“数据库扫描”时，它会使你在所选技能的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定中获得 +2 物品加值。

激活——数据库扫描 2 （专注）

频率 每10分钟一次

效果 该镜片施放一个 4环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{阿卡西下载}，并以该镜片代替通讯器使用。

Worn as a contact lens, spectacles, or other eyewear, these magically treated lenses project a special data display that uses virtual intelligence and rapid eye tracking to quickly cycle through information until you find what you seek. It grants you a +2 item bonus to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} checks with the skill chosen when you use Database Scan.

Activate—Database Scan 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The lens casts a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{Akashic Download} that uses the lens instead of a comm unit.

Flash Grenade (Advanced).name: 闪光手雷（先进型） Flash Grenade (Advanced)
Flash Grenade (Advanced).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}，持续1轮

闪光手雷会释放出一阵强烈的光芒，要求位于 @Template[burst|distance:10] 内的生物尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免。若失败，该生物将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 2轮。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:10] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 2 rounds.

Flash Grenade (Commercial).name: 闪光手雷（商用） Flash Grenade (Commercial)
Flash Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域射击

闪光手雷会释放一阵强光冲击，要求 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内的生物进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免。若失败，该生物将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态，持续1轮。

Activate 1 Area Fire

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:5] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Armored Coat.name: 衬甲外套 Armored Coat
Armored Coat.description:
升级： 1

这件大衣由真皮或合成皮革制成，并以装甲板加固。装甲大衣通常会量身定制，以符合穿戴者的个人风格。标准版本则作为制服的一部分配发给军官。

Upgrades: 1

This overcoat is made of real or synthetic leather and reinforced with armored plates. Armored coats are often tailor-made to match the wearer's personal style. Standard versions are issued to military officers as part of their uniforms.

Flash Grenade (Superior).name: 闪光手榴弹（卓越型） Flash Grenade (Superior)
Flash Grenade (Superior).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 目眩 2 轮

闪光手雷会释放出一阵明亮光芒，处于 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内的生物必须尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免。若失败，该生物会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical dazzled for 2 rounds

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:5] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Microphone.name: 麦克风 Microphone
Microphone.description:
这种无线手持设备可记录并传输音频，通常传送至扬声器或计算机。

This cordless handheld device records and transmits audio, typically to a speaker or computer.

Programmer's Plushie (Commercial).name: 程序员毛绒玩偶（商业） Programmer's Plushie (Commercial)
Programmer's Plushie (Commercial).description:
这些微型玩偶有许多种外形，通常模仿程序员的个人头像或流行媒体角色，例如礼宾船长或丧。这个毛绒玩偶有助于整理你的思绪；你在计算机检定上获得+1物品加值。

激活—秘密密码 1 (听觉)

效果 你低声说出一段只有你自己和你的程序员毛绒玩偶才知道的秘密密码，使一台计算机、一个容器、一扇门或一把锁免受入侵，如同一个1环的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{Lock}，DC为18。任何生物只要在用程序员毛绒玩偶接触目标时使用该密码，就可以绕过这道锁。

These miniatures come in many shapes, often resembling a programmer's personal avatar or popular media character, such as Captain Concierge or Zo!. The plush helps organize your thoughts; you gain a +1 item bonus to Computers checks.

Activate—Secret Password 1 (auditory)

Effect You whisper a secret passcode known only to yourself and your programmer's plushie, securing a computer, container, door, or lock from intrusion as a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{Lock} with a DC of 18. Any creature can bypass this lock using the passcode while touching the target with the programmer's plushie.

Polyglove.name: 多用手套 Polyglove
Polyglove.description:
升级： 1

这只手套配有数十种精巧工具，用于制造或修理计算机及其他科技物品，并且需要整只手（或合适的附肢）来操作。超频这只多功能手套的部件会在持用者的指尖之间产生电压。

Upgrades: 1

This glove features dozens of delicate tools for building or repairing computers and other technological items, requiring an entire hand (or suitable appendage) to manipulate. Overclocking the polyglove's components generates voltage between a wielder's fingertips.

Flash Grenade (Elite).name: 闪光手雷（菁英型） Flash Grenade (Elite)
Flash Grenade (Elite).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 目眩 2 轮

闪光手雷会释放一阵强光，要求 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内的生物进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免。若失败，该生物会 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical dazzled for 2 rounds

A flash grenade unleashes a blast of bright light that requires creatures in a @Template[burst|distance:5] to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Electromag Grenade (Commercial).name: 电磁手雷（商业型） Electromag Grenade (Commercial)
Electromag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域火力

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}

这些手雷会释放出一片电击场，在@Template[burst|distance:5]内造成1d8点电击伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定。若你拥有手雷的重击专精效果，则对电磁手雷的豁免检定大失败的科技生物和无人照管的科技物品会陷入故障状态。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 1d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Bone Speaker Bobblehead.name: 骸骨通灵者摇头娃娃 Bone Speaker Bobblehead
Bone Speaker Bobblehead.description:
这些喜庆的玩偶面向协约港的活体游客销售，被制作成著名骸骨贤者的模样，其中最受欢迎的是媒体大亨丧。任何活体生物只要单手拿着一只骨语者摇头公仔，就能说和理解死灵语。这并不能让他们理解密码、借用隐喻表达的语言等内容，除非你能绕过计算机辅助翻译应用的限制，例如借助 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Bi0wdUuHsLxvSqrJ]{数字大使} 技能专长。

Marketed toward living tourists in Pact Port, these festive dolls are fashioned in the likenesses of prominent bone sages, most popularly the media mogul Zo!. Any living creature carrying a bone speaker bobblehead in one hand can speak and understand the Necril language. This does not let them understand codes, language couched in metaphor, and the like unless you can bypass the limitations of a computer-assisted translation app, such as with the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Bi0wdUuHsLxvSqrJ]{Digital Ambassador} skill feat.

Glow Up Spell Amp (Tactical).name: 焕彩术法增效（战术） Glow Up Spell Amp (Tactical)
Glow Up Spell Amp (Tactical).description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可即用的魔法注射剂，能够赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1（操作）

效果 第3环阶 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up} 法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up} spell

Gill Sheath.name: 鳃鞘 Gill Sheath
Gill Sheath.description:
你的肺部外侧排列着过滤氧气的结节。如果你在水中吸气，鳃鞘会将氧气过滤并输送到你的肺中。这使你能够在水下或空气中呼吸。你会正常呼气。

Oxygen-filtering nodules line the outside of your lungs. If you breathe in water, the gill sheath filters the oxygen into your lungs. This allows you to breathe underwater or in the air. You exhale normally.

Cable Line (50 Feet, Commercial).name: 缆线（50英尺，商用） Cable Line (50 Feet, Commercial)
Cable Line (50 Feet, Commercial).description:
这种工业缆线通常由覆有金属层的高耐久塑料制成。商用缆线则覆有钛合金层。

This industrial cable is typically made of high-durability plastic coated in metal. A commercial cable line is coated in titanium alloy.
